definition.en: Since there is no real division between the ego and the subconscious, the knowledge of the ego and the knowledge of the subconscious are merged in any case.
definition.zh: 既然自我与潜意识之间没有真正的分野，自我的知识与潜意识的知识无论如何都是合并的。

definition.en: Your own subconscious is the fountain of your individuality and personality. From it springs your talent.
definition.zh: 你自己的潜意识是你个体性与人格的源泉。你的才能从中涌出。

definition.en: The subconscious also contains the undistorted material of the mind, which is un-camouflaged, and which operates between planes, knowing no boundaries.
definition.zh: 潜意识也包含心灵未扭曲的素材，这些素材未经伪装，在层面之间运作，不知界限。

definition.en: The subconscious is aware of many realities which are not accepted by the ego as actual physical events, and it reacts to many stimuli of which the ego is completely unaware.
definition.zh: 潜意识知晓许多不被自我接受为实际物理事件的实相，并对许多自我完全不觉的刺激做出反应。

definition.en: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane.
definition.zh: 翻译内在资料的部分将其筛过潜意识，潜意识既是屏障，也是当前人格在伪装层面上运作的门槛。

explanation:
潜意识并非仅仅是个人过往记忆的仓库，它远比通常认为的更广阔、更积极。它不仅是自我（ego）的平等伙伴，更是连接个体与宇宙基本生命力的直接通道。潜意识深处包含着未经扭曲的纯粹心智材料，超越了种族记忆这类伪装数据，在不同实相层面间自由运作。

当自我忽视潜意识时，它会通过疾病或身体症状等不愉快的方式强行发声。相反，若自我主动与潜意识沟通，这种表达需求就会变得顺畅。潜意识本质上是喜悦的，它享受操控身体运作的乐趣，而喜悦的自发表达能增强人格的韧性与满足感。

潜意识也知晓自我所不熟悉的“可能自我”及“倒转时间系统”中的存在。它没有边界，其过去与未来的投射都是无限的。自我只是潜意识的表层部分，

quotes.text: This sort of communication also comes close to action in a fairly pure state. There is also another result of such relative ease of communication between the ego and the subconscious, in that the subconscious, which is listened to and taken into consideration by the ego, will have relatively little need to make its wishes known in other, perhaps less pleasant ways. Illnesses and various minor and major physical symptoms are often caused as the subconscious tries to speak out, in an effort to make itself heard by the unheeding conscious mind. If the conscious mind consults with the subconscious, such nagging or sometimes explosive efforts will not be needed.
quotes.translation: 这种沟通也接近于纯粹状态下的行动。自我与潜意识之间相对轻松的沟通还会产生另一个结果：由于自我会倾听并考虑潜意识，潜意识便相对不需要通过其他可能不那么愉快的方式表达其意愿。疾病和各种轻微或严重的身体症状，常常是潜意识试图发声、努力让不加留意的意识听见自己的结果。如果意识与潜意识协商，这种唠叨或有时爆发性的努力便不再必要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Part of the subconscious for example deals with camouflage, but the deeper portions are in direct contact with the basic vitality of the universe. When you or Ruburt wonder if this material comes from the subconscious, you often take it for granted that the subconscious is personal, exclusively dealing with matters of your egos' personal past. You are sometimes willing to concede that perhaps an element of racial memory might enter in. Racial memory is of course a conglomeration of camouflage data. The subconscious also contains the undistorted material of the mind, which is un-camouflaged, and which operates between planes, knowing no boundaries.
quotes.translation: 例如，潜意识的一部分处理伪装，但更深层的部分与宇宙的基本生命力直接接触。当你或鲁柏怀疑这些资料是否来自潜意识时，你们常理所当然地认为潜意识是个人的，只处理与自我个人过去相关的事务。你们有时愿意承认或许有某种种族记忆的元素介入。种族记忆当然是伪装资料的集合体。潜意识还包含未扭曲的心智资料，这些资料未经伪装，在层面间运作，不受界限限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Joy and the spontaneous expression of it will always bring increased strength and resiliency to the personality. It also brings deep and abiding satisfaction to the subconscious, which is much more joyful than it is given credit for. The subconscious, for example, the personal subconscious, takes great pleasure in its manipulation of the physical fibers in locomotion. The expression of joy also makes the ego more resilient, less fearful, less resentful of diverse conditions when they occur. The emotion itself is an automatic signal that unites the conscious and subconscious in shared experience.
quotes.translation: 喜悦及其自发表达总会为个性带来增强的力量和韧性。它也为潜意识带来深沉而持久的满足——潜意识比人们所认为的要喜悦得多。例如，个人潜意识在操控运动中的物质纤维时获得极大乐趣。喜悦的表达也使自我更具韧性，减少恐惧，在遇到不同情况时减少怨恨。这种情绪本身是一个自动信号，将意识与潜意识在共享体验中联合起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: On a particular level however this makes little difference, because such communications are carried on constantly at subconscious levels, seldom reaching ego awareness, so that individuals are subconsciously conditioned--and underline subconsciously conditioned--therefore expecting, all unknown to the ego, such communications when certain chemical changes come about; since these chemical changes also occur for other reasons when these conditions occur, on a practical level communications will then most easily happen. These chemical changes without the proper subconscious focus point, will result in clairvoyance or telepathy strong enough on some occasions to be conscious. When the proper focus point is reached however, these communications will result in rapport between the living and that portion of personality essences, or so-called dead, who are still at least psychically connected with life on your field.
quotes.translation: 然而在特定层面上，这并无太大区别，因为此类沟通持续在潜意识层面进行，很少达到自我意识，因此个体在潜意识中被制约——请强调潜意识中被制约——因此在自我全然不知的情况下，当某些化学变化发生时便期待此类沟通；由于这些化学变化在其他原因下也会发生，当这些条件出现时，在实际层面上沟通便最容易发生。若缺乏适当的潜意识聚焦点，这些化学变化在某些情况下会导致足够强烈的千里眼或心灵感应，使其进入意识层面。然而，当达到适当的聚焦点时，这些沟通将导致生者与人格本质中仍与你场域生命至少保持灵性联系的那部分（即所谓的死者）之间的和谐共鸣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This out ego, among its purposes, has the duty of expressing not only itself but to a lesser extent those various hidden personalities which compose the subconscious. In larger terms and in more comprehensive terms, the whole self, the whole field of the complete subconscious and inner self, reaches back to the entity. There is no end to the past projection or existence of the subconscious of any given self; and though it is not understood in your field, there is no end to the forward thrust of the subconscious of any given self.
quotes.translation: 这个外在自我，在其目的中，不仅有表达自身的职责，还在较小程度上表达构成潜意识的那些各种隐藏人格。从更宏大、更全面的角度来看，整个自我、完整潜意识与内在自我的整个场域，都回溯到存有。任何特定自我的潜意识，其过去的投射或存在都没有尽头；尽管在你场域中不被理解，任何特定自我的潜意识向前的推进也没有尽头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It may be necessary in the beginning to induce more or less complete amnesia, but this should be avoided. Through constant practice with hypnotism your scientists will discover that it is possible, and definitely beneficial, to allow the conscious ego to retain its memory. Since there is no real division between the ego and the subconscious, the knowledge of the ego and the knowledge of the subconscious are merged in any case. But to be truly effective there should be no attempt to hide subconscious knowledge from the ego.
quotes.translation: 起初可能有必要诱导或多或少完全的失忆，但这应避免。通过持续练习催眠术，你们的科学家会发现，让意识自我保留其记忆是可能的，且绝对有益。由于自我与潜意识之间并无真正分割，自我的知识与潜意识的知识无论如何都是融合的。但要真正有效，不应试图向自我隐藏潜意识的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The personal subconscious and the ego are indeed equal partners in the formation of any given present personality. Ruburt's results are evidence that his training is bearing fruit. Once such a relationship is set up between the ego and the subconscious, then communication in general between the two will always improve. The subconscious, even the personal subconscious, is much freer from the moment point than is the ego, and it can inform the ego of important developments which can be of great help.
quotes.translation: 个人潜意识与自我在形成任何特定当前人格时确实是平等的伙伴。鲁柏的成果证明他的训练已见成效。一旦自我与潜意识之间建立起这种关系，两者之间的整体沟通便会持续改善。潜意识，即便是个人潜意识，也比自我更不受当下时刻的束缚，它能告知自我重要的发展动向，这对自我大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This experience will be most beneficial. It will enable your present personalities to operate in a much more enjoyable esthetic, psychic and practically efficient manner. As you realize, I have little to do with the personal layer of Ruburt's subconscious. It is merely something through which I pass. I have explained through which layer of the subconscious I come, but my origin has nothing to do with any portion of Ruburt's subconscious, not even those vast areas beneath the personal subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这次体验将极为有益。它将使你们当前的人格以更愉悦的审美、灵性及实际高效的方式运作。如你所知，我与鲁柏个人潜意识层面关系甚微，它不过是我穿越的通道。我已解释过我经由潜意识的哪个层面而来，但我的起源与鲁柏潜意识的任何部分无关，甚至与个人潜意识之下那些广袤领域也毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words the ego is not familiar with the probable self, but certain portions of the subconscious are. For the subconscious, like the probable self, is aware of its existence in the inverted time system. The subconscious is aware of many realities which are not accepted by the ego as actual physical events, and it reacts to many stimuli of which the ego is completely unaware.
quotes.translation: 换言之，自我并不熟悉可能自我，但潜意识的某些部分却熟悉它。因为潜意识与可能自我一样，意识到自身在倒转时间系统中的存在。潜意识知晓许多不被自我视为实际物理事件的实相，并对自我全然不觉的诸多刺激做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Considerable confusion can result if a dream from one level of the subconscious is interpreted in the light of data which belongs to another level entirely. Many individuals feel easier with certain such subconscious aspects, with the result that they may be more aware of dreams that originate in particular subconscious areas, and be relatively unaware of dreams originating in other areas, which they may consider either fearful or at best unfamiliar.
quotes.translation: 若将源自潜意识某一层次的梦境，用完全属于另一层次的数据来诠释，则可能造成相当大的混淆。许多人更适应潜意识的某些特定面向，结果他们可能更易觉察源自特定潜意识区域的梦境，而对源自其他区域的梦境相对无感——这些梦境他们可能视为可怕或至少是陌生的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego must sit lightly, otherwise it can smother the talent that lies beneath. This is very properly your talent, your talent as a personality at this particular time. However, you are also more than you know. Your subconscious is a greater part of you than you know, and the ego is nothing more than the topmost portion of the subconscious. There is after all no dividing line, and you are as much your subconscious as you are your ego, and more.
quotes.translation: 自我必须保持轻灵，否则会窒息潜藏的天赋。这恰是你的天赋，是你在此时此地作为人格的天赋。然而，你远比自己认知的更广大。你的潜意识是你未知的更大自我，而自我不过是潜意识最顶端的部分。毕竟两者间并无分界线，你既是你的自我，更是你的潜意识，甚至超越于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your own subconscious is the fountain of your individuality and personality. From it springs your talent. When the ego becomes too concerned with daily matters, with worry in other words, then the works of the tool become clogged. It becomes ineffective. Dissociation, and I will give you many ways of achieving it, unclogs the tool and is absolutely necessary. The freely working subconscious, or the inner you, is completely capable of taking care of all practical considerations, and will use the ego as a tool to see that this is done.
quotes.translation: 你自己的潜意识是你个体性与人格的源泉。你的天赋从中涌现。当自我过度关注日常琐事（即忧虑）时，工具的运作便会阻塞，失去效能。解离——我会教你多种实现方法——能疏通工具，且绝对必要。自由运作的潜意识，即内在的你，完全有能力处理所有实际考量，并会运用自我作为工具确保此事达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 将内在资料翻译出来的部分会通过潜意识进行筛选，潜意识既是屏障也是门槛，通向当前在伪装层运作的人格。我曾多次提及生命力在接近并形成各个层面时如何变化。我曾说过潜意识最上层包含个人记忆，其下是种族记忆等等。事物并非如我所述那样层层堆叠。但继续用这个必要的比喻来说，在种族记忆的另一侧（或对你们而言的底层），你不再存在于自己的层面，而是以这个自我另一有意识部分的面孔望向另一个层面。这个部分接收内在资料，与存有保持联系，其程度远超过你与梦境的联系，并实际指挥所有你认为要么自动控制、要么无意识控制的重要功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is the ego or directive consciousness behind all personified aspects of the subconscious; in dormant fashion however, and contrary to Jung's propositions, within the subconscious and in those personified aspects of it will be found remnant memory personalities of past reincarnated selves. They may be called shadows and yet they are not powerless. The inner ego, the directive organizer of the subconscious, also is the part of the self which is familiar with activities and methods of which the outer ego is ignorant. It is this organizer who directs not only the movements of the physical body from within, but directs from within those intimate survival mechanisms, without which the physical body could not exist, and upon which the existence of the outer ego is so dependent.
quotes.translation: 它是潜意识所有拟人化面向背后的自我或指导性意识；然而以休眠方式存在，与荣格的命题相反，在潜意识及其拟人化面向中，会发现过去转世自我的残留记忆人格。它们可被称为阴影，却并非无力。内在自我，即潜意识的指导性组织者，也是熟悉外在自我所不知的活动与方法的自我部分。正是这个组织者不仅从内在指挥肉体的运动，还从内在指挥那些亲密的生存机制——没有这些机制肉体无法存在，外在自我的存在也如此依赖它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We have gone into this before, and I have no doubt that we will on endless occasions. And if I succeed in convincing you of my reality as a personality, I will have done extremely well ... Ruburt's subconscious has enough camouflage pattern to enable me to make contact, but not so much as to distort me out of all recognition. I am not his subconscious, though I speak through it. It is the atmosphere through which I can come to you, as the air is the atmosphere through which the bird flies. A certain reassembly of myself is necessary when I enter your plane, and this is done partially by myself, and by the combined subconscious efforts of you, Joseph, and Ruburt. Will this satisfy you for now?
quotes.translation: 我们之前探讨过这点，无疑还会无数次继续。若我能成功让你相信我是真实的人格，那便成就非凡……鲁柏的潜意识有足够的伪装模式让我接触，但又不至于扭曲到无法辨认。我不是他的潜意识，尽管我通过它说话。它是我能来到你们面前的大气层，如同空气是鸟儿飞翔的大气层。当我进入你们层面时，必须进行某种自我重组，这由我部分完成，也由你们——约瑟和鲁柏——联合的潜意识努力完成。这样能暂时满足你吗？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In many cases he perceives in a dream a future physical event, and then within the dream situation acts out various possible solutions, until he hits upon the most agreeable one. In the dream state the personality actually has at its command a stupendous amount of subconscious information of which the ego is not aware. It is actually more practical therefore to seek the solution in the dreaming state, or in periods of dissociation if you prefer. The amount of data available to the subconscious is simply superior in quality and larger in quantity to that available to the ego, and this information can be used effectively through suggestion.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，他在梦中感知到未来的物质事件，然后在梦境情境中预演各种可能解决方案，直到找到最合适的一个。在梦境状态中，人格实际上掌握着大量自我未察觉的潜意识信息。因此，在梦境状态或解离时期（若你偏好）寻求解决方案实际上更实际。潜意识可用的资料在质量和数量上都优于自我可用的资料，这些信息可通过暗示有效运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your experiments with the pendulum are quite helpful to you, in that the subconscious is allowed, through its own action, to make itself more readily available. Your own conscious awareness is increased because you are then aware of inner actions with which the conscious mind had not been familiar. Here we have a coming together of actions, a joining and an immersion of one action within another: the action of the subconscious in answering questions put to it by the conscious mind, （use brain rather than mind）, and the acceptance, which is itself action on the part of consciousness, of the answers received.
quotes.translation: 你们用钟摆做的实验对你们很有帮助，因为潜意识通过自身行动得以更易接近。你们自己的意识觉知得到增强，因为你们随后意识到意识心智原本不熟悉的内在行动。这里我们看到了行动的汇聚、一个行动与另一个行动的融合与沉浸：潜意识回答意识心智（用大脑而非心智）提问的行动，以及意识本身接受所获答案的行动（这接受本身即是行动）。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Often when the child cries about a bogeyman, what he has seen is such an image production or fibrous projection, formed by vivid desire or fear on the part of the subconscious. These powers to project realities of this sort, or pseudo realities of this sort, are meant to be suspended for all intents and purposes during the earth plane. The entity, however, is not so bound. Naturally the subconscious is always linked with the entity, and merely attempts in these cases to imitate the powers of the entity itself. And it does have these powers, although they are usually latent.
quotes.translation: 当孩子因妖怪哭泣时，他看到的往往是潜意识中强烈欲望或恐惧形成的这种影像产物或纤维投射。在地球层面，投射这类现实或伪现实的能力本应被完全悬置。然而存有并不受此限制。潜意识自然始终与存有相连，在这些情况下只是试图模仿存有本身的能力。它确实拥有这些能力，尽管通常处于潜伏状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are familiar, all of you, with subconscious fabrications as they exist in the nightmare condition. Now on occasion when you are projecting from a dream point, you will meet such subconscious images. Your ordinary standards of reality mean absolutely nothing when you leave the physical system, therefore you will encounter, simultaneously perhaps, images that are subconsciously formed; quite valid images that belong in another dimension; constructions created by others within another system; and for any control at all, you must learn how to distinguish one from the other.
quotes.translation: 你们所有人都熟悉潜意识在噩梦状态中制造的虚构景象。当你们偶尔从梦境点投射时，会遇到这类潜意识影像。离开物质系统后，你们惯常的现实标准毫无意义，因此你们可能会同时遭遇：潜意识形成的影像、属于另一维度的真实影像、以及他人从另一系统构建的造物。要获得任何控制力，你们必须学会区分这些不同来源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The time sequence varies also as you have seen. That is, events are experienced in different sequences. However past, present and future has reality only to the ego. Now there is some bleed-through. The ego is certainly aware to some extent of the subconscious. The subconscious is certainly aware of the ego. The portion of the self, or rather the portions of the self, that experience action in terms of what the ego would term probability, is further divorced from the ego, however, and this probability reality appears to the ego very rarely, and only very occasionally.
quotes.translation: 如你们所见，时间序列也会变化。即事件会以不同顺序被体验。但过去、现在与未来只对自我具有真实性。现在存在一些渗透现象。自我确实在某种程度上觉察到潜意识，潜意识也当然觉察到自我。然而，体验自我所谓"可能性"的那部分自体（或更确切地说，那些自体部分）与自我的距离更远，这种可能性现实极少且仅偶尔显现给自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dreams, then, come from various levels of what you call the subconscious. But as a rule any particular dream, although it originates in a particular level, will nevertheless have meaning on all levels. The meaning however may well not be the same. That is, the particular dream may be a method of saying different things or bringing different messages, the one particular dream automatically being translated by the various levels of the subconscious in terms of the interpretation given by any particular subconscious level to the dream symbolism.
quotes.translation: 因此，梦境来自你们所谓潜意识的不同层次。但通常而言，任何特定梦境虽起源于特定层次，却会在所有层次上具有意义。不过这些意义可能并不相同。即特定梦境可能是传达不同信息或传递不同讯息的方式，这同一个梦境会自动被潜意识各层次根据其特有的象征解读方式加以转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This requires on the egos part an excellent ability to perceive correctly the elements of the physical situation, to express it in terms that the subconscious can understand, and to deliver the message properly. The subconscious will then break the physical data given to it down into its psychic components, translate it into symbols; and the inner self, at the request of the subconscious, will then focus all of the energies at its command to deliver the most acceptable solution, taking the entire needs of the whole self into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这要求自我具备卓越能力：正确感知物质情境的要素，以潜意识能理解的方式表达，并恰当传递讯息。随后潜意识会将接收到的物质数据分解为心灵成分，转化为象征符号；内在自体在潜意识请求下，会调动所有可支配的能量，在考量整体自体全部需求后，提供最可接受的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I mentioned somewhat earlier that oftentimes the consciousness becomes the subconscious and vice versa. This should certainly come as no surprise. You are familiar with it in your everyday existence. It is not some isolated occurrence that happens once in a lifetime, and yet as a rule mankind has ignored this completely. In sleep the conscious becomes actually the subconscious and the subconscious, in the most real manner, becomes conscious. Every man instinctively knows this simple fact, and yet every man stubbornly refuses to admit it.
quotes.translation: 我早些时候提到，意识常会变成潜意识，反之亦然。这当然不足为奇。你们在日常存在中对此很熟悉。这并非一生仅有一次的孤立事件，但人类通常完全忽视了它。睡眠时，意识实际上变成潜意识，而潜意识以最真实的方式变成意识。每个人都本能地知晓这个简单事实，却都固执地拒绝承认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You see however he felt that he was learning maturity by ignoring the subconscious. This is at the base of these problems. He mistrusted the most reliable portion of his present personality. He automatically rejected the sweaters as giving warmth on a subconscious basis. Even then, however, the subconscious would not be forced too far, and a good deal of the time the sweaters sat in his drawer. They were not his style, they were his mother's style and in wearing them he felt further alarm that he was being cast in her world, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 然而你们看到，他以为忽视潜意识是在学习成熟。这正是这些问题的根源。他不信任自己当前人格中最可靠的部分。他自动拒绝那些毛衣，认为在潜意识层面它们无法提供温暖。即便如此，潜意识也不会被过度强迫，大部分时间毛衣都躺在他的抽屉里。那不是他的风格，而是他母亲的风格，穿上它们时他更感惊恐——可以说，他觉得自己被强行塞入了母亲的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: For a portion of the self that is relatively so powerless, this is quite presumptive. It is obviously no coincidence that almost the entire survival of the organism is held under the responsibility of the subconscious. To be somewhat prosaic here, it is nevertheless true that the whole efficiency of the personality can be improved if the inclinations of the subconscious are taken into consideration, in the manner of clothes and accessories and living surroundings in general. The personality is simply not pulling against itself so much.
quotes.translation: 对于一个相对无力的自我部分来说，这相当自以为是。有机体的几乎全部生存功能都由潜意识负责，这显然并非巧合。说得通俗些，如果像对待衣物、配饰和一般生活环境那样，将潜意识的倾向纳入考量，人格的整体效能确实可以得到提升。这样人格就不会如此强烈地与自己对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Usually this occurred when alcohol relaxed the ego, and the results would then make the ego tighten its control. When Ruburt becomes leery or afraid to allow himself the normal amount of social drinking, this is a symptom, telling you that the subconscious is being too tightly held. The ego fears any weakening, for it feels the pressure of the subconscious demand for expression. You may now take your break. I will try to finish this, this evening, for it will be invaluable.
quotes.translation: 通常这发生在酒精放松自我时，而结果又会让自我收紧控制。当鲁柏变得警惕或不敢让自己正常社交饮酒时，这就是一个症状，告诉你潜意识被过度压抑了。自我害怕任何松懈，因为它感受到潜意识要求表达的压迫。你现在可以休息了。今晚我会尽量完成这部分，因为它将是无价之宝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: （About the subconscious: According to Freud the subconscious is often held to blame for present ego difficulties. This is not so in many cases--the real trouble being that the present ego did not assimilate the subconscious experience. Seth has discussed Freud and Jung to some extent, in the 83rd and 119th sessions, among others.
quotes.translation: （关于潜意识：根据弗洛伊德的理论，潜意识常被归咎于当前自我的困境。但许多情况并非如此——真正的问题在于当前自我未能吸收潜意识的经验。赛斯在第83节和第119节等课程中，曾在一定程度上讨论过弗洛伊德和荣格。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you purchased attire, testing it out first with the pendulum would actually be very effective. The pendulum ideally would be held above the garment in question. The point would be to discover the reaction of the subconscious. Believe it or not, the personal subconscious is extremely sensitive to color, and to certain vibrations given off by color and by fabrics. It responds to the clothing you wear, to the clothing worn by others with whom you come in contact.
quotes.translation: 当你购买衣物时，先用灵摆测试会非常有效。理想情况下，灵摆应悬在待测衣物上方。关键在于发现潜意识的反应。信不信由你，个人潜意识对颜色以及颜色和织物发出的特定振动极其敏感。它对你穿着的衣物有反应，也对与你接触的他人所穿衣物有反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This needs brief explanation. If the three of you turn your attention to the set, the first one to consider it will form the so-called initial construction. This is for simplicity's sake. I have told you that all living--and I will use the term conditions--cooperate in the formation of your physical universe. Your construction of the set, Joseph, will involve the use of energy formed into various combinations of atoms and molecules; and these themselves give off vibrations that are received subconsciously, and also serve therefore to give indications of approximate location, bulk, and even particular material and color, to the subconscious mind of any observer, so-called; although he does not see your construction but forms his own, more or less in faithful replica, to what he has subconsciously perceived telepathically from you and any other constructor, from generalized notions of the idea behind the construction, and from vibrations and even impacts received from the atoms and molecules that compose other constructions of the so-called single object.
quotes.translation: 这需要简要说明。如果你们三人将注意力转向这个布景，第一个考虑它的人会形成所谓的初始建构。这是为了简化起见。我告诉过你们，所有活着的——我用"条件"这个术语——都合作形成你们的物质宇宙。约瑟，你对布景的建构将涉及能量形成各种原子和分子的组合；这些组合本身会发出被潜意识接收的振动，因此也能向任何所谓观察者的潜意识心智提供大致位置、体积甚至特定材料和颜色的指示；尽管他并非看到你的建构，而是形成自己的建构，或多或少忠实地复制了他通过心电感应从你和其他建构者那里潜意识感知到的内容，以及来自建构背后理念的概括性概念，还有从构成所谓单一物体其他建构的原子和分子接收到的振动甚至冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He did voluntarily choose to be born as a son in this existence. Now he rationalizes on a conscious level his reasons for remaining home. You said earlier that around the school there was the expression he "loves them and leaves them". You see, a very cruel interpretation and a very literal interpretation of his action in a past life, this coming through in an entirely different situation in this life. He is, of course, aware subconsciously of this and acts in such a way for he feels more honest. Through his actions in this life he is trying to make an honest statement about actions in the past. There is, of course, no punishment involved. His secrecy also is a direct result of these past existences, for once he spoke too much and betrayed too much, so now he remains secretive about matters that he considers important. The two brothers never did hold him responsible, however. They understood the situation. They knew that the girl had been terrified and spoke only out of fear and did not mean to betray them. In this life, then, the parents do not mean to hold him. They are not subconsciously trying to chain him; they are not subconsciously trying to bind him. He has chosen to act in this particular manner. He would be much freer if he'd realize that the brothers do not hold him responsible. And the betrayal, while a betrayal, was understandable, and that he spoke out of fear and did not intend to betray. If you will forgive me, I do not think we should use time in the session with your question about your friends poetry. It is not important in comparison to other information, nor is it important to the man's development, nor to your own. Now I know that you speak of me highly; and if I wore a hat, I would tip it to you. You are helping other people and you will continue to do so. Now that you have some insight into the reasons for certain difficulties, you can begin to do something about them. Your problem is not with your Mr. Reed. Your problem is to rid yourself of the image that you have that you project upon him.
quotes.translation: 他确实是自愿选择在这一世投生为儿子。现在他在意识层面合理化自己留在家中的理由。你之前提到，在学校周围有说法是他"爱他们然后离开他们"。你看，这是对他前世行为的一种非常残酷且字面的解读，在这一世完全不同的情境中显现出来。当然，他潜意识中知道这一点，并以这种方式行动，因为他觉得这样更诚实。通过这一世的行为，他试图对过去的行为做出诚实的陈述。当然，这其中没有惩罚。他的保密也是这些过去存在的直接结果，因为他曾因话多而泄露太多，所以现在他对认为重要的事情保持缄默。然而，那两兄弟从未责怪过他。他们理解当时的情况。他们知道那个女孩被吓坏了，只是出于恐惧才说话，并非有意背叛他们。那么在这一世，父母也无意束缚他。他们并非潜意识中试图锁住他；他们并非潜意识中试图捆绑他。是他选择了以这种特定方式行事。如果他意识到兄弟俩并未责怪他，他会自由得多。而那背叛，虽然是背叛，却是可以理解的，因为他出于恐惧而说话，并非有意背叛。请原谅我，我认为我们不应该在课程中用你的问题来讨论你朋友的诗。与其他信息相比，这并不重要，对那个人的发展也不重要，对你们自己的发展也不重要。现在我知道你对我评价很高；如果我戴帽子，我会向你脱帽致意。你正在帮助他人，并将继续这样做。既然你对某些困难的原因有了一些洞察，你就可以开始采取行动了。你的问题不在于你的里德先生。你的问题在于摆脱你投射在他身上的那个形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: I am usually able to escape the personal subconscious area in general. However, as you know I speak only for convenience, for there are no real barriers to separate these layers. They are simultaneous areas, that merge one into the other. For an analogy you may say that upon some occasions, though few, Ruburts personal subconscious layer expands so that I must travel through portions of it, and at other times it contracts and bothers me not at all.
quotes.translation: 我通常能够避开个人潜意识领域。不过，你知道我只是为了方便才这么说，因为并没有真正的屏障来分隔这些层次。它们是同时存在的领域，彼此交融。打个比方，你可以说在某些时候——虽然很少——鲁柏的个人潜意识层会扩张，以至于我必须穿越其中的部分；而在其他时候，它又会收缩，完全不会打扰到我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I wanted to show you that telepathy did exist, and I wanted to show Ruburt that more than his own subconscious was involved. I wanted to build up his confidence. I am definitely a personality independent of Ruburt's subconscious. Now, Ruburt assembles me, or allows me to assemble myself, in a way that will be recognizable to you; but regardless of this assembling, I exist in an independent manner, and with the past of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 我想向你证明心灵感应确实存在，也想向鲁柏证明，这不仅仅涉及他自己的潜意识。我绝对是一个独立于鲁柏潜意识的人格。现在，鲁柏以你们能辨认的方式组装我，或者说允许我组装自己；但无论这种组装如何，我都以一种独立的方式存在，并拥有我提到过的过去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: ("It is a universal truth that whatever you impress on your subconscious mind is expressed on the screen of space as condition, experience, and event. Thought is incipient action. The reaction is a response from your subconscious mind which corresponds with the nature of your thought. Your subconscious mind can be likened to the soil which can grow all kinds of seeds, good or bad. Every thought is a cause and every condition an effect."
quotes.translation: “这是一个普遍真理：无论你给潜意识留下什么印象，它都会作为状况、经验和事件显现在空间的屏幕上。思想是初期的行动。反应来自你的潜意识，与你思想的本质相对应。你的潜意识可以比作土壤，能生长各种种子，无论好坏。每一个思想都是一个因，每一个状况都是一个果。”
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The nonphysical personality does not think in terms of words, but experiences concepts in a much more direct manner. This sort of thing simply could not be understood by the physically focused individual ... The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego ideas in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence. This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these insights in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the one who is physical. When that person is trained along these lines, however [as Ruburt is], he or she helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge,22 is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 非物质的个体不以文字思考，而是以更直接的方式体验概念。这种情形是聚焦于物质的个体根本无法理解的……存续人格的内在自我以类似的方式给予这个重组自我概念，就像在物质存在中，潜意识常常给予自我概念一样。这个重组自我随后试图以感官知觉的形式来感知这些洞见，并将它们传送给另一端的物质个体。有时这些沟通是直接进行的，尽管它们必须经过物质个体的潜意识筛选。然而，当那个人在这方面受过训练时（就像鲁柏这样），他或她会协助这个过程，并建立起一个心理框架——就像一座桥梁——来连接这两个人格。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The front gates of our cube then open, freeing the transformed energy. But these front gates represent our subconscious and the signal to open, the permission for the construction of matter and its form, are dependent upon these subconscious gates. Even as incipient matter flows through, the final form is given by the way it brushes through these subconscious gates. It must be born and even shaped, finally, here.
quotes.translation: 然后我们立方体的前门打开，释放出转化后的能量。但这些前门代表我们的潜意识，而开启的信号——即允许物质及其形态构建的许可——依赖于这些潜意识之门。即使当初期的物质流过时，最终的形态也是由它擦过这些潜意识之门的方式所赋予的。它必须在这里诞生，甚至最终被塑造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When this does happen it usually occurs as a bleed-through from the subconscious from the dream state, for the subconscious is somewhat acquainted with probabilities, and to some degree experiences these in a problem-solving manner. It views various probabilities with the purposes of the ego in mind, and therefore aids the ego in its decisions as to which probable events it should choose for its own experience.
quotes.translation: 当这种情况确实发生时，通常表现为从梦境状态的潜意识中渗透出来，因为潜意识对可能性有一定了解，并在某种程度上以解决问题的方式体验这些可能性。它带着自我的目的审视各种可能性，因此协助自我决定应该选择哪些可能事件作为自己的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The overall needs of the personality are always taken into consideration by what I have called in the past the inner ego. Now this portion of the self is indeed self-conscious in the highest meaning of the term--aware of the subconscious portion of the personality, aware of the primary conscious framework that you call your ego, and constantly directs the overall activities. This portion is aware of the complicated workings of the nervous system and all bodily functions. It is the overseer. It knows when to allow subconscious needs and wishes their fulfillment. It knows when to put fulfillment off for a time. It is this part of the personality that is in charge of overall stability.
quotes.translation: 我过去所称的内在自我，始终会考虑人格的整体需求。这个自我部分确实是该术语最高意义上的自我意识——它觉察人格的潜意识部分，觉察你称之为自我的主要意识框架，并持续引导整体活动。这一部分知晓神经系统与所有身体机能的复杂运作。它是监督者。它知道何时允许潜意识的需求与愿望获得满足，也知道何时暂缓满足。正是人格的这一部分负责整体稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Individuals are always warned of disasters, so that the organism can prepare itself ahead of time. The day of death is known. Consciously such knowledge is not given to the ego for obvious reasons, but every organism, through its inner senses, is equipped with subconscious knowledge of personal disasters, deaths, and so forth, the personality itself deciding beforehand what it considers disastrous; and the members of the species as a whole know in advance of their wars. As telepathy operates constantly at a subconscious level, as a basis for all language and communication, so clairvoyance operates continually so that the physical organism can prepare itself to face its challenges.
quotes.translation: 个体总会收到灾难预警，以便有机体提前做好准备。死亡之日是已知的。出于显而易见的原因，这种知识不会在意识层面给予自我，但每个有机体通过其内在感官，都具备对个人灾难、死亡等事件的潜意识知识——人格本身会预先判定何为灾难；而物种成员作为一个整体，也提前知晓它们的战争。正如心电感应持续在潜意识层面运作，作为所有语言与沟通的基础，千里眼也持续运作，使物理有机体能做好准备迎接挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I dislike the use of so many terms; since the brain is observable, I am tempted to use it to cover all abilities pertaining to mind in general. This would make it easier for you. However I will resist the temptation. The mind contains the brain. Material which comes from the so-called subconscious comes from that part of the mind which knows no boundaries, either of time or space, and in a deeper sense knows no boundaries of species or planes in any manner. The simple fact is that you are using this portion of the mind as a tool. Exercising the brain exercises the mind also, but the mind has abilities of which the brain is ignorant.
quotes.translation: 我不喜欢使用这么多术语；既然大脑是可观测的，我倾向于用它来涵盖所有与心智相关的能力。这会让你们更容易理解。然而我会抵制这种诱惑。心智包含大脑。来自所谓潜意识的信息，来自心智中不受时间或空间限制的部分，在更深层意义上，它也不受物种或层面的任何限制。简单的事实是，你们正在将心智的这一部分用作工具。锻炼大脑也锻炼了心智，但心智拥有大脑所不知的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream of the drawings occurred on another level, and we will discuss in detail these various subconscious areas, though I speak of them as separated only for convenience. The dream represented a correlation of past, present and future, a knowledge that Ruburt was indeed an artist in a distant life, that he has strong abilities in that direction now; and it represents your inner realization of the type of painting he can ultimately produce in this life if he utilizes the ability. Your surprise in the dream represents your feeling that he is not using the ability. Therefore the quality of the painting in the dream amazed you.
quotes.translation: 那幅画的梦境发生在另一个层面，我们将详细讨论这些不同的潜意识区域——尽管我为了方便才将它们分开论述。这个梦境代表了过去、现在与未来的关联，一种认知：鲁柏确实在遥远的前世是位艺术家，他今生在该方向拥有强大能力；它也代表你们内在的认知：若他运用这种能力，此生最终能创作出何种画作。你在梦中的惊讶，代表你感觉他并未运用这种能力。因此梦中画作的质量令你惊叹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is possible to treat such disorders from a chemical standpoint, as is sometimes being done, but the acquired artificial chemical balance will in most cases not be maintained, because the inner self, the deep subconscious, has not been signaled that an error is being made. Ideally of course such an error should not occur. There are also reasons why the deep subconscious has allowed such difficulties to come about, and in most cases the basic reason here is a lack of understanding and communication between the various portions of the self, so that seemingly the left hand does not know what the right hand is doing.
quotes.translation: 从化学角度治疗这类失调是可能的——有时确实如此——但人为建立的化学平衡在多数情况下无法维持，因为内在自我、深层潜意识并未收到"正在犯错"的信号。理想情况下这种错误当然不应发生。深层潜意识允许这些困难出现也有其原因，多数情况下根本原因在于自我各部分之间缺乏理解与沟通，以至于左手似乎不知道右手在做什么。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The subconscious however is not so limited. If you consider the ego at the apex of the moment point, and imprisoned therefore within the realm of its own before-and-after, cause-and-effect experience, then you can imagine the subconscious reaching further outward and seizing upon many other moment points. It should be easy to see then why the focus of the ego is so sharp and brilliant. Within its limited scope there is intensity of stimuli and response. Indeed, the ego is that portion of the personality which is plunged into a specific and intense preoccupation with a given field of action or dimension.
quotes.translation: 然而潜意识并非如此受限。若你将自我视为处于当下时刻的顶点，因而被囚禁在自身"前因后果"的经验领域内，那么你可以想象潜意识向外延伸，捕捉许多其他时刻点。这样便容易理解为何自我的焦点如此锐利鲜明。在其有限范围内，刺激与反应的强度极高。确实，自我是人格中沉浸于特定行动或维度领域、并与之产生强烈专注的那一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: So the inner senses and the subconscious can do the same thing as far as inner space, and what you would call inner time, is concerned. But this is not amazing, far from it. It only seems strange because you are so familiar with your precious camouflage patterns. Time and space, dear friends, are both camouflage patterns, therefore the fact that the inner senses can conquer time and space is not, after all, so surprising. To the mind with its subconscious, and to the inner senses, there is no time and space, and therefore to them nothing is conquered. The camouflage is simply not present.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在感官与潜意识在内在空间及你们所谓的内在时间方面也能做到同样的事。但这并不神奇，远非如此。它之所以显得奇怪，只因为你们太过熟悉自己珍贵的幻相模式。亲爱的朋友们，时间与空间都是幻相模式，因此内在感官能超越时间与空间，毕竟不足为奇。对拥有潜意识的意识心及内在感官而言，根本不存在时间与空间，因此对它们来说，也谈不上什么超越。幻相根本不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Then, the strong conflict between the ego and subconscious was the result of home environment. He allowed himself no spontaneous expression at home with his mother. This denied, his normal spontaneity exploded when it was allowed opportunity, sometimes in unfortunate circumstances. In panic, the ego then tripled its defenses. He was not capable of loving Zeh or anyone, later. They both knew this and counted upon it. With Zeh, again, Ruburt denied the spontaneous self in normal daily interaction with him; with Zeh. And this denied spontaneous self exploded when and where it could.
quotes.translation: 那么，自我与潜意识之间的强烈冲突是家庭环境的结果。他在家中与母亲相处时不允许有任何自发性表达。这种压抑导致他的正常自发性一旦有机会释放就会爆发，有时在不幸的境况中。在恐慌中，自我于是将防御增强三倍。他后来无法爱泽赫或任何人。他们俩都清楚这一点，并以此为依据。与泽赫相处时，鲁柏再次在日常互动中压抑了自发性自我；与泽赫。而这种被压抑的自发性自我在可能的时间和地点爆发了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You see, dear Joseph, the subconscious and the ego, of course, are both you. For simplicity's sake I will speak of the ego and the subconscious, though they are actually one. The subconscious forms and projects the materializations of the ego as a tool to enable it to attain its goals. When these goals and talents are attributed to the ego alone they are so to speak decapitated.
quotes.translation: 你看，亲爱的约瑟，潜意识与自我当然都是你。为简便起见，我会分别谈论自我与潜意识，尽管它们实际上是一体的。潜意识形成并投射出自我的物质化，将其作为工具，使自我能够达成目标。当这些目标与才能被单独归于自我时，它们可以说是被斩首了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a radiation outward from the mental enclosure that can be considered as a nucleus. The conscious is the furthest reach, the outer radius of the primary field. Emanations from this field continue, traveling further, projecting energy that is transformed as you know into matter; and in a simplified version of your universe perceived in terms of such force fields, you would have seemingly endless atoms and molecules spinning about the nucleus, or an endless variety of such patterns that would appear on first appraisal random to an observer from another field.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是从可视为核心的心智围场向外辐射。意识是最远的延伸，是原始场域的外半径。来自这个场域的辐射继续向外传播，投射出能量，这些能量如你所知转化为物质；在你们宇宙的简化版本中，以这种力场来感知，你们会看到看似无尽的原子和分子围绕核心旋转，或无穷无尽的此类模式，从另一个场域的观察者初步看来，这些模式似乎是随机的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The topmost layer of the subconscious contains predominantly present associations, but in these are mixed and interwoven associations which have their origin elsewhere. These may be called self-unifying associations, since merely by their presence in the uppermost layers of the subconscious they provide a unifying sense of psychic continuity; of which however the ego is not aware. For one thing, there are basic similarities between an individual's personality in various existences, so that quite naturally many associations of the same nature will arise.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的最上层主要包含当下的联想，但这些联想中混合交织着源自其他地方的联想。这些可称为自我统一的联想，因为仅凭它们存在于潜意识最上层，就提供了心灵连续性的统一感；然而自我对此并无觉察。原因之一是，个体在不同存在中的人格有基本相似之处，因此相同性质的联想自然会大量出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But you have on a subconscious level all the knowledge and experience of your previous selves upon which to build. Your dreams are free from the restrictions imposed by your ego, and your dreams affect your daily life much more than you know. For situations appear in them that affect your actions, and these are elements from your own previous selves. This is a large subject; but though I can tell you some things about your future, the future is not predestined, and subconsciously you are well aware yourself of what will happen, and all human beings are.
quotes.translation: 但你在潜意识层面拥有所有前世自我的全部知识与经验作为基础。你的梦境不受自我施加的限制，而梦境对你日常生活的影响远超你的认知。因为梦境中出现的情境会影响你的行为，而这些元素来自你自身的前世自我。这是个庞大的主题；但尽管我能告诉你一些关于你未来的事，未来并非注定，而你在潜意识中早已清楚将会发生什么，所有人类都是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I want you to take a break but first I want to make one other point, and that is this: The mind contains the conscious and the subconscious, but the conscious and the subconscious are fluid. At various times the consciousness becomes unconscious, and the unconscious becomes conscious. During some periods this happens simultaneously. I will go into this in great detail.
quotes.translation: 我要你休息一下，但首先我想再提一点：心灵包含意识与潜意识，但意识与潜意识是流动的。在不同时刻，意识会变成无意识，而无意识也会变成意识。在某些时期，这两者会同时发生。我会详细探讨这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The fact is that the whole self is constantly experiencing data from all of the inner senses. The inner ego is of course aware of this. The subconscious is sometimes aware of this, and the outer ego is aware of very little. I have explained the reasons for this in past sessions. The outer ego must concentrate much of its energy toward survival in and manipulation of the outer camouflage world. This world has already been created by the inner self, and its continuing existence is determined by the constant vigilance of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 事实上，整个自体持续体验着所有内在感官传来的资料。内在自我当然知道这一点。潜意识有时也知道这一点，而外在自我则所知甚少。我在过去的课程中解释过原因。外在自我必须将大部分能量集中于外在伪装世界的生存与操控。这个世界早已被内在自体创造出来，其持续存在取决于内在自体的持续警觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is, of course, on a subconscious basis. Another example only: a very industrious individual thinks the majority of mankind are lazy and good for nothing. No one would ever think of calling him lazy or good for nothing, yet this may be precisely his own subconscious picture of himself, against which he drives himself incessantly, all in an effort to prove that his erroneous self image is, indeed, wrong. And all without realizing his basic concept of himself and without recognizing the fact that he projects it outward onto others.
quotes.translation: 这当然是在潜意识基础上进行的。再举一个例子：一个非常勤奋的人认为大多数人都懒惰且一无是处。没人会认为他懒惰或一无是处，但这可能恰恰是他自己潜意识中的自我形象，他不断驱策自己，试图证明这个错误的自我形象确实是错的。而这一切都在他未意识到自己基本自我概念的情况下发生，也未能认清他将此概念投射到他人身上的事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: When the outer ego, from the surface of its consciousness, reflects the outer world, it sees reflections of the inner ego which are the images within its own eye; and as the self creates matter subconsciously within its own eye, and as the self creates matter subconsciously and not consciously, and as the self creates matter in line with inner and not outer expectations, so then does the ego, in viewing the material universe, come face to face with the face of its own inner ego; and the outer ego cannot escape from this inner self.
quotes.translation: 当外在自我从其意识表面反映外在世界时，它看到的是内在自我的反映——这些反映正是它自己眼中的影像；由于自体是在潜意识而非意识层面创造物质，且自体是根据内在而非外在期望创造物质，因此当自我审视物质宇宙时，便与内在自我的面容正面相对；外在自我无法逃离这个内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The pendulum is an excellent manner for reaching the personal layers of the subconscious. Unless a trance state is adopted, it is much less effective as a manner of reaching those layers that lie, so to speak, beneath the personal subconscious. For practical purposes it is excellent policy to check often with the personal subconscious through use of the pendulum.
quotes.translation: 钟摆是触及个人潜意识层面的绝佳方法。除非采用出神状态，否则它在触及所谓个人潜意识之下的那些层面时效果会差得多。就实用目的而言，经常通过使用钟摆与个人潜意识核对是极佳的策略。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In Ruburt's years with Zeh, there was severe splitting of the personality. It is not a new thing with him to push aside the subconscious at all. In all cases when he does, an explosion of one kind occurs. His subconscious intuitive self, you see, is extremely vital, alive, and unusually insistent for expression, even for the subconscious which is known for this.
quotes.translation: 在鲁柏与泽赫共处的那些年里，曾出现严重的人格分裂。对他而言，推开潜意识并非新鲜事。每当他这样做时，总会发生某种形式的爆发。你看，他的潜意识直觉自体极为活跃、充满生机，并且异常坚持要表达自己——即使对以这种特质闻名的潜意识而言也是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As you know the subconscious is an extension into your field of the inner self, and with those so talented the subconscious, when correctly referred to, will lead to hard facts of the inner universe, with which every inner self is thoroughly acquainted. You at least do not swaddle and suffocate what I say in veils of pseudo religion, and for this I am thankful.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，潜意识是内在自我向你们领域的延伸，对那些有天赋的人而言，当正确运用潜意识时，它将引领你们触及内在宇宙的坚实真相——每个内在自我对此都了如指掌。至少你们没有用伪宗教的面纱包裹窒息我所说的话，对此我深表感激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （Seth told Bill he subconsciously blamed his father for his mother's condition, after Bill remarked that whenever he and his father were together for a few minutes they would end up arguing. Also, when a small child Bill had overheard a sexual encounter between his parents, in which his mother cried out. Bill took it to mean his father had hurt his mother. Later when his mother fell ill, Bill made the subconscious connection with her illness and this earlier incident, and blamed his father for his mother's illness.
quotes.translation: （当比尔提到他和父亲相处几分钟就会争吵后，赛斯指出他潜意识里将母亲的状况归咎于父亲。此外，比尔幼年时曾无意中听到父母房事，当时母亲发出喊叫。比尔认为那是父亲伤害了母亲。后来母亲生病时，比尔在潜意识中将她的疾病与早年事件联系起来，并因此责怪父亲。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner self and the deeper layers of the subconscious are relatively free however from the egos false gods, and it is for this reason that precognitions are at all possible. For these layers of the self are simply able to perceive a larger portion of action than the ego is able or willing to perceive. As a rule, the ego will not even accept the information that is derived in such a manner, for to do so would be to deny those artificial precepts of continuity upon which it feels its dominance rests.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我与潜意识较深层次相对摆脱了自我虚假神祇的束缚，正因如此，预知才成为可能。因为这些自我层次能够感知比自我愿意或能够感知的更广阔的行动范畴。通常，自我甚至拒绝接受以这种方式获得的信息，因为这样做将否定那些它赖以维持统治地位的虚假连续性戒律。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This attitude of yours places the other individual under very strong psychic pressure. You inflict them with this strong anxiety of yours. They are afraid of saying anything wrong because subconsciously they know that you will exaggerate the slightest movement of the smallest muscle. They become very cautious . Now the information that I have given you this evening should help you to begin to see through this image that until now you have projected upon the males. The information will give you several peepholes through which you may squint and see the individual on the other side of this false image. You can make further inroads through that image. The fact that you have reacted in this manner thus far does not mean that you must continue to do so. In other words you are not fated, you see, to always chase this false image or project it outward. It is not eternal, you have formed it. It has not formed you...
quotes.translation: 你这种态度会给他人施加极强的心理压力。你用强烈的焦虑感压迫他们。他们害怕说错话，因为潜意识里知道你会将最细微的肌肉颤动无限放大。他们变得极其谨慎。今晚我给你的信息应能帮助你开始看穿这个你一直投射在男性身上的幻象。这些信息将为你提供几个窥孔，透过它们你可以瞥见这个虚假幻象另一侧的个体。你可以通过那个幻象进一步深入。你至今以这种方式反应的事实，并不意味着你必须继续如此。换言之，你并非注定要永远追逐这个虚假幻象或将其向外投射。它并非永恒，是你塑造了它，而非它塑造了你……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Information received must however be sifted through the subconscious. We are managing now in such a way that our material survives without undue coloration from the subconscious. The whole process is a complicated one, but the very act of holding the sessions is of great benefit to the organism as a whole. For the vibrations and frequencies which are received in order to make our communications possible, are also most beneficial in themselves to the human and psychic system.
quotes.translation: 然而，接收到的信息必须经过潜意识的筛选。我们现在正设法使我们的材料在传递过程中不受潜意识的过度渲染。整个过程相当复杂，但举行课程这一行为本身对整体有机体大有裨益。因为为了促成我们的通讯而接收的振动与频率，其本身对人类与心灵系统也极为有益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The identity, the basic identity, of these portions of the self, are carried by what you could compare to the subconscious that you know. This is difficult, but listen: in these portions of the self it is the subconscious that carries the burden of identity, and it is the ego whose experiences are of a dreamlike, plastic nature. I use these terms to make the point clear. Do not let them confuse you. These portions of the self would seem topsy-turvy to you for this reason.
quotes.translation: 这些自我部分的本体——基本本体——由你可类比为已知潜意识的东西承载。这很难理解，但请听：在这些自我部分中，是潜意识承载着本体的重担，而自我的经验则具有梦幻般可塑的性质。我使用这些术语是为了阐明要点，不要让它们混淆你。这些自我部分对你而言会显得颠倒错乱，正因如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I think that before tonight, subconsciously Ruburt knew the true meaning of the dream. Part of the subconscious fantasy in the dream was of course valid, representing a watered-down version of the actual communication. For example, Miss Callahan's black apparel. She had been preparing herself since she learned of the operations' necessity for her own departure. Yet consciously of course, she was ignorant of her own inner decision, and this is always absolutely necessary.
quotes.translation: 我认为在今晚之前，鲁柏潜意识里已知晓这梦的真实含义。梦中部分潜意识幻想当然有效，代表了实际沟通的淡化版本。例如卡拉汉小姐的黑色服饰。自从得知手术的必要性后，她一直在为自己离世做准备。然而在意识层面，她自然对自己内在的决定一无所知，而这始终是绝对必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We must use analogies. It can be thought of as the most exterior projection of the inner ego. When you find yourself, so to speak, watching what you think of as the ego, then you are in contact with this portion of the self. It is aware of both conscious and subconscious motivations and realities, and it is also aware of projections into other fields of actuality. I have hinted before of these matters, for when I say that you will use this other portion of the self to examine waking consciousness and probe beneath it, I already presuppose a you that uses this self. In other words, you are already magnifying the limitations of the self and extending them.
quotes.translation: 我们必须使用类比。它可以被视为内在自我的最外层投射。当你发现自己，可以说，在观察你所认为的自我时，你便与自我的这一部分取得了联系。它既知晓意识与潜意识的动机和实相，也知晓投射到其他实相领域的情况。我之前曾暗示过这些事，因为当我说你将使用自我的这一部分来检视清醒意识并深入其下时，我已经预设了一个使用这个自我的"你"。换言之，你已经在放大自我的局限并扩展它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, Ruburts subconscious simply got in our way at last evening's session. Now and then it is to be expected, but I regret the particular circumstances deeply. He was subconsciously but never consciously aware that next month marked the time of his grandfather's death, and subconsciously he knew his grandfathers age at death.
quotes.translation: 昨晚的课程中，鲁柏的潜意识确实妨碍了我们。这种情况偶尔会发生，但我对具体情形深感遗憾。他潜意识里——但从未有意识地——知道下个月是他祖父去世的月份，并且潜意识里知晓祖父去世时的年龄。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a doorway into other portions of the self and it must be entered, and free access must exist to it. When it is free in this manner, then there is no need to block messages or distort material. The subconscious does this out of fear or resentment. I could have said more concerning his condition in the past.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是通往自我其他部分的门户，必须进入其中，且必须存在自由进出的通道。当它以这种方式自由运作时，便无需阻挡信息或扭曲材料。潜意识出于恐惧或怨恨才会这样做。关于他过去的情况，我本可以说得更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is thinned out further by my own subconscious, because my inner and outer egos are not yet a complete unity, although I am, or my outer ego is, in direct contact with my inner ego on some occasions. Nevertheless my subconscious is not yet dispensed with but is still retained somewhat in the order of your archaic appendix.
quotes.translation: 它又被我自己的潜意识进一步稀释，因为我的内在自我与外在自我尚未完全合一，尽管在某些场合我——或者说我的外在自我——与内在自我有直接接触。然而我的潜意识尚未被摒弃，仍像你们古老的阑尾那样有所保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream objects and activities will then be interpreted at other subconscious areas, so that to understand a dream properly we should first discover at which subconscious area it originates. Individuals can be enabled to find this point of origin for themselves, after an attempt is made to recall any given dream or dreams.
quotes.translation: 梦境中的物体与活动随后会在其他潜意识区域被解读，因此要正确理解一个梦，我们首先应发现它源自哪个潜意识区域。在尝试回忆任何特定梦境后，个体可以自行找到这个起源点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （I would like to remind the reader here that when Seth uses the term "area, " he means what up until recently he has called a "level" of the subconscious. Actually, he states, the subconscious is not neatly divided into levels, but is marvelously intertwined, like a labyrinth. Seth has mentioned this at various times.
quotes.translation: （在此我想提醒读者，当赛斯使用"区域"一词时，他指的是此前所称的潜意识"层面"。实际上，他说明潜意识并非整齐划分为不同层面，而是如迷宫般奇妙交织。赛斯曾多次提及这点。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: And yet a portion of you knows the answer, and a portion of you knows who you are, and the memories of your previous lives are not in your genes or in your chromosomes, but in the psychic reality that forms the genes and the chromosomes. For the identity is a different identity than the name that you bear. The physical mechanism has chromosomes indeed, but the physical chromosomes have a psychic counterpart, and the psychic counterpart is the original; and within you is the codified information containing all your past lives and all your knowledge, and it is hidden so deep within you that the subconscious as you know it does not realize the truth, for the subconscious as you know it is, indeed, a very shallow affair containing only those hidden memories from this life.
quotes.translation: 然而你的一部分知道答案，你的一部分知道你是谁，你前世的记忆不在基因或染色体中，而在形成基因与染色体的心灵实相里。因为身份不同于你所背负的名字。物质机制确实拥有染色体，但物质染色体有其心灵对应物，而心灵对应物才是本源；在你之内存有编码信息，包含你所有前世与全部知识，它深藏于你之内，以至于你所认知的潜意识并未觉察真相——因为你所认知的潜意识，确实只是浅层之物，仅包含此生隐藏的记忆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All of our material should be of great practical value. Remember that the subconscious is at the outer end of the inner senses, and the inner senses create physical constructions. Once you learn how to handle and communicate with your subconscious, then you will be able to create more constructive constructions--
quotes.translation: 我们所有的资料都应具有极大的实用价值。请记住潜意识位于内在感官的外端，而内在感官创造物质建构。一旦你学会如何驾驭并与潜意识沟通，你就能创造更具建设性的建构——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （It might be worth noting here that many sessions ago Seth stated he was substituting the word "area" for "level, " when a reference to the subconscious was made. The reason being that the subconscious is not divided into neat levels, but is made up of many interconnecting and complicated corridors, rooms, etc.
quotes.translation: （此处值得注意：许多节之前赛斯曾说明，在提及潜意识时他将用"区域"一词取代"层面"。原因在于潜意识并非划分为整齐的层面，而是由许多相互连接的复杂走廊、房间等构成。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Luckily, and this applies to both of you, any unhealthy aspects of strong subconscious formation find access through your own creative works. The closed and dangerous subconscious is that one which is closed both to inner depths of inspiration arising from the inner self, and also to outer doors of expression.
quotes.translation: 幸运的是，这对你们两人都适用——任何强烈潜意识形成中的不健康面向，都会通过你们自身的创作作品找到出口。封闭而危险的潜意识，是那种既对内封闭来自内在自性的灵感深层，又对外封闭表达之门的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are a few points that I would like to make of a general nature. Ruburt has been reading Jung, though not consistently. The libido does not originate in the individual subconscious of the present personality. It originates instead in the energy of the entity and inner self, and is directed by means of the inner senses, outward so to speak, through the deeper layers of the individual subconscious mind, then through the outer or personal layers.
quotes.translation: 我想提出几个普遍性的要点。鲁柏一直在阅读荣格，虽然并非持续不断。力比多并非源自当前人格的个体潜意识。它反而源自存有与内在自性的能量，并通过内在感官向外导向——可以说是经由个体潜意识的深层，再通过外在或个人层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The dream data was correct in its bare essentials. Your friend, Miss Callahan, said that she was going away, and that she did not really want to go away. The picture in the dream was partly subconscious guesswork with a touch of clairvoyance. Any such inner communications are basically the same in that they are picked up by the inner senses, whether or not the information is received as a telepathic communication or in terms of clairvoyance. Where a place for example is seen, rather than words being heard, is determined by the receiver of the message.
quotes.translation: 梦境数据在其基本要点上是正确的。你的朋友卡拉汉小姐说她将要离开，而她其实并不真的想走。梦中的画面部分是潜意识的猜测，带有一丝千里眼的能力。任何这类内在沟通本质上都是相同的，因为它们都是由内在感官接收的，无论信息是以心电感应还是千里眼的方式被接收。例如，当看到某个地点而非听到话语时，这取决于信息的接收者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is not a cellar piled high with explosives, rocking at the foundations of the ego. The subconscious contains a collection of diverse, varied and vital personalities who represent the losers when the time arrived to send one of them to the topmost level, or to the surface of the self.
quotes.translation: 潜意识并非一个堆满炸药、摇摇欲坠于自我根基的地窖。潜意识包含着一群多样、多变且充满活力的人格，它们是在时机到来时，当其中一个被派往最高层或自我表面时的失败者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am not Ruburt's subconscious, though I speak through it. It is the atmosphere through which I can come to you, as the air is the atmosphere through which a bird flies, but the bird is something different from the air. A certain reassembly of myself is necessary when I enter your plane, and this reassembly is done partially by myself, and partially by the combined subconscious efforts of you, Joseph, and Ruburt. Will this satisfy you now?
quotes.translation: 我并非鲁柏的潜意识，尽管我通过它说话。它是我能来到你们面前的大气层，如同空气是鸟儿飞翔的大气层，但鸟儿与空气截然不同。当我进入你们的层面时，我必须对自己进行某种重组，这种重组部分由我自己完成，部分由你们——约瑟和鲁柏——联合的潜意识努力完成。这样能让你满意吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In his case, the two go together and serve each other. The poetic creation, itself art, also serves to free the personal subconscious and to transform personal material into art. The subconscious is thus uncluttered because of the poetic expression, and this helps to make the psychic work possible.
quotes.translation: 就他而言，两者相辅相成。诗意的创作本身即是艺术，同时也服务于释放个人潜意识，并将个人素材转化为艺术。因此，由于诗意的表达，潜意识得以清理，这有助于使灵性工作成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This subconscious is another link or connective between the two fields of which we have spoken, and again, as it enters your plane it takes on the characteristics of your plane. That is why you find personal memories at the outermost portion, but the subconscious also reaches to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 这个潜意识是我们之前谈到的两个领域之间的另一个链接或连接点，同样，当它进入你们的层面时，它会带上你们层面的特征。这就是为什么你们在最外层发现个人记忆，但潜意识也延伸至存有本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It floundered like a wet rag in a foul wind. This all ties in with the personality fragments which we discussed earlier. In like manner the personality is divided, one part conscious of the primary self and another disconnected and waiting formation into something new. On a subconscious basis this is exactly how you both created the images at York Beach, the difference being that the personality split occurred on the subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 它像一块湿抹布在恶风中挣扎。这与我们之前讨论的人格片段完全相关。同样地，人格被分裂，一部分意识到主要自我，另一部分则断开连接，等待形成新的东西。在潜意识基础上，这正是你们俩在约克海滩创造那些影像的方式，区别在于人格分裂发生在潜意识层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Such a rejection is definitely an impeding action. It is this rejection on the ego's part that is the basis for so-called neurosis in many cases. The fault is not that a particular action has been buried by the subconscious. The fault is that the ego has refused to accept the action from the subconscious, therefore impeding the natural flow of energy. Naturally, all actions are not recognized by the ego, nor is it necessary in any case.
quotes.translation: 这种拒绝无疑是一种阻碍行为。正是自我层面的这种拒绝，在许多情况下构成了所谓神经症的基础。问题不在于某个特定行为被潜意识埋藏，而在于自我拒绝接受来自潜意识的这个行为，从而阻碍了能量的自然流动。当然，并非所有行为都会被自我识别，而且任何情况下也并非必要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The other sons are present. On the childlike area of the subconscious you believe your mother mainly responsible for family difficulties. However her defense, which you recognize basically as insincere but superficially correct in this particular instance, was that your father hit her in the chest. You identified with your father, and could not permit, in this dream at any rate, an identification of this kind, since at this childish level you did not blame him and would have wished as a child, to have the power to do the same thing.
quotes.translation: 其他儿子也在场。在潜意识的孩童层面，你相信母亲是家庭困难的主要责任人。然而，她的辩解——你基本上认为不真诚，但在这一特定事例中表面正确——是你父亲打了她的胸部。你认同了父亲，并且至少在梦中无法允许这种认同，因为在这个孩童层面，你并不责怪他，而且作为孩子，你曾希望拥有做同样事情的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This may not seem so to you, but because subconsciously and basically, though not consciously, Ruburt trusts both his own intuition and the validity of our sessions. He will not allow the rambunctious portion of his personality to upset our schedule, but because he trusts all this subconsciously, he will not be as disturbed as you are if a session is missed.
quotes.translation: 这对你来说可能并非如此，但由于潜意识里和根本上——尽管不是有意识地——鲁柏信任自己的直觉以及我们课程的有效性。他不会允许自己人格中顽皮的部分打乱我们的日程，但因为他潜意识里信任这一切，所以如果错过一次课程，他不会像你那样感到不安。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, this constant creation of the physical universe is not maintained through some localized subconscious that exists somewhere between two ears, behind the forehead. The individual subconscious, as I have explained, is the result of a psychic pooling of resources and abilities. It is a gestalt, maintained and formed by the cooperating, generalized consciousness of each atom and molecule of which the physical body is composed.
quotes.translation: 现在，物质宇宙的这种持续创造并非通过存在于两耳之间、前额之后的某个局部潜意识来维持。正如我所解释的，个体潜意识是心灵资源和能力汇集的结果。它是一个完形，由组成物质身体的每个原子和分子合作、泛化的意识所维持和形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, no psychological structure is easy to describe in words. Simply to explain the nature of personality as it is generally known, all kinds of terms are used: id, subconscious, ego, superego; all of these to differentiate the interweaving actions that make up the physical personality. The dreaming self is just as complicated. So you can say that certain portions of it deal with physical reality, physical manipulation, and plans; some with deeper levels of creativity and achievement that insure physical survival; some with communication, with even more extensive elements of the personality now generally unknown; some with the continuing experience and existence of what you may call the soul or overall individual entity, the true multidimensional self.
quotes.translation: 现在，没有哪种心理结构容易用言语描述。仅仅为了解释通常所知的人格本质，就使用了各种术语：本我、潜意识、自我、超我；所有这些都是为了区分构成物质人格的交织行为。做梦的自我同样复杂。因此你可以说，它的某些部分处理物质实相、物质操控和计划；某些部分处理更深层次的创造力和成就，以确保物质生存；某些部分处理沟通，以及现在通常不为人知的人格中更广泛的元素；某些部分处理你所谓的灵魂或整体个体存有——真正的多维自我——的持续体验和存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Information like this is sifted through many layers of subconscious conception, and is subsequently colored. People believing in your organized religions color it in a manner that is highly disadvantageous, and that unfortunately adds to existing superstitions. Ruburt's mind, believe it or not, is much like my own -- though, if you'll forgive me, in a very limited fashion. Therefore the distortions are much less distortive, much less harmful, and more easily discovered and cleared ... Others less perfectionist than myself are content with more distortion. I am not. Ruburt's Idea Construction9 was rather amazing. The inner senses provided him with much, but nevertheless the ideas contained in it represented an achievement of the conscious mind. I was drawn by this to realize that he was ready for me.
quotes.translation: 这类信息会经过潜意识概念的许多层次筛选，随后被着色。信仰你们有组织宗教的人会以一种极为不利的方式着色它，这不幸地加剧了现有的迷信。信不信由你，鲁柏的心智与我的非常相似——尽管，请原谅我这么说，以一种非常有限的方式。因此扭曲的程度要小得多，危害也小得多，更容易被发现和清除……其他不如我完美主义的人满足于更多的扭曲。我不满足。鲁柏的《意念建构》相当惊人。内在感官为他提供了许多，但无论如何，其中包含的理念代表了意识心智的一项成就。我被此吸引，意识到他已经准备好接受我了。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones.
