This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: This involves on his part not a conscious, but a subconscious change of habit. The new habit he has acquired very well. The psychic explosions that have been fairly regular with him in the past, have been minimized to some considerable degree since our sessions began. No one is endeavoring to tamper with his personality, however, and it is his natural reaction to turn aggression, when it arises, outward in some manner, while he is almost superstitiously careful that it not be directed at another individual. This is with him a fairly healthy reaction, and less disruptive than he thinks. You have been distrustful to some degree concerning Ruburt's fidelity to the sessions, precisely because the sessions have become important to you. Ruburt at this time would not dispense with the sessions, although it is true that he sometimes consciously resents the discipline involved in their regularity.
quotes.translation: 这涉及他并非有意识、而是潜意识地改变习惯。他新养成的习惯相当不错。过去在他身上相当规律出现的精神爆发，自从我们的课程开始以来，已大幅减少到相当程度。然而，没有人试图干预他的人格，当他产生攻击性时，他自然反应是以某种方式向外发泄，同时他几乎迷信般地小心不让它指向他人。对他来说，这是相当健康的反应，破坏性比他想象的要小。你对鲁柏忠于课程的程度一直有些怀疑，正是因为课程对你变得重要。鲁柏此刻不会放弃课程，尽管他有时确实有意识地反感课程规律性所涉及的纪律。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He tries at times to use a schedule, a disciplined schedule as a fence against the subconscious, and becomes panic-stricken imagining himself without it. This is not to say that a schedule in itself is not good, it is to say that he can and sometimes does misuse one. In these instances the time is actually used to clamp down on the inner self, rather than to release it. These outings will be of benefit here, not only because they allow for spontaneous interaction, but because they serve to break the schedules in ways that do not disturb working hours. They provide a beginning for a habit of release. Here the ego is helping us now, for it is sticking to these plans, and the plans are those the ego itself enjoys, and can accept. He has been afraid to simply sit and think, for fear of letting the spontaneous self show without the symbolized writing mechanism.
quotes.translation: 他有时试图用时间表、有纪律的时间表作为对抗潜意识的屏障，并想象没有它时陷入恐慌。这并不是说时间表本身不好，而是说他可以、有时也确实会误用它。在这些情况下，时间实际上被用来压制内在自我，而非释放它。这些外出活动将对此有益，不仅因为它们允许自发的互动，还因为它们以不干扰工作时间的方式打破时间表。它们为释放的习惯提供了开端。此时自我正在帮助我们，因为它坚持这些计划，而这些计划是自我本身享受并能接受的。他害怕只是静坐思考，因为担心让自发自我在没有象征性写作机制的情况下显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Every thought in one way or another is constructed by you in physical terms. You cannot escape the result of one thought. Every thought is an actuality. It affects every action and it forms your physical environment. As you sit listening to my voice, you are all subconsciously forming the physical environment of your classroom. You are forming the physical chairs. You are forming the blackboard. You are all forming reality, as you know it. Then with your physical senses, you are perceiving that which you have already so created. If you do not like what you see, then who is to blame? For these are your own constructions , formed in faithful replica to your own thoughts. We do not have the time to explain now how this is done, but in the material we have explained it. Certain telepathic connections exist which are what we term root assumptions, of which you are all telepathically aware. Using these you form a physical environment that is cohesive enough so that you can all agree with what you see and feel and smell and touch.
quotes.translation: 每一个念头都以某种方式由你用物质形式构建。你无法逃避任何一个念头的后果。每一个念头都是实相。它影响每一个行动，并形成你的物质环境。当你坐着听我说话时，你们都在潜意识地形成教室的物质环境。你们在形成物质椅子。你们在形成黑板。你们都在形成你们所知的实相。然后，用你们的物质感官，你们感知你们已经创造的东西。如果你不喜欢你所看到的，那该怪谁？因为这些是你们自己的构建，忠实地复制了你们自己的念头。我们现在没有时间解释这是如何做到的，但在资料中我们已经解释过了。存在某些我们称之为根本假设的通灵联系，你们所有人都通灵地意识到它们。利用这些，你们形成一个足够连贯的物质环境，以便你们都能对所看、所感、所嗅、所触达成一致。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (Needless to say, when Carl or whoever was measuring pressure on the scale, the other three took pains to see that they were not subconsciously exerting a heavy pressure on the other side of the table, thus forcing a stronger response across the tabletop to get the legs back on the floor. Such checking was easy to do; nevertheless conscious deliberate checks were constantly being made to make certain opposing pressures were not unwittingly being exerted. Most of the time our hands touched the table so lightly that it could move quite freely beneath them, seemingly of its own volition. This steady checking has the added advantage that it serves as a protection against any possible hallucination [although this would have to be a mass effect, and highly unlikely]; the checking in a deliberate manner was a good method to keep one's feet on the floor, so to speak, even if the table was acting contrary to gravity.
quotes.translation: （不用说，当卡尔或任何人测量秤上的压力时，其他三人费尽心思确保他们没有潜意识地在桌子另一侧施加沉重压力，从而迫使桌面产生更强反应以使桌腿回到地面。这种检查很容易做到；然而，有意识的刻意检查不断进行，以确保没有无意中施加相反压力。大多数时候，我们的手轻触桌子，以至于它可以在手下相当自由地移动，仿佛出于自身意志。这种稳定的检查还有一个额外好处，即作为防止任何可能幻觉的保护措施[尽管这必须是集体效应，且极不可能]；以刻意方式进行检查是保持脚踏实地的好方法，即使桌子行为违反重力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In past he also died by water. Subconsciously you knew this. There was a girl in that past life. He also knew her in this life. There was an afternoon in this life between 4 and 5 years old, and this child visited with her parents. She also will die young or has already died but will not reach adulthood. At the time curly brown hair. She was his wife in the past life, when he died at 32. This involved a shipwreck. No, the manner of death is no coincidence, it is chosen. Some of the boy's friends and acquaintances and neighbors died in this same manner. They were the crew in a ship that sank off coast of Spain. They were not frightened of water. They trusted water. If it led on occasion to death, it also led to adventure. Death by water in those days was an honor, death by land a disgrace. They considered water "Mother of All Earth". He did. He would not want to die by land.
quotes.translation: 过去他也死于水。你潜意识中知道这一点。在那个前世中有一个女孩。他在这一生也认识她。这一生中有一个下午，在他4到5岁之间，这个孩子随父母来访。她也会早逝或已经去世，但不会活到成年。当时她有一头卷曲的棕色头发。她是他前世的妻子，当时他32岁去世。这涉及一次海难。不，死亡方式并非巧合，而是被选择的。这个男孩的一些朋友、熟人和邻居也以同样方式死亡。他们是沉没在西班牙海岸附近一艘船上的船员。他们不害怕水。他们信任水。如果水有时导致死亡，它也带来冒险。在那些日子里，死于水是荣誉，死于陆地是耻辱。他们认为水是"万物之母"。他就是这样想的。他不愿死于陆地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Usually we keep the records of her ESP class in a separate set of three ring binders, but Jane wanted to insert this one as part of Session 393 in our "regular" sessions: She wanted to show Seth discussing a subject that was Emotionally very important to a class member--Audrey Shepherd--whose adopted son had died by drowning last summer.)

quotes.text: For one thing, individuals who finally visit such offices are oftentimes already emotionally upset. Oftentimes also those in attendance, the doctors or other healers are themselves tired, prone to the patient's emotional fears, and automatically in self-defense respond by giving voice to the patient's subconscious dread, picking it up telepathically but feeling it is directed at themselves, on a subconscious level of course.
quotes.translation: 首先，最终拜访这类办公室的人往往已经情绪不安。同样，在场的医生或其他治疗者自己也常常疲惫，容易受到患者情绪恐惧的影响，并自动出于自卫，通过说出患者潜意识中的恐惧来回应，在潜意识层面上通灵地捕捉到它，却感觉它指向自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: More energy indeed can be held in the personal subconscious in such a manner than can be used in studying other areas of the inner self, for it is in the personal subconscious that energy blockage most frequently occurs. This does not mean that you should cease in that direction. A smooth and disciplined schedule will serve you well here. I would indeed suggest however that this half-hour schedule not include your weekends.
quotes.translation: 个人潜意识确实能以这种方式容纳更多能量，甚至超过用于研究内在自我其他领域所需的能量，因为能量阻塞最常发生在个人潜意识中。这并不意味着你应该停止这个方向的研究。平稳而有规律的作息安排对你大有裨益。不过我确实建议，这个半小时的作息安排不要包含周末。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As the intense experience of great joy or pain often blots out everything else, so would the direct experience of reality blot out, only completely, the outer ego who experienced it directly. At your level the sieve of the subconscious is a necessity and that is one of the main reasons why Ruburt dissociates during our sessions, even though his experience of inner reality is received second handed, so to speak, through me.
quotes.translation: 正如巨大喜悦或痛苦的强烈体验常会抹去其他一切，对实相的直接体验也会抹去——而且是彻底抹去——直接体验它的外在自我。在你们的层面上，潜意识的筛子是必要的，这也是鲁柏在我们的课程中会解离的主要原因之一，即便他对内在实相的体验可以说是通过我间接获得的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Benefits received by personalities who are in deep trance are not nearly as long-lasting as they are in my method. It is true that in the trance state the subconscious learns. However, the subconscious knowledge eventually must be transferred to the personality-consciousness. In other methods than my own this transference takes place at a later time, usually on a midplane after the death of the personality on your plane.
quotes.translation: 处于深度出神状态的人格所获得的益处，远不如用我的方法所获得的持久。诚然，在出神状态中潜意识确实在学习。然而，潜意识的知识最终必须转移到人格意识中。在我方法之外的其他方法中，这种转移发生在较晚的时期，通常是在你们层面的人格死亡后的中界层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: （In the 54th session Seth went into considerable detail in explaining the construction of entities. He could not give us this information earlier, he said, because we would have leaped to the conclusion that he was Ruburt's [Janes] subconscious mind; this is not so. As everything else does, entities constantly change. To quote Seth: "Ruburt is not myself now, in his present life; he is nevertheless an extension and materialization of the Seth that I was at one time... He grew, evolved and expanded in terms of a particular, personal set of value fulfillments... He is now an actual gestalt, a personality that was one of the probable personalities into which Seth could grow. I represent another, I am another. "
quotes.translation: （在第五十四节课中，赛斯详细解释了存有的构造。他说他之前无法告诉我们这些信息，因为我们会贸然断定他就是鲁柏[珍]的潜意识；事实并非如此。如同其他一切事物，存有也在不断变化。引用赛斯的话："鲁柏在他今生并非现在的我；然而他是我曾经是那个赛斯的一个延伸和物质化……他在特定个人价值完成方面成长、进化并扩展……他现在是一个实际完形，一个曾属于赛斯可能发展成的可能人格之一。我代表另一个，我是另一个。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The thyroid gland operates strongly in regard to expectations, hormonal balances being maintained at rather normal levels normally. It is sensitive however to panic and fear, and, affecting other glands working with inner subconscious mechanisms, it becomes overly stimulated and causes subconscious mechanisms to actually create, in matter, the object of the fears which have themselves caused the initial over action.
quotes.translation: 甲状腺在期望方面作用强烈，通常荷尔蒙平衡维持在相当正常的水平。然而它对恐慌和恐惧很敏感，并会与其他与内在潜意识机制协同工作的腺体相互作用，变得过度刺激，导致潜意识机制实际上在物质中创造出那些最初引起过度反应的恐惧对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: The ego is not as a rule aware of this broader time experience. The subconscious however is so aware, and the associative processes of the mind can, and do, react to a future event, while the ego is closed off to it. Therefore it is possible for Frederick, this year, to become ill at the smell of a particular perfume because subconsciously he knows that in 1980 his mother will be wearing that perfume when she dies.
quotes.translation: 自我通常意识不到这种更广泛的时间体验。然而潜意识却意识到了，心灵的联想过程能够——也确实会——对未来事件做出反应，而自我对此是封闭的。因此，弗雷德里克今年有可能因为闻到某种特定香水而生病，因为他在潜意识中知道，1980年他母亲去世时会穿着那种香水。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Subconsciously he feels that you are saying shut up, and this angers, humiliates and bewilders him. He struggles against such disclosures to begin with. Instead you see methods can be used to direct the emotions in other channels. You can get him to talk about other matters by asking for example about what he has written for the day. The subject chosen by you must be one in which he is immensely interested however. He will understand that you are merely trying to redirect him, and will not feel that you are restraining his freedom to say what he wants to say. He will understand what you are doing, but that is all right. He knows the emotional situation with your mother, and will not object.
quotes.translation: 他潜意识里觉得你在说"闭嘴"，这让他愤怒、羞辱又困惑。起初他会抗拒这类揭露。相反，你可以用方法将情绪导向其他渠道。例如询问他当天写了什么，引导他谈论其他话题。但你选择的话题必须是他极感兴趣的。他会明白你只是试图转移方向，不会觉得你在限制他说话的自由。他明白你的用意，但这没关系。他知道你与母亲之间的情绪状况，不会反对。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Creation, therefore, constantly continues, and not always along the lines of old patterns, but by means of completely different patterns. And another small but interesting point: On your own plane, there is a subconscious storehouse of knowledge, whereby it is known in a condensed fashion, by all molecules and atoms, exactly which variant or evolutionary attempts have been made, with what results--and always with an eye out, so to speak, for circumstances that might fit forms once adopted with failure, or to attempt other forms for which present circumstances may not be right. I have said that, first of all, molecules and atoms and even smaller particles, have a condensed consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此创造持续不断进行，并非总是遵循旧有模式，而是通过全新的模式。另一个小而有趣的观点：在你们自己的层面上，存在一个潜意识的知识库，所有分子和原子都以浓缩的方式知晓，究竟哪些变异或进化尝试已被进行，结果如何——而且可以说，始终在留意那些可能适合曾经失败的形式的环境，或尝试当前环境可能不适合的其他形式。我曾说过，首先，分子和原子，甚至更小的粒子，都具有浓缩的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I risk repeating myself, but I want these steps to be plain. This vital data is sent to the mind by the inner senses. Any material that is important for the body's contact with outer camouflage patterns is given to the brain. The subconscious, so-called, is a connective between mind and brain, between the inner senses and the outer senses. It is actually partly on your plane and partly on other planes. Portions of it do deal with camouflage patterns, with the personal past of the present personality, with racial camouflage memories; and the greater portion belongs to the inner world, and as data comes into it from the inner world, so can it reach far into the inner world itself.
quotes.translation: 我冒着重复的风险，但我希望这些步骤清晰明了。这些关键数据通过内在感官传递给心智。任何对肉体与外在伪装模式接触重要的资料都传递给大脑。所谓的潜意识是心智与大脑之间、内在感官与外在感官之间的连接体。它实际上部分存在于你们的层面，部分存在于其他层面。它的一部分确实处理伪装模式、当前人格的个人过去、种族伪装记忆；而更大部分属于内在世界，当数据从内在世界进入它时，它也能深入内在世界本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Scientists have glimpsed the complications of the human body. They have scarcely glimpsed the complicated realities of the mind. If it were understood that the areas of the subconscious are indeed populated by many and various sub personalities, then they would not wonder that the human body is sometimes so besieged with ailments, or that the dominant personality so often appears in contradictory terms.
quotes.translation: 科学家们已窥见人类身体的复杂性。他们几乎未曾瞥见心智的复杂实相。如果能理解潜意识领域确实居住着许多不同的次人格，那么他们就不会奇怪人类身体有时为何如此饱受疾病困扰，或主导人格为何常常以矛盾的方式呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He is stubborn, as we have discovered, you and I, and this stubbornness will also work for him. There is no reason why he should not succeed, and he will succeed in letting go the smoking habit. Do not fret because of this brief session, Joseph. It is well worth the while. This evening however Ruburt's subconscious is in a rather chaotic state, and I shall not attempt now to carry on a regular session.
quotes.translation: 正如你我所发现的，他很固执，这种固执也会对他有利。他没有理由不成功，而且他一定会成功戒除吸烟习惯。约瑟，不要为这次简短的课而烦恼。这完全值得。不过今晚鲁柏的潜意识处于相当混乱的状态，我现在不打算进行常规课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: What you call racial memory exists as inner emotional memory experience. The line between inner and outer does not exist in actuality any more than a line exists between consciousness and unconsciousness. What you call the subconscious is merely an ill-defined meeting place of inner and outer experience; and I am forced to use these terms inner and outer only because of your misconception of duality.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的种族记忆，作为内在情感记忆经验而存在。内在与外在之间的界限实际上并不存在，正如意识与无意识之间不存在界限一样。你们所谓的潜意识，不过是内在与外在经验之间一个定义模糊的交汇点；我被迫使用内在与外在这些术语，仅仅是因为你们对二元性的误解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All such projections have an electromagnetic and chemical reality that has its origin within the field of the given personality. This projection of energy is one of the main characteristics of your kind. Dreams and dream images are then projected by the individual in sleep, and also in the waking state, although on a subconscious basis. So are thoughts constantly sent outward, and other projections which we have not yet discussed. Therefore as the individual sends out these projections, so does he receive the projections of others. As you know, telepathy operates constantly beneath the dictates of the ego, and so is your intellectual climate formed.
quotes.translation: 所有这些投射都具有电磁与化学实相，其根源在于特定人格的场域内。这种能量投射是你们这类存在的主要特征之一。梦境与梦意象由个体在睡眠中投射，在清醒状态下亦如此——尽管是在潜意识基础上。思想同样不断向外发送，还有我们尚未讨论的其他投射。因此，当个体发出这些投射时，也接收着他人的投射。如你所知，心灵感应持续运作于自我指令之下，由此形成了你们的智识气候。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The outer ego is very seldom aware of the inner ego, and the subconscious is indeed a vast area dividing them. We are discussing now the outer ego in relation to the inner ego, and describing a situation in terms of relationships. Other relationships would show both the outer and inner egos in a different light. Relationships are also the result of tensions, and each action sets up a new tension.
quotes.translation: 外在自我极少觉察内在自我，而潜意识确实是分隔两者的广阔领域。我们现在讨论的是外在自我与内在自我的关系，并以关系术语描述某种情境。其他关系则会从不同角度展现内外自我。关系也是张力的结果，每个行动都会建立新的张力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, and in fact all portions of the self with the exception of the ego, are capable of assimilating a wider area, so to speak, of action. Therefore to these other portions of the self, time has a much different essence than it has for the ego. The ego is indeed many things. It can be defined in relationship to many other aspects of reality. In relationship to action, and moment points, the ego is indeed that portion of the self which stands at the apex of the moment point, and is limited by the moment point. The ego is in this context the portion of the self which is utterly focused upon, and imprisoned by, the moment point.
quotes.translation: 潜意识——事实上除自我外的所有自我部分——都能吸收更广阔的行动领域。因此对这些自我部分而言，时间具有与自我截然不同的本质。自我确实具有多重面向。它可依据实相的其他诸多方面来定义。就行动与瞬间点而言，自我正是立于瞬间点顶端的自我部分，受限于瞬间点。在此语境下，自我是完全聚焦于、并被囚禁于瞬间点的自我部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The emotions, while connected to the ego strongly, nevertheless also belong to what we have been pleased to call the subconscious. But because they are so intertwined with the inner life they are also common to both the ego and the so-called subconscious.
quotes.translation: 情绪虽与自我紧密相连，却同样属于我们乐于称之为潜意识的范畴。但由于情绪与内在生命如此交织，它们也是自我与所谓潜意识共有的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The bookcases should stay as they are, my dear Ruburt. Enough is enough, and you have optimum benefit from them. You should feel much better. The bedroom arrangement is fine, and if my dear Joseph will not blame Ruburts subconscious I would make one further suggestion that is not, however, to involve any more complicated arrangements on Ruburt's part: simply, when it is possible, the addition of either a comfortable chair or a small desk and chair, quite simple, to your bedroom arrangement, as a more or less permanent fixture for a small private place, accessible when he wants it, for our so sensitive and sometimes pigheaded Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 书架应保持原样，我亲爱的鲁柏。适可而止，你已从中获得最佳效益。你会感觉好得多。卧室布置很好，若我亲爱的约瑟不归咎于鲁柏的潜意识，我愿再提一个建议——不过这不会涉及鲁柏方面更复杂的安排：简单来说，在可能时，为你的卧室添置一把舒适扶手椅或一套小书桌椅，作为他随时可用的私密小空间固定摆设，为我们这位敏感又时而固执的鲁柏所用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: So in the instance of direct experience without the use of the external senses, the same sort of procedure is beneficial. Last night Ruburt was drowsy but not asleep. He desired to know the time because he had preparations to make before going out. Unknowingly he requested the desired information, that is the time, from his own subconscious, and free from impediments the subconscious delivered.
quotes.translation: 因此，在不借助外在感官的直接体验案例中，同样的程序是有益的。昨晚鲁柏昏昏欲睡却未入眠。他想知道时间，因为外出前需做准备。他无意识地向自己的潜意识请求所需信息——即时间——而潜意识毫无阻碍地传递了答案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Subconsciously he exaggerates the dangers that will beset him as a result of the publication, and the actual facts will be a relief. He is in many ways extremely individualistic. He fights for what he believes in, but he also has strong docile tendencies, which are usually rather effectively controlled. These rise up, you see however, in direct proportion to the degree of his independent accomplishments, so that he then fears the accumulated results, social results, of what he has done. It is therefore fairly natural that when this accomplishment is being exteriorized he would become frightened of the opinion of his brethren.
quotes.translation: 潜意识里，他夸大了出版后会面临的危险，而实际情况反而会让他松一口气。他在许多方面都极其个人主义。他为自己所信仰的而战，但也有强烈的顺从倾向，这些倾向通常被相当有效地控制着。然而，你看，这些倾向会随着他独立成就的程度而成正比地浮现，以至于他随后会害怕自己所做之事的累积结果、社会结果。因此，当这项成就被外化时，他变得害怕同胞的意见，这相当自然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Here we have Roarck's overall entity, laughing with mirth but also with compassion, for while the entity enjoys all that is, the personalities have often turned their backs upon very much, in order to pursue esthetic purpose. At another time we will go into this more deeply, but Roarck recognized the picture, and subconsciously saw himself. In many ways he and Mark have opposing personalities, and yet basically the entities are similar to some startling degree.
quotes.translation: 这里我们有罗阿克的全我，带着欢愉和同情在笑，因为当全我享受一切存在时，人格们常常为了追求美学目的而背弃了许多东西。改天我们会更深入地探讨这一点，但罗阿克认出了那幅画，并在潜意识中看到了自己。在许多方面，他和马克有着对立的人格，然而基本上，这两个全我在某种程度上惊人地相似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is this inner director who maintains all of these functions, and who is responsible for the physical health. It is this director to whom you must communicate when health fails. There are ways of doing this which we will discuss at later date. It is this inner director who chooses the dream symbols in such a way that they will be meaningful to all layers or areas of the subconscious, and who is responsible for the amount, rate and type of subconscious data which is given to the outer ego by means of the intuitions.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在指挥者维持着所有这些功能，并负责身体健康。当健康出问题时，你必须与这个指挥者沟通。我们将在以后讨论做到这一点的方法。正是这个内在指挥者选择梦的象征，使它们对潜意识的所有层次或区域都有意义，并负责通过直觉给予外在自我潜意识数据的数量、速率和类型。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When I speak of the subconscious in this manner, I speak of course of that larger portion which deals with the inner realities. I want to give you more detailed information about the inner realities themselves. Actually they do not parallel the outer senses, and this will sound appalling to you I'm afraid, simply because there is nothing to be seen, smelled, heard or touched in the manner in which you are accustomed. This is extremely hard to explain, since I do not want to give you the idea that existence without your particular set of camouflage patterns is bland and innocuous, because this is not the case.
quotes.translation: 当我以这种方式谈论潜意识时，我当然指的是处理内在实相的较大部分。我想给你们关于内在实相本身的更详细信息。实际上，它们并不与外在感官平行，恐怕这会让你们感到震惊，仅仅是因为没有你们所习惯的那种可见、可嗅、可听或可触的东西。这极难解释，因为我不想让你们认为没有你们特定伪装模式的存在是平淡无害的，因为事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式根据某些法则演化。它们仅仅反映了背后的理念，而你们必须认识到这些理念源自不同的源头。它们确实源自潜意识，但在此之前，一种理念特质被内在感官接收。有时，这种理念特质作为直觉被接收，在那里它火花般闪入意识心智。但意识自我是伪装模式的主要操控者和明显的推动者。形成伪装模式的实际材料是存在的活力，它被你们的人格无意识地使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These fears do not belong to the subconscious. Then these materializations of panic and pain play about the physical body, projected by the ego and stealing the powers of the subconscious mind from their natural constructive tasks to do so. In other words, the ego becomes a tool to disrupt rather than to create.
quotes.translation: 这些恐惧不属于潜意识。然后，这些恐慌和痛苦的具象化在肉体周围游荡，由自我投射而出，并窃取潜意识心智的力量，使其偏离自然的建设性任务。换句话说，自我变成了破坏而非创造的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The entity itself does not have to keep constant check on its personalities, because in each personality there is an inner self-conscious part that knows its origin. This part, for now, I will call the self-conscious beyond the subconscious. The breather and the dreamer are not so automatically controlled as it would seem. I have mentioned before that some part of you knows exactly how much oxygen the lungs breathe, and how much energy it takes to pace a floor, and this is the part of you of which I spoke. It is the part, and the self-conscious part, that receives all inner data.
quotes.translation: 存有本身并不需要持续监控其人格，因为每个人格内部都有一个知晓自身起源的内在自我意识部分。这部分，暂且称之为潜意识之上的自我意识。呼吸者与做梦者并非如表面所见那般被自动控制。我曾提及，你体内有一部分确切知晓肺部需要吸入多少氧气，踱步需要消耗多少能量，这正是我所指的那部分。正是这部分——且是具备自我意识的部分——接收着所有内在数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The dream objects are not randomly chosen, but only those are chosen which will be significant to the many layers of the self, according to the need or according to that part of the subconscious area which is to be instructed; that is, the portion which is directly a participant in the dream activities, and which plays out the dream drama while other parts of the self-observe.
quotes.translation: 梦境对象并非随机选取，而是根据需求或根据潜意识区域中需要被指导的那部分——即直接参与梦境活动、在自我其他部分观察时演绎梦境戏剧的那部分——选取那些对自我多层结构具有意义的对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, so-called, is aware to some extent of the ego, regarding it as an extension of itself, over which it does not have as much control as it would like. This is precisely however the way the ego views the subconscious, as a rule. These two self-conscious portions of the self simply happen to coincide or to coexist with some proximity, psychologically speaking.
quotes.translation: 所谓的潜意识，在某种程度上觉察到自我的存在，将其视为自身的延伸，但对其的控制力却不如预期。然而，这恰恰是自我通常看待潜意识的方式。从心理学角度而言，这两个自我意识部分只是恰好以某种邻近性共存或重合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are deeply hidden areas of human behavior far below the surface of actions, and these cause the actions. They are psychic exchanges. Before the beginning of any war, subconsciously each individual knows not only that a war will occur, but its precise outcome. Battles like other physical acts exist first in the mental realm. When this realm is peaceful there are no wars. All of your physical activities, from the political to the economic and to the most insignificant individual concerns have their origin in mental existence, and their outcome is known.
quotes.translation: 人类行为中存在深藏于行动表面之下的领域，这些领域才是行动的根源。它们是心灵交换。在任何战争开始之前，每个个体潜意识中不仅知晓战争会发生，更清楚其确切结局。战役如同其他物质行为，首先存在于心智领域。当此领域平和时，便无战争。你们所有的物质活动——从政治经济到最微不足道的个人事务——都源于心智存在，其结局早已被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: With these precepts no one can find fault. It is true that the outward manifestations of the libido are directed toward the physical world, but until the source of the libido is seen and studied and known to exist, not in the topmost subconscious layers of the individual, and not even in the racial subconscious, but within the entity itself, then man will not know himself.
quotes.translation: 这些准则无人能挑剔。诚然，力比多的外在表现指向物质世界，但除非力比多的源头被看见、被研究、被确知存在于——并非个体潜意识最表层，甚至非种族潜意识，而是存有本身之内——否则人类将无法认识自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （This is really weird, and though it is now 11:00 AM as I write this I am still shaky. I was rather tired this morning but began work on my ESP book as usual. As 10:00 AM approached I did decide I would have to rest for half an hour; I then got the idea of putting myself into a light trance and suggesting that my subconscious would consider any problems I might encounter in the chapter I was working on. At 9:55 I turned the radio off, in the front room where I was working, and leaving the doors open between the front room and the bedroom, I lay down.
quotes.translation: （这实在太诡异了，尽管此刻已是上午11点，我写下这些时仍在颤抖。今早我相当疲惫，但仍如常开始撰写我的ESP书籍。临近10点时，我决定必须休息半小时；随后我想到让自己进入轻度出神状态，暗示我的潜意识会思考我正在撰写的章节中可能遇到的任何问题。9点55分，我关掉了正在工作的前厅收音机，让前厅与卧室之间的门敞开着，躺了下来。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I was about your establishment earlier, and Ruburt was right. There was a purpose in his misreading. Actually, subconsciously he picked up my thoughts on this occasion. He picked them up a few minutes earlier but his mind waited for a suitable occasion to transpose the word spacious in connection with the present. The spacious present is an excellent term. In actuality there is only a spacious present, so spacious that it cannot be explored all at once in your terms, hence your arbitrary division of it into larger rooms of past, present and future.
quotes.translation: 我早些时候曾提及你们的建构，而鲁柏是对的。他误读是有目的的。实际上，他在潜意识层面接收到了我此刻的想法。他提前几分钟就接收到了，但他的心智在等待一个合适的时机，将“广阔”一词与当下联系起来。“广阔的当下”是一个绝妙的术语。实际上，只有一个广阔的当下，它如此广阔，以至于在你们的层面上无法一次性探索完毕，因此你们武断地将其分割为过去、现在和未来这些更大的房间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 只有当达到一定程度的信心时，外在自我才能熟悉这些内在运作，至少在你们的层面上是如此。否则你们会动摇。通常，尽管整个自体能够组织来自所有内在感官的数据，但潜意识很少能全盘接收这样的通讯；而外在自我，由于它关注伪装模式，并且真正生来就是为了处理伪装模式，根本无法承受内在感官全套带来的觉悟冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The conscious ego then manipulates this material for the purposes of camouflage constructions. The transformation of vitality into physical properties is done by this self-conscious self that faces the inner world. The subconscious is the link between these two self-consciousness, and here you find an acceptance by the camouflage personality of the materials at hand.
quotes.translation: 然后，意识自我为了伪装建构的目的而操控这些材料。将活力转化为物质属性，是由这个面向内在世界的自我意识自体完成的。潜意识是这两个自我意识之间的连接，在这里，你会发现伪装人格接受了手头的材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Through experience in the various levels of existence the inner ego and the outer ego come closer and closer together. The subconscious eventually disappears, as it is no longer needed as a necessary buffer zone. At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately. It alone can cope with the tumultuous nature of such direct reality experience.
quotes.translation: 通过在不同存在层面的经验，内在自我和外在自我越来越接近。潜意识最终会消失，因为它不再需要作为必要的缓冲地带。在你们的发展阶段，内在自我是整体自体中最具自我意识的部分，并且拥有最强的感知和组织能力。只有它能够直接而即时地体验内在和基本实相。只有它能够应对这种直接实相体验的喧嚣本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: At the bottom so to speak, will be found a layer of the subconscious dealing with racial heritage, concerning the dim first materialization of man; and beneath this a heritage dealing with a comprehension of reality as concerned in physical matter before the physical evolution of man, following backward to that first inner self within its mental enclosure, that was adept enough to translate and transform its psychic energy to form the first, most minute physical materialization, from which all other physical constructions then flowed.
quotes.translation: 可以说，在底层会发现一层潜意识，处理种族遗产，涉及人类最初模糊的物质化；在这之下，还有一层遗产，处理在人类物理进化之前对物质实相的理解，一直回溯到那个在其心智外壳内的最初内在自体，它足够熟练地将自己的心灵能量转化和变形，形成最初、最微小的物质化，所有其他物质建构由此流衍而出。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （"Abstract" art done in this manner would be an attempt to appeal, to generate an emotional response--in other words action on our plane--on a subconscious level. This would enable the emotional response so generated to radiate its warmth through all levels of our being. The appeal of "recognizable" art is more direct, and may penetrate the being in reverse direction, that is from the top down. Whether it is as profound I cannot say.）
quotes.translation: （以这种方式创作的“抽象”艺术，试图在潜意识层面引发情感反应——换句话说，在我们的层面上引发行动。这将使由此产生的情感反应能够将其温暖辐射到我们存在的所有层面。“可识别”艺术的吸引力更直接，可能以相反方向渗透存在，即从上而下。它是否同样深刻，我无法断言。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They were drawn to each other because of those previous ties, and yet in that past life this daughter was extremely cruel, particularly in speech, to Throckmorton. Sensing of course the bitterness that he felt because she was not a boy--incidentally this is a strong subconscious motive--this caused her to bear him three sons to help allay his bitterness. She gave him these three sons as a gift or sacrifice; and when it seemed he would not accept them as such she turned against him, made too much of the sons to pay him back.
quotes.translation: 他们因前世羁绊而相互吸引，然而在那前世中，这位女儿对斯洛克莫顿极为残忍，尤其在言语上。她自然察觉到因自己非男儿身而引发的他的苦楚——顺便一提，这是强烈的潜意识动机——这促使她为他生下三个儿子以缓解他的痛苦。她将这三个儿子作为礼物或牺牲献给他；当他似乎不愿接受时，她便转而与他作对，过分宠爱儿子来报复他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This will give you the satisfaction of making the time twice as valuable. You can indeed suggest to the subconscious that it carry on in such a manner regardless of your conscious concern. As a result the ego can apply itself to the job at hand while the subconscious works for you and your inner purposes. This is very practical, and works without much difficulty.
quotes.translation: 这将让你满意地使时间加倍珍贵。你确实可以暗示潜意识，让它以这种方式继续运作，而不必在意你的意识关注。结果，自我可以专注于手头的工作，而潜意识则为你和你的内在目的服务。这非常实用，且不难实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: True self -knowledge is indispensable for health or vitality, and this means in every instance. The recognition of the truth about the self means that you must first discover what you think about yourself subconsciously. If this is a good image, build upon it. If it is a poor one, recognize it as simply the opinion of the subconscious and not as a definite truth.
quotes.translation: 真正的自我认知对健康或活力不可或缺，这适用于每个情况。认识自我的真相意味着你必须首先发现你潜意识里如何看待自己。如果这是良好的形象，就以此为基础。如果是不良形象，就将其视为潜意识的看法，而非确定的事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: We will find in many cases, first of all, dreams originating in that layer of personal subconscious, the most simple being those that have immediate reference to daily conscious life. While such a dream is less complex than others, it is nevertheless an amazing construction, and when we break down the obvious perceived objects or events of such a dream, we will find that the immediate objects and events that have application in daily life, that may be rehashed versions of the day, have nevertheless been carefully chosen.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，我们会首先发现源自个人潜意识层的梦，最简单的那些直接关联日常意识生活。虽然这样的梦不如其他复杂，但它仍是惊人的构造，当我们分解其中明显感知到的对象或事件时，会发现那些在日常生活中有应用、可能是白天经历翻版的直接对象和事件，却经过了精心选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: At our next session I will continue with this, and continue into an interpretation of dreams as they affect the individual dreamer in the physical field, and connect them with the levels of the subconscious. However I wanted you to understand that the elements of the dream world, originating in energy, also continue in existence when the dreamer may have forgotten them; and that all energy or any energy, given or adopting any type of form, must then continue at least momentarily to adapt to the laws inherent therein.
quotes.translation: 在下节课中，我将继续探讨这一点，并深入解析梦境如何影响物质场域中的个体做梦者，将其与潜意识层次联系起来。然而，我希望你明白，源自能量的梦境世界元素，即使做梦者可能已遗忘，仍继续存在；所有能量或任何能量，一旦赋予或采用任何形式，必须至少暂时适应其内在法则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You perceive portions of such actions consciously, some subconsciously, some with the inner senses, but you do not perceive the whole action. Your perceptions, your physical perceptions, cut a good bit of the portion that you could receive into bits and pieces. Since you do not perceive whole action that occurs within your own system, you do not understand it. So it should not surprise you that you misinterpret projections of other actions from different systems, when they appear as they sometimes do within your own.
quotes.translation: 你有意识地感知到这类行动的部分，有些是潜意识地，有些通过内在感官，但你并未感知到整个行动。你的感知，你的物质感知，将你本可接收的部分切割成碎片。既然你无法感知自己系统内发生的完整行动，你便无法理解它。因此，当来自不同系统的其他行动的投射偶尔出现在你的系统中时，你误解它们也就不足为奇了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Also she loves Philip, and would not consciously want to dominate him if she could. He senses this subconscious need of hers however to hold him, and resents it vigorously. She attempts to dominate him in her own way, and on a subconscious basis, and it is indeed by appealing to him through helplessness. At the same time she does not want him to give in to her.
quotes.translation: 她也爱菲利普，如果有能力的话，她不会刻意想要支配他。然而，他感觉到了她潜意识里想要控制他的需求，并对此强烈抵触。她试图以自己的方式在潜意识层面支配他，确实是通过示弱来博取他的同情。与此同时，她又不希望他完全屈服于自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: What you have here is an attempt to objectify, or stand apart from action in such a refusal. This is not the fault of the subconscious, but a fault of the ego, which refuses to assimilate or accept a given action. As you know, it is the ego who exists as a result of such objectivity. All the qualities that make up the ego are objectified to that degree, but they are collected about the ego with the ego as center. When the ego however refuses to accept an emotion as a part of itself, it tries one of two actions.
quotes.translation: 你在这里看到的是试图客观化或通过这种拒绝与行动保持距离的做法。这不是潜意识的过错，而是自我的过错——自我拒绝吸收或接受某个特定行动。如你所知，正是这种客观性造就了自我的存在。构成自我的所有特质都客观化到那个程度，但它们以自我为中心聚集。然而，当自我拒绝接受某种情绪作为自身的一部分时，它会尝试两种行动之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt sensed one in particular, and did indeed react in a manner that you found annoying. Ruburt's feelings and lack of action as far as the publishing house was concerned left much to be desired, and in time his lack of action would have caused an unpleasant reaction on his own part. However he correctly, if subconsciously, interpreted your attitude toward the publishing house as being basically dangerous to you. And so it was.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏特别感知到其中一种，并确实以让你恼火的方式做出了反应。就出版社而言，鲁柏的感受和缺乏行动令人遗憾，长此以往，他的不作为会给他自己带来不愉快的反应。然而，他正确——尽管是潜意识地——解读了你对出版社的态度，认为这对你本质上是有害的。事实也确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We were speaking, among other things, of intensities, and this is connected with both dream symbols and other such data. Dreams, having an electrical reality as I explained, must be decoded to have meaning to various levels of the subconscious and the personality. In Ruburt's predictions he has only begun. There will be other significant data that will be observed, as he learns to use his ability. And much of this significant material that he will observe from his predictions will also apply to dream symbols.
quotes.translation: 我们之前谈到强度等问题，这与梦境符号及其他类似资料都有关联。如我所解释的，梦境具有电性实相，必须被解码才能对潜意识及人格的各个层面产生意义。鲁柏的预测才刚刚开始。随着他学会运用自己的能力，将会观察到其他重要的资料。而他通过预测观察到的这些重要素材，也将适用于梦境符号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The nature of matter is an extremely difficult sore point in your scientific circles. Incidentally, for the benefit of the record: As yet Ruburt has read no books or information concerning the subject. This does not mean that he will not, or should not. To the contrary, since we have a gestalt here his conscious as well as subconscious grasp of information is important. We will take many leaps from it, and his familiarity with many subjects will actually help to make communication from me more automatic.
quotes.translation: 物质的本质是你们科学界极其棘手的痛点。顺便提一句，为记录起见：鲁柏目前尚未阅读任何关于此主题的书籍或资料。这并不意味着他不会或不应该读。恰恰相反，既然我们这里是一个完形，他有意识及潜意识层面对信息的掌握都很重要。我们将以此为基础进行许多跳跃，他对许多主题的熟悉程度实际上会帮助我与他的沟通更加自动化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is coming along well in the gallery situation. You should have a good winter, both of you. If Ruburt can stand it, I would suggest a three-day period after he leaves the gallery, during which he does no writing. Perhaps playing about his apartment while instructing his subconscious to work for him in the interval, and completely divorcing his conscious mind from his writing for that period of time. Such a method will result in maximum use of his abilities, and more practical utilization of energy.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在画廊的情况进展顺利。你们俩应该会有一个美好的冬天。如果鲁柏能承受，我建议他离开画廊后安排三天时间完全不写作。也许可以在公寓里闲逛，同时指示他的潜意识在此期间为他工作，让他的意识心智在那段时间完全脱离写作。这种方法将使他最大限度地发挥能力，并更有效地运用能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Fear cannot be ignored. It must be faced and conquered. It always leads to retreat when it is not faced. The physical image is indeed a replica in many ways of the inner self. When a man is ill it is not necessarily because he wants to be ill subconsciously. It is not necessarily because he is receiving some hidden psychological benefit, or because the illness fulfills some need. He is ill often--always in fact--because of a distortion that is occurring within the self, and materialized in physical form.
quotes.translation: 恐惧不能被忽视。它必须被面对并克服。当恐惧不被面对时，它总会导致退缩。物质形象在许多方面的确是内在自我的复制品。当一个人生病时，未必是因为他在潜意识中想要生病，也未必是因为他获得了某种隐藏的心理益处，或疾病满足了某种需求。他生病往往——实际上总是——因为自我内部发生了扭曲，并以物质形式显现出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Material like this is sifted through many layers of subconscious conceptions, and is subsequently colored. People strongly believing in your organized religions color the material in a manner that is highly disadvantageous, and that unfortunately often adds to existing superstitions. Ruburt's mind, believe it or not, is much like my own; though, if you'll forgive me, in a very limited fashion, therefore the distortions are much less distortive, much less harmful, and more easily discovered and cleared.
quotes.translation: 这类材料会经过许多层潜意识概念的筛选，随后被着色。强烈信奉你们组织化宗教的人会以一种极为不利的方式给材料着色，不幸的是，这往往加剧了现有的迷信。信不信由你，鲁柏的心智与我的非常相似；不过，请恕我直言，以一种非常有限的方式，因此扭曲的程度要小得多，危害也小得多，更容易被发现和清除。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: At the same time imagine that these creatures are really one creature, but with definite parts equipped to handle two entirely different worlds. The subconscious therefore, in this truly ludicrous analogy, would exist between the two brains, and would enable the creature to operate as a single unity. At the same time, and this is the difficult part to explain, neither of the two faces would ever see the other world. They would not be aware of each other. And yet each would be fully self-conscious.
quotes.translation: 同时，想象这些生物实际上是一个生物，但具有明确的部分来应对两个完全不同的世界。因此，在这个真正荒谬的类比中，潜意识将存在于两个大脑之间，并使该生物能够作为一个统一体运作。同时——这是最难解释的部分——两张脸中的任何一张都永远不会看到另一个世界。它们不会意识到彼此的存在。然而，每一张脸都完全具有自我意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There are other self-conscious portions of the self however, with which the ego is not at all familiar, but of which the subconscious has intuitive knowledge. These self-conscious portions of the self exist in different reality systems. Before we go into our Dr. Instream material, let me remind you however that there is a whole self, composed of these various self-conscious selves, and that a portion of the self is indeed aware of the unity that exists to form the whole psychological gestalt.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我还有其他自我意识的部分，自我对这些部分完全不熟悉，但潜意识对它们有直觉性的了解。自我的这些自我意识部分存在于不同的实相系统中。在我们进入英斯特里姆博士的材料之前，请让我提醒你，有一个整体自我，由这些不同的自我意识自我组成，并且自我的一部分确实意识到形成整体心理完形的统一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is a fine discrimination used in our sessions. There is indeed a tuning into, a reception of frequencies. Now it is extremely difficult to lock in here. There is a pulsation always occurring. It is difficult for Ruburt to maintain steadily that particular reception of frequency, and within certain limits there is sometimes a slipping in and out, so that now and then Ruburts personal subconscious is allowed to intrude. This is what happened the other evening.
quotes.translation: 在我们的课程中，存在着精细的辨别力。确实存在对频率的调谐和接收。现在，要锁定在这里极其困难。总是存在着一种脉动。鲁柏很难稳定地维持那种特定的频率接收，并且在某些限度内，有时会出现进出的滑动，以至于偶尔鲁柏的个人潜意识被允许侵入。前几天晚上就发生了这种情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Part of Ruburt's dream, you see, did have to do with a ship; and here with a second vessel and the water, you find that information was given on a subconscious level to Ruburt concerning his friend's journey. If you will reread that session dealing with the main dream you will see the connection. However, there was a deep sense of bewilderment upon Ruburt's part with his friend, who is a mother, since neither of them as adolescents considered motherhood as a part of their personal futures.
quotes.translation: 你看，鲁柏的梦境部分确实与一艘船有关；而在这里，通过第二艘船和水，你会发现信息在潜意识层面上被传递给鲁柏，涉及他朋友的旅程。如果你重读那节关于主要梦境的课程，你会看到其中的联系。然而，鲁柏对他的朋友——一位母亲——感到深深的困惑，因为她们俩在青少年时期都不认为母性会成为她们个人未来的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these concepts in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent as communications to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the physical individual. When the physical individual is trained along these lines however, he helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge, is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 这个重组后的自我随后试图以感官知觉来感知这些概念，这些知觉作为信息被传送到另一端的物质个体。有时这些信息是直接传递的，尽管它们必须经过物质个体潜意识的筛选。然而，当物质个体沿着这些方向受过训练时，他会协助这一过程，并建立起一个心理框架，像一座桥梁一样，用来连接这两个人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The unconscious and subconscious areas, however, are aware of much more of this information than the ego, for it receives only the minute residue of dream material as a rule. The Speakers therefore may appear within dreams as historical characters, as prophets, as trusted old friends, or in whatever guise will impress the particular personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，无意识和潜意识区域对这些信息的了解远比自我要多，因为自我通常只接收到梦材料的微小残余。因此，说话者可能以历史人物、先知、可信赖的老朋友或任何能打动特定人格的伪装出现在梦中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now we come to a dream that originated on quite a different subconscious area, and that did include a certain clairvoyant knowledge. It gave you inner warning to prepare for last Sunday's very real occurrence, in which you did indeed to some extent sit in judgment. There was necessarily of course distortion, and rather tricky distortion at that.
quotes.translation: 现在我们来到一个起源于相当不同的潜意识区域的梦，它确实包含了一定的千里眼知识。它给了你内在的警告，让你为上周日非常真实的事件做准备，在那次事件中，你确实在某种程度上扮演了审判者的角色。当然，其中必然存在扭曲，而且是相当棘手的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you are interested I will give you such exercises, but whether or not you remember these lives consciously is of little importance, for you have subconscious knowledge of them. This is your last reincarnation, in your terms. At death you will consciously realize the sum of your reincarnated selves. To me that is your personality, but this is only a small part of your overall self. To me it is as if you had finished one life, you see. To you it will seem as if you had finished many.
quotes.translation: 如果你感兴趣，我会给你这样的练习，但无论你是否能有意识地记住这些前世，这都不重要，因为你潜意识中知道它们。用你的话说，这是你的最后一次转世。在死亡时，你将会有意识地认识到你所有转世自我的总和。对我来说，这就是你的人格，但这只是你整体自我的一小部分。对我来说，这就像你完成了一生，你看。对你来说，这就像你完成了许多生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the various levels of existence the inner and outer egos begin to merge. Gradually direct experience of inner reality is spoon-fed by the inner ego through the mouth of the subconscious to the outer ego. The division between the inner and outer egos is necessary for other reasons than the nature of direct experience itself. That is, the outer ego is shielded from direct experience of reality because it could not take the impact of such experience. But this is not the only reason.
quotes.translation: 在存在的各个层次中，内在自我和外在自我开始融合。逐渐地，内在自我通过潜意识的嘴巴，像用勺子喂食一样，将内在现实的直接体验传递给外在自我。内在自我和外在自我之间的划分，除了直接体验本身的性质外，还有其他原因。也就是说，外在自我被屏蔽在现实的直接体验之外，因为它无法承受这种体验的冲击。但这并不是唯一的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is from this layer that so-called secondary personalities may sometimes arise, usually due to one of the psychic earthquakes mentioned earlier. As earthquakes cause lava to boil up seemingly from the center of the earth, so do some secondary personalities in their explosive emersion bring with them debris from other levels of the subconscious, often personifying themselves in the guise of those buried and frightening fears that have, until then, found no vehicle for expression.
quotes.translation: 正是从这一层，所谓的次要人格有时可能会出现，通常是由于前面提到的某种心灵地震。就像地震导致熔岩似乎从地心沸腾而出一样，一些次要人格在爆发性的浮现中，也带来了来自潜意识其他层次的碎片，常常以那些被埋藏的、令人恐惧的恐惧为伪装来人格化自己，而这些恐惧在此之前一直找不到表达的载体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is able to use all of its vast information, gained through previous experience, and all of its knowledge, to solve the problem at hand. Literally, the whole inner personality is able to focus upon any given problem, completely free of distractions, using the subconscious language of symbols. This language is crisper in its fashion, and more concise and more inclusive than any written language. For as we have explained, each symbol has various meanings to all layers of the self.
quotes.translation: 它能运用通过先前经验获得的全部庞大信息与知识来解决当前问题。实际上，整个内在人格能够完全不受干扰地聚焦于任何特定问题，运用象征符号的潜意识语言。这种语言比任何书面语言都更清晰、更简洁、更具包容性。正如我们解释过的，每个象征符号对自我的各个层面都具有不同含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In the past you did not understand properly this relationship. You understood the destructive tendencies but you placed them in the subconscious. The endless or seemingly endless circle need not occur now, or in the future. This dissociation of which Ruburt has spoken to you is an excellent discipline that will insure your use of energy in the best possible manner. I am not suggesting that the ego be ignored in any manner, merely that the tool is not allowed to become the master.
quotes.translation: 过去你们未能正确理解这种关系。你们认识到破坏性倾向，却将其归入潜意识。那无尽或看似无尽的循环不必在现在或未来发生。鲁柏向你们提及的这种解离法是一种极佳的修炼方式，能确保你们以最佳方式运用能量。我并非建议忽视自我，只是不让工具成为主人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You will begin to starve the ulcer of its energy. The manner in which the subconscious translates energy into construction of physical matter, again, has been covered in our sessions previously. However it is imperative that the idea be understood thoroughly, for here we have no vague and nebulous theory indeed, but a most practical and definite explanation of the manner in which you yourselves construct not only your own physical image, but indeed your own physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你们将开始断绝溃疡的能量供给。潜意识将能量转化为物质构造的方式，我们之前的课程已有论述。但必须彻底理解这个观念，因为这绝非模糊空泛的理论，而是对你们如何构建自身形象乃至物质环境的最实际明确的解释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego considers itself the self and considers anything outside of its self as being either no self or another such separate identity, and so the individual man is led to believe that telepathy is basically a communication between two or more basically alone, separate and aloof selves. Telepathy does not operate at the level of the ego, although its actions may protrude into the domain of the ego. Telepathy operates within the inner self, within various levels, different levels of the subconscious, where the ideas of separation and limitations of self are not nearly so limiting.
quotes.translation: 自我视自身为全部，将自身之外的一切视为非我或另一个独立存在，因此个体相信心电感应本质上是两个或多个基本孤独、分离、疏离的自我之间的沟通。心电感应虽可能侵入自我领域，却不在自我层面运作。它在内在自我内部、在潜意识的不同层次中运作，在那里，自我的分离与限制观念远没有那么局限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Begin the yoga exercises and follow them faithfully. Your few experiences with autosuggestion upon falling asleep have been ego-bound. Think of this in terms of muscle-bound and you will see what I mean. Be in a drowsy state and suggest, Ruburt, suggest, Joseph; do not attempt to bully or command the subconscious. Suggestions are all that are needed. Your love of nature, Joseph, and Ruburt your love of nature, is another method of dissociation, or can be if you use it as such.
quotes.translation: 开始瑜伽练习并忠实遵循。你们在入睡时进行的几次自我暗示都受限于自我。想想"肌肉僵硬"这个词，你们就会明白我的意思。在昏昏欲睡的状态下进行暗示，鲁柏，进行暗示，约瑟；不要试图强迫或命令潜意识。只需要暗示。约瑟，你对自然的热爱，以及鲁柏你对自然的热爱，是另一种解离方式——只要你们善加利用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now I found intermission highly amusing. The conditions of which I have been speaking are one thing. As far as the effect of weather upon the Moods of individuals, we do have something else. For the weather is created by you, on a subconscious level. The weather, at any given time, is a direct physical interpretation of the inner mass mind. You do indeed react, but you have already created the conditions, you see, and you then react to these in both psychic and physical ways.
quotes.translation: 我发现幕间休息非常有趣。我一直在谈论的情况是一回事。至于天气对个人情绪的影响，则另当别论。因为天气是你们在潜意识层面创造的。任何特定时刻的天气，都是内在集体心智的直接物质诠释。你们确实会做出反应，但你们已经创造了这些条件，然后以心灵和物质两种方式对其做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: At times they are able to be perceived as pseudo images. They are doing subconsciously what came naturally, attempting to form, as always, their own physical construction. However it is impossible for them to create a consistent solid image in your terms, for while they are still focused within your system the inner self knows well that the individual is finished with a given life situation, is out of alignment so to speak, and is therefore denied full use of its own energy.
quotes.translation: 有时它们能被感知为伪影像。它们正无意识地做着原本自然发生的事，一如既往地试图构建自己的物质结构。然而，以你们的说法，它们不可能创造出连贯的固态影像，因为当它们仍聚焦于你们的系统时，内在自体深知个体已结束特定的人生情境——可谓已处于失衡状态——因此被剥夺了自身能量的完整使用权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is the ideal circumstance, for when this is the case then the ego listens to the inner self, and then directs its energy outward in a way that is beneficial for the whole gestalt framework. What you call negative suggestions are often judgments of the ego, for suggestion works from the ego to the subconscious, as well as it works the other way around. Such suggestions made by the ego can indeed be caught, and positive or constructive suggestions given to replace them.
quotes.translation: 这是理想状况，因为当此情形发生时，自我会聆听内在自体，继而以有益于整体完形架构的方式向外投射能量。你们所谓的负面暗示往往是自我的评判，因为暗示既从自我流向潜意识，也以相反方向运作。自我发出的这类暗示确实能被截获，并代之以积极或建设性的暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: (From the 82nd session for August 27, 1964:) When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis [is established] will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年8月27日第82节课：）当人类意识到自己此刻正在创造自身形象时，就不会惊诧于相信自己在其他时空创造其他形象。唯有在此基础建立之后，转世概念才能获得其自然有效性；唯有当人们理解到潜意识（其特定层面）是当前人格与过往人格之间的纽带时，转世理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Such people realize their deficiency, yet conversely because they do have a distorted but seemingly dominant "I" they are only all the more furious and confused. There is no basic unifying factor to give them consistency, and no unifying subconscious memories to give them true inner identity. This is one of the main reasons why they strike out at strongly integrated personalities, and why it is so easy for them to be catapulted by raw emotion into tragedies of this sort.
quotes.translation: 这类人意识到自身的缺陷，但正因他们拥有扭曲却看似主导的"我"，反而愈发狂怒与困惑。没有基本统合因子赋予他们一致性，没有统合的潜意识记忆赋予他们真实的内在身份。这正是他们猛烈攻击高度整合人格的主要原因，也是他们极易被原始情绪抛入此类悲剧的根源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A tenuous one. Marleno knew about your experience at York Beach, and because of circumstances in her own life she visited the general territory. An emotional connection with the sessions did have quite a bit to do with her particular visit to York Beach, however, and there was on her part a subconscious knowledge that Dr. Instream had been there also. I have told you that telepathy operates continually, and has strong emotional connections, so this should be no surprise.
quotes.translation: 一种微弱的关联。玛莲诺知晓你在约克海滩的经历，因自身生活境遇而造访了那片区域。不过，与课程的情感联结确实与她此次约克海滩之行密切相关，她潜意识中知晓因斯特里姆博士也曾到访此地。我告诉过你们，心电感应持续运作且具有强烈的情感联结，因此这不足为奇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This happens fairly often. It does not change the fact that it is the last reincarnation cycle for parents for example, although it may be lonely for the child in such an instance. I have not gone into these questions; however, to some degree in the subconscious mind you have what could be called a ghost image of your ancestors, and when your parents are in their last reincarnation cycle they leave your plane and it is more difficult for the ghost image to be imprinted.
quotes.translation: 这种情况相当常见。但这并未改变例如父母正处于最后一次转世周期的事实——尽管在此情形下孩子可能会感到孤独。我尚未深入探讨这些问题；然而，在潜意识层面，你们拥有可称为祖先"幽灵影像"的存在。当父母处于最后一次转世周期时，他们会离开你们的层面，使得幽灵影像更难被铭印。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All of this takes development. And, again, rather than force an intensification before the subconscious is ready for such experiences, I would much prefer that you carry on as you have been, at your own pace. There will be failures. This is to be expected, but you will learn from your mistakes, as well as from your successes.
quotes.translation: 这一切都需要发展。而且，再次强调，在潜意识尚未准备好接受这类经验之前，我宁愿你们按自己的步调继续下去，不要强行加速。会有失败，这是意料之中的事，但你们会从错误和成功中学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It has often been said that the subconscious has a generalized focus, but the subconscious and inner senses have as strong and vital and intensified a focus as the focus of the conscious mind. The phenomena perceived is merely of a different nature, and in this state of which I have spoken no real intensification is possible.
quotes.translation: 常有人说潜意识具有普遍性的焦点，但潜意识与内在感官的焦点，其强度、活力与专注力，与意识心同样强烈。所感知的现象只是性质不同，在我所说的这种状态中，不可能有真正的强化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will have more to say in the future, regarding such experiments in general. Naturally it is possible to have very successful experiments along these lines. Again, conditions must be met. Subconsciously you will make your own progress. You will simply not have visiting apparitions Monday through Saturday, nor will you ever be certain ahead of time, regardless of proficiency, as to the success of such ventures. There is too much involved. You will learn by doing.
quotes.translation: 未来我们会进一步讨论这类实验。自然，沿着这些方向进行非常成功的实验是可能的。再次强调，必须满足条件。你们会在潜意识层面自行进步。但你们不会周一至周六都有来访的幻影，无论熟练程度如何，也无法事先确定这些尝试能否成功。牵涉的因素太多。你们会在实践中学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Each channel will represent a portion of the self, each one existing in a different dimension, and yet all part of the whole self, or the whole tape. You can see that it would be highly ridiculous to say that the material on your Mono One was any more or any less valid than your material on Mono Two. Mono One and Mono Two could be compared then to self one and two; self one and two here, however, in the context of the ego as self one and the subconscious as you know it as self two. We are not using Dunnes terms here, in other words.
quotes.translation: 每个频道代表自我的一部分，各自存在于不同的维度，却都是整体自我（或整条录音带）的一部分。由此可见，说单声道一上的内容比单声道二更有效或更无效是极其荒谬的。单声道一与单声道二可类比为自我一与自我二；但这里的自我一与自我二，是在自我为自我一、你们所知的潜意识为自我二的脉络下。换言之，我们并非使用邓恩的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Necessary and vital information is therefore not collected. The problem is not seen in any total light, but in a distorted manner. This distorted picture is then delivered to the subconscious, which is able to make some corrections. It still cannot view the physical situation as clearly as can the ego under best conditions.
quotes.translation: 因此，必要且重要的信息未被收集。问题未能以整体视野看待，而是以扭曲的方式呈现。这种扭曲的画面随后被传递给潜意识，潜意识虽能做出部分修正，但仍无法像最佳状态下的自我那样清晰地审视物质情境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You both suspected all sorts of tricky subconscious motives on Ruburt's part. The fact is, had he followed my suggestion then, affairs for him would have been much simpler. As it is, on his own with your help, because of quite practical events, he has chosen to leave, after having accepted the assistant directorship. Had he taken my suggestion when I gave it, affairs would have gone smoother. As it is there will be misunderstandings that could have been avoided.
quotes.translation: 你们俩都怀疑鲁柏这边有各种狡猾的潜意识动机。事实上，如果他当时听从我的建议，他的处境会简单得多。实际情况是，他在你的帮助下，基于相当实际的事件，自行决定在接受了助理主任职位后离开。若他当初接受我的建议，事情会进行得更顺利。而如今，将出现本可避免的误解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: So do your dream images exist in the same manner, and you are as unaware of their existence as you are of your own subconscious existence. You do not know how you move across the floor. You are not conscious of each breath you take. You know that your muscles move, without your volition. You know you breathe, and in the same manner that you undertake physiological, biological and mental leaps and functions, so do you also create the reality of the dream world.
quotes.translation: 你的梦境影像也是如此存在，而你对其存在的无知，正如你对自己潜意识存在的无知。你不知自己如何在地板上移动，也不觉自己每一次呼吸。你知晓肌肉无需意志便能运动，你明白自己呼吸——正如你进行生理、生物与心灵的跳跃与功能那般，你也同样创造了梦境世界的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Normal waking consciousness weaves in and out of this infinite supportive webwork. Your inner experience is so intricate that verbally it is almost impossible to describe. Normal waking consciousness, while having memory of itself, obviously does not retain all memory all of the time. It is said that memory of past events drops back into the subconscious. It is still intensely alive, and by alive I mean living and active, although you do not focus upon it.
quotes.translation: 正常的清醒意识在这无限支撑的网状结构中穿梭往来。你的内在经验如此精微繁复，几乎无法用言语描述。正常的清醒意识虽能记忆自身，却显然无法时刻保留全部记忆。人们常说过往事件的记忆会沉入潜意识。它们依然鲜活——我所谓"鲜活"是指生机勃勃且持续运作，尽管你并未聚焦其上。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: you must understand, for one thing, that telepathy operates constantly at a subconscious level. If you continually expect any individual to behave in a particular manner, then you are constantly sending him telepathic suggestions that he will do so. Every individual reacts to suggestion. According then to the specific conditions existing at the time, such an individual will to some extent or another act according the mass suggestions he has received.
quotes.translation: 现在：你必须明白，首先，心电感应持续在潜意识层面运作。若你不断期待某人以特定方式行事，你便持续向他发送他会如此行动的心电感应暗示。每个人都会对暗示产生反应。根据当时存在的具体条件，此人会在某种程度上依照所接收的群体暗示而行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your own visual abilities are often used subconsciously. They are stronger than Ruburt's. He must work for his. Therefore your subconscious negative imagery has on many occasions superseded. You must realize if you can that no blame is intended here. You would be even better off if you could forget the whole issue.
quotes.translation: 你的视觉能力常被潜意识运用，且比鲁柏的更强。他必须刻意努力才能获得。因此你的潜意识负面意象在许多场合已取代了应有状态。你必须明白——若能做到——此处并无责备之意。若能彻底忘却整件事，你的处境会更好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: What is required is more than a shedding of clothes, however. To plunge into this ocean you also leave the physical body at the shore. It will be there when you get back. Your camouflage patterns can be likened to those cast by sun and shadow upon the ever-moving waves. As long as you keep the pattern in mind, you create it, and it is there. If you turn your head away for a moment and then look quickly back you can see only the wave. Your camouflage and your world are created by conscious focusing and unconscious concentration. Only by turning your head aside momentarily can you see what is beneath the seemingly solid pattern. By plunging into our ocean of value climate you can dive beneath your camouflage system and look up to see it, relatively foundationless, floating above you, moved, formed, and directed by the shifting illusions caused by the wind of will, and the force of subconscious concentration and demand.
quotes.translation: 然而，所需的不只是脱去衣物。要跃入这海洋，你更需将肉体留在岸边——待你归来时它仍在原处。你的伪装模式可比拟为阳光与阴影投射在永动波浪上的图案。只要你心中存有这图案，你便创造它，它便存在。若你转头片刻再迅速回望，便只能看见波浪。你的伪装与你的世界，是由意识聚焦与无意识专注共同创造的。唯有暂时偏转头颅，你才能看见看似坚实的图案之下是什么。跃入我们价值气候的海洋，你便能潜至伪装系统之下，仰望它——相对无根基地悬浮于你上方，被意志之风与潜意识专注及需求之力所推动、塑造与引导。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (From the 242nd session for March 16, 1966:) The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized part of the personality, fully equipped to operate under certain circumstances21 ... When those conditions no longer exist [after "death"], then other layers of the self take over the dominant position, and the personality realigns its psychological components. The ego does not disappear, however; it merely takes a back seat in some respects, as your own subconscious does during physical existence. The ego is under the control of what may loosely be called "the inner self." The survival or nonphysical personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it in physical life.
quotes.translation: （摘自1966年3月16日第242节：）自我并非自身最强大或最博知的部分。它只是人格中高度专门化的部分，完全装备好在特定环境下运作……当那些条件不复存在时（"死后"），自身的其他层面便接管主导地位，人格重新调整其心理组成。然而自我并未消失，它只是在某些方面退居次要位置——正如你自身的潜意识在物质存在期间所做的那样。自我受控于可粗略称为"内在自体"的部分。存续的或非物质的性格与自我的关系，某种程度上如同做梦的性格与物质生活中的自我的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: As far as these drugs are concerned there are a few points I would like to make. One of your purposes as I have said is to learn to organize energy units and to focus your own energy along those lines. That is, you are the energy that you use.
