The self-consciousness is not to be blotted out but taken along. It is so to speak to walk side by side with the inner self. The use of these drugs sweeps the personality off its feet. Often the personality does receive a rewarding glimpse of the inner reality, but more often the ego is merely sent tumbling through frightening images of chaotic phantom realities formed by a suddenly-released subconscious, and with no guide. The experience is often vivid and long remembered, but so unorganized and undisciplined that no inner order is arrived at, no other organization glimpsed, and the ordinary but necessary camouflage footing suddenly dispensed with.
quotes.translation: 关于这些药物，我有几点想说明。正如我所说，你们的目的之一是学习组织能量单元，并沿着这些方向聚焦自身能量。也就是说，你们就是自己所使用的能量。自我意识不应被抹除，而应被携带前行。它可以说要与内在自我并肩而行。使用这些药物会使人格失去平衡。人格确实常能瞥见内在实相而有所收获，但更多时候，自我只是被突然释放的潜意识抛入混乱幻象实相的恐怖影像中，且毫无指引。这种体验往往生动且令人长久铭记，但如此缺乏组织和纪律，以至于无法达成内在秩序，无法瞥见其他组织形态，而平常却必要的伪装立足点则突然被舍弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时应用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前就意识到危险。内在自我关注维持整个自我的基础与平衡——这非常重要——并且对整体存有的讯息保持开放。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并意识到外在自我因其专门化而无法承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我本应在某种程度上代表仍居于潜意识中的次主导人格。当外在自我狭隘且未能妥善代表这些次主导人格时，它们便会奋起反抗，并在条件有利时试图通过主导自我的瞬间弱点来表达自己。但即使不这样做，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）来表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The material in these last sessions will be basic for further discussions. We are going much deeper into the meaning of reality, and the aspects of reality. Our present procedure is working out very well, and it is enabling me to discuss matters that were too complicated for our earlier method. Before we close I want you to understand that your experiments in psychological time add to your mobility and subconscious manipulation within the electrical universe. And all psychic experience must have reality here, that is, within the electrical system. There is no psychic experience which does not have such electric reality. Your psychological experiments give you familiar ground there to walk upon, to travel on; grounds of reference and even of safety.
quotes.translation: 最近这几节课的材料将成为进一步讨论的基础。我们将更深入地探讨实相的意义及其各个面向。我们目前的进行方式效果很好，这使我能够讨论早期方法过于复杂而无法处理的问题。在结束之前，我希望你们明白，你们在心理时间方面的实验增加了你们在电性宇宙中的机动性和潜意识操控能力。所有心灵体验都必须在此——即在电性系统内——具有实相。没有任何心灵体验不具有这种电性实相。你们的心理实验为你们提供了在那里行走、旅行的熟悉基础；参照点甚至安全基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I do not really waken however but continue dreaming. I'm downtown in the same town, with this group again. One girl asks me if Chuck stayed till nine last night and I say yes. Then one girl, not of the group, is crying. I say something about poetry and she says, well you d better talk fast because I've just about decided to stop writing poetry. She has light brown hair, rather dark circles under her eyes and is somewhat younger than I. I say that you can't just decide consciously to give up writing poetry, you d write it anyhow, though you could subconsciously make such a decision and never know about it at all. Then rather dramatically but beautifully I tell her that: "Poetry is your characteristic method of expression, your way of translating the data into physical reality and that even its rhythm is the rhythm of your heartbeat." Tell her that she can't give it up.
quotes.translation: 然而我并未真正醒来，而是继续做梦。我在同一个城镇的市中心，又和这群人在一起。一个女孩问我查克是否待到昨晚九点，我说是的。然后一个不属于这群人的女孩在哭泣。我提到诗歌，她说："你最好快点说，因为我刚决定不再写诗了。"她有着浅棕色头发，眼下有相当深的黑眼圈，年纪比我小一些。我说你不能有意识地决定放弃写诗，你无论如何都会写，尽管你可能在潜意识中做出这样的决定而完全不自知。然后我相当戏剧化却优美地告诉她："诗歌是你特有的表达方式，是你将资料转化为物质实相的方式，甚至它的节奏就是你心跳的节奏。"告诉她她无法放弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The spontaneous self when it did escape, you see, managed to do so only under circumstances where the explosive impulses shattered their way through. In the years between there was some considerable improvement in balance. When the situations developed which we have discussed, setting off the old conflicts, again you see, then the discipline idea was short-circuited back to the old compulsive behavior, though in different form, and with the old religious connotation of self denial. The old fear of spontaneity returned, and the methodical attempt to deny subconscious impulses; the old feeling of unworthiness was also activated, and the body duly denied. Now this self denial began in the Catholic home, and he was peculiarly prone to accept it. It was part of the old Catholic training, and he fell for it under a new guise.
quotes.translation: 你看，当自发自我确实逃脱时，它只能在爆发性冲动冲破一切的情况下做到。在随后的岁月里，平衡有了相当大的改善。当出现我们讨论过的情况，触发旧冲突时，你看，纪律观念又短路回旧的强迫行为，尽管形式不同，并带有旧日宗教式的自我否定含义。对自发性的旧恐惧回来了，以及有系统地试图否认潜意识冲动；旧的无价值感也被激活，身体理所当然地被否定。现在，这种自我否定始于天主教家庭，而他特别容易接受它。这是旧日天主教训练的一部分，他在新伪装下又上当了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now you have indeed been doing well. And I do congratulate you. You are too impatient both with your own development and the development of others. You want your destination now and you want to get to that destination as quickly as possible, 8595 miles a minute, you see. You have given yourself several traffic tickets. Now, you have learned a good deal, and I know that you have tried. It does no good to understand issues intellectually, however, or even to understand them intuitively unless you understand them so thoroughly that they become a part of your daily life. Much that you know you have made a part of your life, but you still wish to use your knowledge for your own conscious purposes. You are still not willing to say let me develop as I should develop. You are still saying let me develop as I think I should develop. The I being a highly egotistical I. You are still saying, let me develop as I want to develop. You are still saying I want this person or I want that person or that thing. Therefore shall I use this ability and this knowledge to gai，，n it. And that is why you have given yourself a traffic ticket now and then。What you are learning is a technique for self development. You cannot use it, therefore, to attain those things that do not pertain to your own self development and the techniques will not help you get something that you were not meant to have nor that you have before decided as an entity that you should not have. I will leave specifics for later. Nevertheless, the facts remain that your own inner self and your own entity have given you challenges that you have accepted. Now you know these challenges; subconsciously you are aware of them. Consciously you do not want to accept them and this is one reason why you have had difficulty with the pendulum. This is not out of the ordinary. This happens to many personalities. It is nothing to blame yourself for. You are certainly in the midst of a certain line of development. You cannot blame yourself for not being further along the line. The very fact that you are here this evening, the very fact that you are trying as hard as you have been shows that you are indeed developing and that you are indeed learning. There must be an open-minded, an openhearted attitude here. You must not try to use what you have learned in a narrow, limiting way. This hampers your own development. It closes your eyes to many possibilities that will be important to you. It is natural, perhaps, to want to use what you have learned, this information, as a technique to achieve what you at any particular time think desirable, a particular person, a particular thing. But what is important is the inner development. If this is taken care of, it will automatically lead you to the person that is best for you and to the circumstances that will help you develop. To insist that a specific individual or a specific goal be attained through these methods is limiting. There must always be the acknowledgement that you do not consciously as yet realize the depths of yourself, the goals you have set and the challenges, and this material should be used to open up your inner horizons and to lead you in those directions toward which your inner self has already set you. If you then egotistically, say--No--this particular situation is what I want, then you may be blocking the inner direction which has been meant for you. I said I would discuss some particular material and so I shall shortly. But the inner attitude is far more important. I suggest, Joseph, that you take a break and I shall continue.
quotes.translation: 你们确实做得很好。我由衷祝贺你们。你们对自己和他人的发展都过于急躁。你们现在就想要到达目的地，并且想尽快到达，每分钟8595英里，你看。你们已经给了自己几张交通罚单。现在，你们学到了很多，我知道你们努力过。然而，仅从理智上理解问题是没有用的，甚至凭直觉理解也无用，除非你们理解得如此透彻，以至于它们成为你们日常生活的一部分。你们所知道的许多东西已经成为你们生活的一部分，但你们仍然希望为了自己有意识的目的而运用知识。你们仍然不愿意说：让我按照我应该发展的方式发展。你们仍然在说：让我按照我认为应该发展的方式发展。这个"我"是一个高度自我中心的"我"。你们仍然在说：让我按照我想要的方式发展。你们仍然在说：我想要这个人，或我想要那个人，或那个东西。因此，我要用这种能力和知识来获得它。这就是为什么你们时不时给自己开一张交通罚单。你们正在学习的是自我发展的技巧。因此，你们不能用它来获得那些与你们自身发展无关的东西，这些技巧也不会帮助你们得到那些你们本不该拥有、或作为存有早已决定不应拥有的东西。具体细节我稍后再谈。然而，事实仍然是，你们的内在自我和你们的存有给了你们挑战，而你们已经接受了。现在你们知道这些挑战；在潜意识中你们意识到它们。在有意识层面你们不想接受它们，这就是你们在钟摆方面遇到困难的原因之一。这并非异常。许多人格都会遇到这种情况。这不是你们该自责的事。你们当然正处在某条发展路线之中。你们不能因为自己还没有走得更远而自责。你们今晚在这里的事实，你们如此努力尝试的事实，本身就表明你们确实在发展，确实在学习。这里必须有一种开放的思想、开放的心态。你们绝不能试图以狭隘、限制性的方式运用所学到的东西。这会阻碍你们自身的发展。它会蒙蔽你们的双眼，使你们看不到许多对你们重要的可能性。也许，想要运用所学到的这些信息作为一种技巧，来获得你们在特定时刻认为可取的东西——某个特定的人、某个特定的物——是很自然的。但重要的是内在发展。如果这一点被妥善处理，它将自动引导你们走向最适合你们的人，以及有助于你们发展的环境。坚持要通过这些方法获得某个特定个体或特定目标是有限制性的。必须始终承认，你们有意识层面尚未认识到自身的深度、你们设定的目标和挑战，这些材料应用于打开你们的内在视野，并引导你们走向内在自我已为你们设定的方向。如果你们随后以自我中心的方式说——不——这个特定情况就是我想要的，那么你们可能正在阻挡为你们设定的内在方向。我说过我会讨论一些特定材料，我很快就会讲。但内在态度要重要得多。约瑟夫，我建议你休息一下，我会继续。

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Now this also overshadows your relationship with the males to whom you have come in contact. For you have been, on the one hand, terrified of them, and on the other hand wanted a normal relationship. Give me a moment here --on the one hand you desire more from a relationship with a man than you have any right to expect. No human being could ever deliver what you expect a man to deliver in a relationship. This is because you see the male in terms inspired in you when you were a child. You were terrified of the male, your father. On the other hand, you felt that he did contain wisdom, truth, almost godlike qualities. These qualities you attempt to project into the male that you meet. At the same time you are also terrified because of this background. No man can possibly be as godlike as your inner conception. Therefore, each man is bound to disappoint you. At the same time, you hope and pray subconsciously that the man will disappoint you because this male in your mind has godlike qualities that attract you; on the other, you see him as all powerful and as one who gives out punishment and one who is unreasoning and cruel because you felt that your father was cruel. You are afraid, so to speak, to come under a man's thumb for this reason, to come under his domination. For to do so is to place yourself in a humble position and a frightening position underneath the male figure. Your terror as a child gave you an inner idea of reality and family group whereby you saw yourself completely powerless and helpless under the domination of this father figure. He was the source of all and yet he could at the same time take all away. And you felt, at the same time, that he would indeed do so. Because you were a male in past lives, you resented this all the more strongly. Give us a moment.
quotes.translation: 这也影响了你与所接触男性的关系。一方面你惧怕他们，另一方面又渴望正常的关系。请稍等——你一方面期望从与男性的关系中得到超出合理范围的更多东西。没有人能满足你对男性的期待。这是因为你以童年时被灌输的视角看待男性。你惧怕男性，你的父亲。另一方面，你又觉得他蕴含智慧、真理，近乎神性的品质。你试图将这些品质投射到遇到的男性身上。同时，由于这种背景，你内心也充满恐惧。没有人能像你内心构想的那样神性。因此，每个男性都注定让你失望。同时，你潜意识里又希望并祈祷男性会让你失望，因为你心中这个男性具有吸引你的神性特质；另一方面，你又视他为全能的惩罚者、不讲理且残忍——因为你认为父亲是残忍的。所以你害怕被男性掌控，害怕受他支配。因为这样做就是将自己置于男性形象之下的卑微而可怕的境地。你童年的恐惧让你对现实和家庭群体形成了内在认知，认为自己完全无力无助地受父亲形象的支配。他是一切之源，却也能夺走一切。而你同时觉得，他确实会这样做。由于你前世是男性，你对此更加愤恨。请稍等片刻。

quotes.text: You have been afraid that the male would hurt you cruelly--and on purpose, and at the same time, you have endowed him with godlike qualities, and, therefore, demanded more than any man could possibly deliver. I am sure that you realize that when you drive your car, you see yourself in a masculine role, as one of power and strength and one in which you consider yourself invulnerable. Now you are not invulnerable in that car. The reason that you feel invulnerable is that you are subconsciously identifying with this godlike figure and it could lead you into difficulty. Now you have on occasion been cruel to men you have known rather purposely, intending to hurt them before you could be hurt. When you have settled yourself upon a particular man, you see, it becomes a matter of principle with you that you get him. Oh, it does indeed. On the one hand, you want him, on the other hand, as you had to escape from your father, you must also escape from the man and so you are caught in a dilemma. You want him. On the other hand, you must feel that you have independence from him. There was never any communication between you and your father. Therefore, you find it difficult to communicate verbally with a male.
quotes.translation: 你一直害怕男性会残忍地伤害你——而且是蓄意的，同时你又赋予他神性特质，因此要求超出任何男性所能给予的。我相信你意识到，当你开车时，你将自己视为男性角色，充满力量与强大，认为自己无懈可击。但你在那辆车里并非无懈可击。你感到无懈可击是因为你潜意识中认同了这个神性形象，这可能导致你陷入困境。你有时会刻意对认识的男性残忍，意图在他们伤害你之前先伤害他们。当你锁定某个特定男性时，得到他就成了你的原则问题。哦，确实如此。一方面你想要他，另一方面，就像你必须逃离父亲一样，你也必须逃离这个男性，因此陷入两难。你想要他，同时又必须感到自己独立于他。你与父亲之间从未有过任何沟通。因此，你发现很难与男性进行言语交流。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Now, you see what you are willing to see, and it is stupidity to consider suggestion as the result or the cause of what you see. It is stupidity in class to worry that suggestion would cause a given result... for suggestion causes whatever you see. You form your physical reality through suggestion and expectation. You experience what you expect to experience at a subconscious and a conscious level. And therefore as Ruburt is very careful that suggestion is not involved, so he has also had you be overly cautious, and there have been many opportunities in class that you have missed for this reason... and these are the bets that I have spoken about earlier this evening. You have the ability to see more than you saw, and you have the ability. You enjoyed your passivity (to CW) to the point of a joyous giving-up; and instead, you see, there is a point within passivity where you are passively alert. And you went beyond the point and lost what you might have seen. As our friend here went beyond the point (referring to TM), looked at the portraits and consciously... for you did not make an original intuitive judgment... but consciously looked at those portraits in terms of nationality, age, and all the requirements that you thought of.
quotes.translation: 现在，你只愿看到你想看到的，而将暗示视为你所见的结果或原因是愚蠢的。在课堂上担心暗示会导致特定结果也是愚蠢的……因为暗示造就了你所见的一切。你通过暗示和期待形成你的物质实相。你在潜意识和意识层面体验你所期待体验的。因此，正如鲁柏非常小心不让暗示介入，他也让你变得过度谨慎，为此你错过了课堂上许多机会……这就是我今晚早些时候提到的赌注。你有能力看到比你所见更多的东西，你确实有这个能力。你享受被动（对CW说）到了愉悦放弃的程度；然而，在被动中存在一个点，在那里你是被动警觉的。你越过了那个点，失去了本可能看到的东西。就像我们这位朋友（指TM）越过了那个点，看着那些肖像，有意识地……因为你没有做出原始的直觉判断……而是有意识地根据国籍、年龄以及你认为的所有要求来看那些肖像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He knows that his particular abilities are very well developed on a subconscious level, and actually fears that they might carry him away. Yet the intuitive qualities have made him a poet, and have always represented a strong and not weak part of his personality. They are actually well balanced in that they are not likely to sweep him off in any one direction willy-nilly, but could allow him a steady progression into various levels of direct experience.
quotes.translation: 他知道自己的特殊能力在潜意识层面发展得很好，实际上害怕这些能力会让他失控。然而，直觉品质使他成为诗人，并且一直代表他个性中强大而非软弱的部分。这些品质实际上平衡得很好，不太可能随意将他推向任何单一方向，而是能让他稳步进入直接体验的不同层次。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is a chemical necessity, as I have said, that makes dreaming inevitable. But then these dreams in turn affect the personality in general, and affect the actions of that personality in a physical universe. It goes without saying that telepathy operates within the dreaming state quite as effectively as it operates while the individual is awake. In the waking state it operates subconsciously. But in all times there is no boundary, generally speaking, that exists to separate one psychological unit from another. There are differences between psychological units, and you concentrate upon these differences. Nevertheless one man's dreams affect another's, and that man is in turn affected by the dreams of his neighbor.
quotes.translation: 如我所说，存在一种化学必要性，使做梦成为必然。但这些梦反过来又影响整体人格，并影响该人格在物质宇宙中的行为。不言而喻，心电感应运作于梦境状态，其效率与个体清醒时一样高。在清醒状态下，它潜意识地运作。但总的来说，任何时候都不存在界限来分隔不同的心理单元。心理单元之间存在差异，而你专注于这些差异。然而，一个人的梦会影响另一个人的梦，而那个人又受到邻居梦境的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Understanding of these conflicts will go a long way to ease the symptoms. The stiff neck, when it occurs--the neck quite literally expresses the rigidity of attitude. It is easier for him to withdraw than it appears. In this case, however, the subconscious recognized the danger and symbolically expressed through the organism, the ego's intent. The symptoms therefore were therapeutic in nature, in that their purpose was the solving of the dilemma.
quotes.translation: 理解这些冲突将大大有助于缓解症状。当落枕发生时——脖子实际上表达了态度的僵化。对他来说，退缩比看起来更容易。然而，在这种情况下，潜意识识别出危险，并通过有机体象征性地表达了自我的意图。因此，这些症状本质上是治疗性的，因为它们的目的是解决这个两难困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are here in what you call the subconscious, abilities and realities of which you know little, and as you see how the subconscious projects itself into other dimensions, so will you see more clearly how energy is projected outward to form your own world of matter. There is much here to be explained.
quotes.translation: 在你们所谓的潜意识中，存在着你们知之甚少的能力与实相，当你们看到潜意识如何投射自身进入其他维度时，你们也将更清晰地看见能量如何向外投射以形成你们自己的物质世界。此处有许多尚待解释之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is quite capable of handling the situation in such a manner. This may seem like a double censure, but it is in all cases the intangible element, the aggressiveness itself, that is important, and not the person or persons toward whom the individual may decide to vent the aggressiveness.
quotes.translation: 潜意识完全有能力以这种方式处理情况。这看似双重谴责，但在所有情况下，无形的元素——即攻击性本身——才是重要的，而非个体可能决定发泄攻击性的对象或人群。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The poetry allows for fullest possible creative expression in the full meaning of the word, art. It also siphons off, expresses and uses subconscious desires and Moods and repressions, thus freeing the channels of the personal subconscious so that those deeper areas can find expression in psychic work.
quotes.translation: 诗歌允许在"艺术"一词的完整意义上实现最充分的创造性表达。它同时疏导、表达并运用潜意识的欲望、情绪与压抑，从而解放个人潜意识的通道，使那些更深层的领域得以在灵性工作中获得表达。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is an instant calculator that can tell you your relative position. It is this portion of the self that initiates many of the creative ideas that seem to spring from the subconscious. These will always appear through the subconscious, but the original concepts originate with this portion of the self.
quotes.translation: 它是一台能告知你相对位置的即时计算器。正是自我的这一部分启动了诸多看似源自潜意识的创意构想。这些构想总会通过潜意识显现，但原始概念却源于自我的这一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When the ego is of such a rigid nature that it distorts physical reality out of all context, then however the personality had better rely upon the subconscious even in this respect, for the subconscious will at least perceive those elements of physical reality that immediately threaten the whole self.
quotes.translation: 当自我具有如此僵化的本质，以至于扭曲物质实相至完全脱离语境时，那么人格最好在这方面也依赖潜意识，因为潜意识至少能感知到那些即刻威胁整体自我的物质实相要素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. The inner self and the subconscious are not present in the physical universe, insofar as they take up no space within it. They exist within the electrical system. They affect the physical system and operate closely allied with it. Nevertheless they will not be found within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自我与潜意识并不存在于物质宇宙中，因为它们在其中不占据任何空间。它们存在于电性系统内。它们影响物质系统，并与物质系统紧密协作运作。然而，它们不会在物质系统中被找到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner senses deal with what actually is. The inner senses are the carriers of our fuel, that is, they can be likened to the various cars of our imaginary train. It takes some doing to be aware of this fuel, since it is so instantly transformed by the outer senses into the stuff of camouflage. The process involved is subconscious. You can hardly catch yourself at it, and yet with training you will be able to catch yourself in the act.
quotes.translation: 内在感官处理的是真实存在的事物。内在感官是我们燃料的载体，也就是说，它们可以被比作我们想象中的火车的各个车厢。要意识到这种燃料需要费些功夫，因为它会立即被外在感官转化为伪装物质。这个过程是潜意识的。你几乎无法捕捉到它，但通过训练，你将能够在它发生时抓住自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They were mine definitely. No control personality for example of any kind. But where I got the words; or what inner translations happened before I spoke them, I don't know. I wasn't aware of the original perceptions, in other words. There was no hesitancy and little groping around. Giving test data in the sessions, there are translations that I make and I am careful, trying to interpret what I get; here, the interpretations were already made; at a subconscious level? Presumably.
quotes.translation: 它们绝对是我的。例如，没有任何控制人格。但我是从哪里得到这些词语的；或者说在我说出它们之前发生了什么内在翻译，我不知道。换句话说，我没有意识到最初的感知。没有犹豫，也很少摸索。在课程中提供测试数据时，我会进行翻译并小心翼翼，试图解读我得到的信息；在这里，翻译已经完成了；是在潜意识层面吗？大概是吧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Today at 9.40 AM a telegram from Anne Healy informed me that Blanche Price died early today. I quit work at 10, did psy-time, trying to contact Blanche with no results. Then tried to sleep, thinking that it might be easier for her if I were in a dream state. Had difficulty falling asleep, wasn't sleepy and at 11 decided to forget about it. Instead fell to sleep at once to have the following strange dream. I think it is a therapeutic one; I have been requesting one from the subconscious. It involves some projection, I think, and is one of those dreams where I was now and then aware of my dreaming condition. I've forgotten some of it, and am not sure of some of the early sequence.
quotes.translation: 今天上午9点40分，安妮·希利发来电报，告诉我布兰奇·普莱斯今天早些时候去世了。我10点停止工作，做了心理时间练习，试图联系布兰奇但没有结果。然后试图睡觉，想着如果我在梦境状态中，对她来说可能更容易些。很难入睡，不困，11点决定不去想这件事。反而立刻睡着了，做了以下奇怪的梦。我认为这是一个治疗性的梦；我一直向潜意识请求一个这样的梦。我认为它涉及一些投射，是那种我时不时意识到自己在做梦的梦。我忘记了一些部分，也不确定早期的一些顺序。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It may be significant that such distractions did not bother him until he read that they were supposed to. There is a reason also in that a deeper state of consciousness is sometimes needed when the upper level of his subconscious is concerned, as it still is since he gave notice at the gallery.
quotes.translation: 值得注意的是，直到他读到这些干扰应该会困扰他时，它们才开始困扰他。还有一个原因是，当涉及到他潜意识的较高层次时，有时需要更深层的意识状态，因为他从画廊辞职后，这个层次仍然存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The final culmination of the dream, when he did scream and run away, represented his subconscious giving him its solution. The position was threatening because it represented a possible dilution of his energies from his main objective of writing, into a superficial ego satisfaction, which would have left him basically not only unsatisfied but personally betrayed.
quotes.translation: 梦的最终高潮，当他真的尖叫并逃跑时，代表了他的潜意识给了他解决方案。这个情况具有威胁性，因为它代表了他的能量可能从写作的主要目标中被稀释，转向肤浅的自我满足，这最终不仅会让他不满足，还会让他感到个人背叛。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The mind will be found to be closely allied with the spacious present. The mind's capabilities, if studied, would lead man into a realization of these other fields of actuality of which I have spoken. The mind deals with intangibles, but it does not deal with unrealities. Again, the validity of an actuality is not to be determined by its appearance within matter alone. The ingredients of matter are first of all intangible ingredients, and the study of the mind and a study of the processes by which the mind creates its dream images could lead to a basic understanding of the manner in which man subconsciously produces the physical images of his own material universe.
quotes.translation: 心智将被发现与广阔现在紧密相连。如果研究心智的能力，将引导人类认识到我所说的这些其他现实领域。心智处理无形之物，但它不处理虚幻之物。再次强调，现实的有效性不能仅由其出现在物质中来决定。物质的成分首先是无形的成分，而对心智的研究以及心智创造梦境意象的过程的研究，可以导致对人类潜意识产生其物质宇宙的物理意象的方式的基本理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Therefore, to some extent we are part of one vast sphere of action; and it is relatively more easy, therefore, for us to communicate. You in particular, Joseph, can benefit through the development of an easy access of communication with your own personal subconscious. Our Ruburt is indeed at times heavy-handed. At times he badgers you, but his remarks concerning the importance and indeed the strength of joy, should be well taken.
quotes.translation: 因此，在某种程度上，我们是同一个广阔行动领域的一部分；因此，我们进行沟通相对更容易。特别是你，约瑟夫，可以通过发展与你个人潜意识轻松沟通的途径而受益。我们的鲁柏有时确实过于强硬。有时他会唠叨你，但他关于喜悦的重要性乃至力量的言论，应当好好听取。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When you understand that basically all are one, and that in actuality there are no limitations between self and not-self, then these facts will not bother you. It also of course works the other way, so that when an individual feels energy- depleted, he does subconsciously, and by the same sort of process, drain off reserves from nonidentity molecular sources.
quotes.translation: 当你明白本质上万物一体，实际上自我与非我之间并无界限时，这些事实就不会困扰你。当然，反之亦然，所以当一个人感到能量枯竭时，他也会潜意识地通过同样的过程，从非身份性的分子来源汲取储备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is also possible that these secondary personalities, emerging, give access to buried abilities and benign constructive abilities which had been buried beneath heavier fears that weighed them down. In any case this level represents the last division of what we may call the present personal subconscious, and still only accounts for a small dimension of the inner self, being composed of only the most easily accessible portions.
quotes.translation: 这些次人格浮现时，也可能让人接触到被更沉重的恐惧压抑的、深埋的才能与良性建设性能力。无论如何，这个层次代表了我们所谓当前个人潜意识的最后划分，且仍只占内在自我的一小部分维度，仅由最容易触及的部分组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The similarity here may not be easy for you to perceive, because of the diverse emotions with which you view childhood and old age. Nevertheless the child, to an unrealized degree, is free of the environmental necessities of his existence. Even while he molds and is molded by his environment, a part of his psyche is still uninvolved. His subconscious, on an uppermost personal level, is concerned with infantile fears of course.
quotes.translation: 此处相似性可能不易察觉，因为你以不同的情感看待童年与老年。然而，儿童在未意识到的程度上，是脱离其生存环境之必需性的。即使他在塑造环境并被环境塑造时，其心灵的一部分仍保持超然。他的潜意识，在最表层的个人层面上，自然涉及婴儿期的恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （I was so angry that I did the whole thing over again. Lepanto is a four-page poem. This time the performance was about like the second one, already recorded. Perhaps if I feel subjectively right about doing it again, I may try it tonight. I don't know where the volume comes from, the deep manlike tones. Perhaps it is what actors call merely projection, breathing from the diaphragm. I wasn't conscious of breathing any differently than usual, but if this was a subconscious production that wouldn't make any difference. But where would the male aspect enter, unless it be a woman's attempt to mimic as best she could the voice of a man she had admired?
quotes.translation: （我气得把整件事重做了一遍。《勒班陀》是一首四页的诗。这次的表现大约和第二次已录制的差不多。也许若我感觉主观上适合重录，今晚会再试一次。我不知道那音量从何而来，那深沉的男性声调。或许这就是演员所谓的投射，用横膈膜呼吸。我并未意识到呼吸与平时有何不同，但若这是潜意识产物，那也无所谓。但男性特质从何而来，除非是女性尽力模仿她所仰慕男性的声音？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The information is sifted often through the dreaming self to the subconscious, which has intimate knowledge of the ego with which it is closely connected. The subconscious makes its own value judgments here, and passes these on to the ego. But then the ego must come to its own decision.
quotes.translation: 信息常通过做梦的自我筛选至潜意识，而潜意识对与之紧密相连的自我了如指掌。潜意识在此做出自身的价值判断，并将这些判断传递给自我。但随后自我必须做出自己的决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: At times the ego can hold you in a tight vice, which the dissociation breaks. This is what happened after your exercises. You have been doing very well, for you, in allowing yourself psychic freedom. However conscious fears cause the ego to tighten its grasp and some effects of this nature were starting up again. This is why I suggested that you begin these exercises now. The fact that the fearful ego was beginning to tighten explains your reaction to the exercises. The ego can build up around the subconscious vitality like a glacier, and these exercises melt it away. Even the prickles in your neck are like tiny picks chipping away at icy fears.
quotes.translation: 有时自我能像铁钳般紧紧钳制你，而解离状态能打破这种束缚。这正是你练习后发生的情况。就你而言，你在允许自己获得心灵自由方面做得很好。然而有意识的恐惧会让自我收紧掌控，这类性质的某些影响又开始显现。这就是我建议你现在开始这些练习的原因。恐惧的自我开始收紧这一事实，解释了你对练习的反应。自我能像冰川般堆积在潜意识活力周围，而这些练习能融化它。就连你脖子上的刺痛感，都像细小的冰镐在凿开冰封的恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You found out later and felt somewhat at fault. In the dream the lads present mother is seen to comfort you, this being a way to relieve the past uneasiness that at a certain subconscious area still lingers. At the time the lad was in his very early thirties, but you were much younger.
quotes.translation: 你后来发现了这一点，并感到有些自责。在梦中，那位青年的母亲出现并安慰你，这是为了缓解过去的不安——它在某个潜意识区域仍挥之不去。当时那位青年刚过三十岁，而你要年轻得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The dream objects, then, are so cunningly, and if I may say so, almost slyly chosen, that the simplest of them may refer to instances in this existence, to personally subconsciously desired or feared objects or instances, to desired or feared objects or instances in past lives. They, such dream objects, may be the method or means with which the inner self warns the personality of future possible disappointments or disasters.
quotes.translation: 梦境对象的选择如此巧妙，若容我说，甚至近乎狡黠，以至于最简单的梦境对象可能指向此生的事件、个人潜意识中渴望或恐惧的对象或事件、以及前世中渴望或恐惧的对象或事件。这些梦境对象，可能是内在自我警告人格未来可能出现的失望或灾难的方法或手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The situations had changed but the ego framework had grown rigid, rigid enough so that it could in a large degree dominate certain normally subconscious processes, bringing forth the physical symptoms. Now there is always an imprinting process within the personality, belonging to past experience. A previous inclination to gluttony had once led him to some slight gout, and in the present case there was a swelling of the feet.
quotes.translation: 情境已然改变，但自我框架已变得僵化——僵化到能在很大程度上支配某些通常属于潜意识的过程，从而引发身体症状。人格内部始终存在一个印记过程，属于过往经验。先前贪食的倾向曾导致他轻微痛风，而当前案例中则出现了脚部肿胀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is indeed more fluid and resilient than the ego. It is the failure of the ego to listen to the inner voice of the subconscious that causes many difficulties. The ego would wish the subconscious out of existence. It does not want a partner. It wants to master the entire personality.
quotes.translation: 它确实比自我更具流动性与弹性。正是自我未能倾听潜意识的内在声音，才导致诸多困难。自我恨不得潜意识不复存在。它不想要伙伴。它想主宰整个人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is not the cause or the carrier of hatreds. The difficulty here is of an ego's refusal to assimilate subconscious experience.
quotes.translation: 潜意识并非仇恨的起因或载体。这里的困难在于自我拒绝吸收潜意识经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A state of dissociation is necessary, a letting down of egotistical barriers in order that inner symbolisms can be appreciated and distinguished. The change of focus alone will aid in intuitional enlightenment, and association can then rise more easily through the subconscious areas.
quotes.translation: 解离状态是必要的，放下自我屏障，以便内在象征得以被辨识与欣赏。仅凭焦点的转移就能助益直觉启迪，而联想也能更轻易地经由潜意识领域浮现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The experiences at these various levels may be interpreted symbolically. They may appear in the form of fantasy, fiction, or art work, without the conscious self realizing their origin. Now at any of these various stages of consciousness, other phenomena may also be perceived -- thought-forms for example, energy manifestations, projections from the personal subconscious, and projections from the collective unconscious. Any or all of these may take symbolic form, and may appear beneficial or threatening according to the attitude of the personality involved. They should be regarded as quite natural phenomena, often neutral in intent.
quotes.translation: 这些不同层次的体验可能以象征形式被解读。它们可能以幻想、虚构或艺术作品的形式呈现，而意识自我却未察觉其源头。在意识的任何这些不同阶段，也可能感知到其他现象——例如思想形态、能量显化、个人潜意识的投射，以及集体无意识的投射。这些现象中的任何一种或全部都可能采取象征形式，并根据涉及人格的态度而显得有益或具有威胁性。它们应被视为相当自然的现象，通常意图中立。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Looking back, you can say that this effect was therapeutic, but if you had subconsciously accepted the images it would have marked the beginning of a severe deterioration for you both personally and creatively. Again, the images marked the critical culmination of your destructive energies. The fact that the images were of yourselves shows that your destruction was turned inward even though materialized in the outer world.
quotes.translation: 回顾过去，你可以说这种效果具有疗愈性，但如果你潜意识地接受了这些意象，那将标志着你在个人与创作层面严重恶化的开端。再次强调，这些意象标志着你破坏性能量的关键性顶点。这些意象源自你们自身的事实表明，即便在外在世界中物质化，你们的破坏性仍是向内转向的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a self-conscious portion of the whole self. It is called subconscious because the ego as a rule is not conscious of it.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是整体自体中有自我意识的部分。它之所以被称为潜意识，是因为自我通常对其没有意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It may indeed sound like an oversimplification. However, you are exactly what you think you are, and every thought is mirrored in the physical matter of the human organism. This does not happen by some sort of occult magic. It is not the result of some mumbo jumbo. Since each individual creates subconsciously the physical matter of his own image, then it follows that the condition of this image is his own responsibility.
quotes.translation: 这听起来确实像是过度简化。然而，你正是你所认为的自己，每一个念头都映照在人类有机体的物质中。这并非通过某种神秘魔法发生，也不是某种胡言乱语的结果。既然每个个体都潜意识地创造自身形象的物质，那么这一形象的状态便是其自身的责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The very fact that you breathe and dream and perform countless other activities without any aid from the conscious ego should of itself convince even the most stubborn scientific skull that more is involved than science is willing to admit. The idea of the subconscious mind is merely a grudging, hedging, partial admission that man is more than the conscious ego, more than the sum of his parts, and more than a mechanism.
quotes.translation: 你无需意识自我的任何协助就能呼吸、做梦并执行无数其他活动，这一事实本身应足以说服最顽固的科学头脑：其中涉及的科学不愿承认的更多层面。潜意识心智的概念不过是一种勉强、回避、部分的承认——承认人类远不止是意识自我，远不止是其各部分的总和，也远不止是一台机器。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I cannot simply appear in your midst, or make myself known in my own form. I have explained camouflage patterns to you, I have explained the way the vitality or stuff of the universe changes from plane to plane. Then why do you find it strange that at your end I must to some degree change essence, and find a point of entry, which happens to be Ruburt's subconscious? It has enough camouflage pattern to enable me to make contact, but not so much as to distort me out of all recognition. I have described the effects of entry into your plane of the so-called flying saucers, and my entry into your plane is something of the same.
quotes.translation: 我无法直接以我的本来面目出现在你们中间，或让你们认识我。我曾向你们解释过伪装模式，也解释过宇宙的生命力或物质如何在不同层面间转化。那么，为何你们会对我必须在一定程度上改变本质，并找到一个切入点——恰好是鲁柏的潜意识——感到奇怪呢？它拥有足够的伪装模式让我建立联系，但又不会多到将我扭曲得面目全非。我曾描述过所谓飞碟进入你们层面的效应，而我进入你们层面也有类似之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego has experienced, then, objectivity, and has returned to a subjective state. It is a relative storehouse of energy, and it is capable of aiding the outer ego when certain conditions arise. The inner ego may be termed the unfamiliar "I". In many cases it is the I who dreams, bringing valuable information to the personal subconscious, information that may be then used for the benefit of the outer ego itself.
quotes.translation: 内在自我因此体验过客观性，并回归到主观状态。它是一个相对的能量储存库，当特定条件出现时，能够协助外在自我。内在自我可被称为陌生的“我”。在许多情况下，是那个“我”在做梦，将宝贵的信息带给个人潜意识，这些信息随后可被用于外在自我本身的利益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, I do not see you, as a rule, as a series of separate compartments, but rather more in your entirety. It is therefore difficult for me to make distinctions as to your conscious intent and subconscious intent. And in many cases your subconscious intent comes through strongly.
quotes.translation: 通常，我并不将你们视为一系列分隔的区块，而是更倾向于从整体上看待你们。因此，我很难区分你们的有意识意图和潜意识意图。在许多情况下，你们的潜意识意图会强烈地显现出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It has changed, in other words, as far as pattern is concerned. New patterns are formed, groupings of intensities that will be meaningful to various levels of the personality. To make such data meaningful to the conscious self requires other steps of subconscious interpretation that actually have to do with an electrical regrouping and realignment.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，就模式而言，它已经改变了。新的模式形成，各种强度的组合将对人格的不同层面具有意义。要使这类数据对意识自我有意义，需要其他步骤的潜意识诠释，这些诠释实际上与电性重组和重新调整有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now during the dream drama the inner self may focus at various, or at one of various subconscious areas which it uses as a point of departure. This area, whichever one it may be, will be the one in which the main dream sequence originates and in which the dream activity occurs.
quotes.translation: 在梦境戏剧中，内在自我可能聚焦于它用作出发点的各个潜意识区域，或其中之一。无论这个区域是哪一个，它都将是主要梦境序列的起源地，也是梦境活动发生之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As far as distance, physical distance, is concerned, this whole idea is subconsciously taken into consideration. That which appears ahead of you in distance, and has not yet been experienced, under usual circumstances has not yet entered the psychic space of inner environment. When you reach this imaginary physical experience, and if you are emotionally involved in it, then it becomes the PRESENT, in capital letters.
quotes.translation: 就距离，物理距离而言，整个概念在潜意识中已被考虑在内。在你前方距离中显现、尚未被体验的事物，在通常情况下尚未进入内在环境的心理空间。当你到达这个想象性的物理体验，并且情感上投入其中时，它便成为大写加粗的“当下”。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I will here suggest that the term "subconscious layer" has served its purpose, and in its place we will refer to "subconscious areas."
quotes.translation: 我在此建议，“潜意识层”这个术语已完成其使命，我们将改用“潜意识区域”来指代它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The physical body is therefore an attribute of consciousness. The atoms and molecules possess a self-consciousness to some degree, as well as a generalized consciousness. The self awareness of a human being is partially composed of the combination of self aware individual atoms and molecules that compose it. The generalized consciousness which you call the subconscious, is composed of the combination of generalized consciousness from the individual cells and molecules, but now we come down to the source of the self aware conscious individual behind or within each molecule. Where did it come from to begin with?
quotes.translation: 因此，物质身体是意识的一种属性。原子和分子在一定程度上拥有自我意识，同时也具备一种普遍意识。人类的自我觉知部分由构成它的、具有自我意识的个体原子和分子的组合所组成。你们称之为潜意识的普遍意识，则由个体细胞和分子的普遍意识组合而成。但现在，我们追溯到每个分子背后或内部那个具有自我觉知的意识个体的源头——它最初从何而来？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Usually his aggressive feelings are automatically sublimated into his work. He grapples with ideas and with words. The destructive energy however found no outlet. It therefore took the point of least resistance, and he quite subconsciously of course projected it upon his pet. It was not that he actually focused the energy purposely upon the cat, merely that the cat's spongelike psychic nature received it full force.
quotes.translation: 通常，他的攻击性情感会自动升华到工作中。他与思想和文字搏斗。然而，破坏性能量却找不到出口。于是它选择了阻力最小的路径，他当然在潜意识中将其投射到他的宠物身上。并非他刻意将能量对准那只猫，只是猫海绵般的灵性本质全盘接收了这股力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: (To John:) you do not feel free to move. Symbolically you do not feel that you have freedom of motion, and you are expressing this through the body mechanism. You did indeed shake yourself up when you decided to put your smoking aside, but this was simply because you felt subconsciously a loss. The smoking to some extent had been used by you as a method of giving yourself comfort, a way of giving yourself pleasure.
quotes.translation: （对约翰说：）你感觉无法自由移动。象征性地，你觉得自己没有行动的自由，并通过身体机制表达这一点。当你决定戒烟时，确实让自己动荡不安，但这仅仅是因为你在潜意识中感到一种失落。吸烟在某种程度上被你用作一种自我安慰的方式，一种给自己愉悦的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If Philip did not already have a familiarity with me in these sessions, it would have been very difficult for me to have made my voice clear to him. It also happened that I was speaking in warning, and therefore his own subconscious was willing to let the contact take place.
quotes.translation: 如果菲利普在这些课程中对我还不熟悉，我很难让我的声音清晰地传达给他。同时，我说话时带有警告意味，因此他自己的潜意识也愿意让这次接触发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Your Freud and Jung have probed into the outer, personal subconscious. Jung saw glimpses of other depths, but that is all. There are rather unfortunate distortions occurring in Jung's writings, as well as in Freud's, since they did not understand the primary, cooperative nature of the libido. We will involve ourselves in a much more thorough study along these lines, as we come to another body of subject material.
quotes.translation: 你们的弗洛伊德和荣格曾探索过外在的、个人的潜意识。荣格瞥见了其他深度的存在，但也仅此而已。荣格和弗洛伊德的著作中都存在相当不幸的扭曲，因为他们不了解力比多的首要合作性质。当我们进入另一组主题材料时，我们将沿着这些线索进行更深入的研究。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These mass suggestions include not only those given to him by others, both verbally and telepathically, but also those suggestions that he has given to himself while in the waking or dream states. If individual A is in a period of despondency, then this is because he has already become prey to negative suggestions of his own and others. If now you see him and think that he looks miserable--or that he is an incurable drunk--then indeed these suggestions are picked up by him subconsciously though you have not spoken a word, and in his already weakened condition, they will be accepted and acted upon.
quotes.translation: 这些群体暗示不仅包括他人以口头或心电感应方式给予他的暗示，也包括他在清醒或梦境中给予自己的暗示。如果个体A正处于沮丧期，那是因为他已沦为自身及他人负面暗示的猎物。此刻你若见他并认为他神情凄苦——或认定他是无可救药的酒鬼——那么这些暗示虽未出口，却会被他的潜意识接收，在他已然脆弱的状态下被接纳并付诸行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This transformation of energy should be quite comprehensible since you know that you subconsciously transform energy into physical, mental, creative or psychological states, manipulating it to your advantage. I have used the word "particle" to explain those units which are gateways and yet boundaries. While many are particles, this is only because they can be said to fall within the framework of your definition.
quotes.translation: 这种能量转化应当不难理解，因为你已知晓自己潜意识中将能量转化为生理、心智、创造或心理状态，并善加运用。我使用"粒子"一词来解释那些既是门户又是界限的单位。虽然许多单位可称为粒子，但这仅因它们符合你认知框架的定义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (I have seen tables move a few times before, including the much heavier green table referred to in the session, but still find the movement of furniture weird when it be begins, since none of us were making any obvious, overt attempts to move said table. It is quite easy to touch one's fingertips to the tabletop, and thus verify that no strong physical pressure is being exerted thereon, even subconsciously; especially when the touch is light enough so that the fingertips slide about, as ours did. We constantly checked each other, also watching our feet. This is easy to do with a small table.
quotes.translation: （我曾数次目睹桌子移动，包括那次课程中提及的沉重绿桌，但家具开始移动时仍觉诡异，因我们无人明显刻意推动该桌。指尖轻触桌面即可确认并无强力施压——即便潜意识层面亦然；尤其当指尖如我们般轻滑而过时更易验证。我们不断相互检查，同时留意脚下。对小桌而言这轻而易举。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It should be emphasized however that dream experiences can have a more lasting and vital effect upon the personality than many so-called physical experiences, for the dream experiences are not blocked nearly as much as waking experience is blocked. The suggestion that also occurs within the dream state works even more effectively upon the whole personality than any suggestion works under ordinary circumstances. And dreams certainly do contain suggestions, and they are reacted to by the personality, not only on a subconscious basis and a psychological basis, but they affect the whole system.
quotes.translation: 然而必须强调：梦境体验对人格的影响比许多所谓现实体验更持久且关键，因为梦境体验受到的阻碍远少于清醒体验。梦境中产生的暗示对整体人格的作用效力，远超寻常情境下的任何暗示。梦境确实蕴含暗示，人格不仅会在潜意识与心理层面回应这些暗示，更会牵动整个系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: 当人类领悟到自己正在创造当下形象时，便不会惊异于自身在其他时空创造其他形象。唯有以此为基础，轮回概念才能获得自然效力；唯有理解潜意识特定层面是连接今生人格与往昔人格的纽带，轮回理论才会被接纳为事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It could still do this and retain its own nature, merely by allowing into its awareness the reality of other actions as a part of its self-image. There is for example no basic reason why the subconscious and the ego cannot communicate to a much larger extent than is now usual. Such communication would result in the acceptance of additional energy and action by the ego, and an expansion of the ego's self-image.
quotes.translation: 它仍可保持本性，只需将其他实相纳入自我意象的认知范畴。例如潜意识与自我本可进行远超现今常态的沟通，这并无根本障碍。此类沟通将使自我接纳更多能量与行动，从而扩展自我的自我意象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Some difficulty lies in the inner psychological relationship between the husband and the wife--an inner issue she does not face, and reacts to the issue in physical terms. The issue itself is based partially in her own relationship to both her mother and father. That is, the issue is frightening subconsciously, because of peculiar and individual attitudes caused by her own relationship to her parents. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 困难部分在于夫妻之间的内在心理关系——一个她不愿面对的内在问题，并以身体症状来回应。这个问题部分源于她与父母双方的关系。也就是说，由于她与父母关系所导致的独特个人态度，这个问题在潜意识层面令人恐惧。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Historical knowledge and verifications of identity--identities--may be achieved through communication with those layers of the subconscious dealing with past lives. But no information may be gathered here that was unknown to the particular previous personality as a rule. Some particularly girted may use one of these levels as a focus point, looking outward even to the present personality, but this is unusual.
quotes.translation: 通过与处理前世记忆的潜意识层面沟通，可以获得历史知识并验证身份认同。但通常而言，任何信息都不可能超出特定前世人格已知的范围。某些天赋异禀者可能以这些层面之一为焦点，甚至向外观察当前人格，但这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: My heartiest regards. Advances are being made that will begin to show themselves rather clearly. Ruburt was correct as far as he went, in describing the way in which he received the information regarding the roof. This is also something quite new. We will attempt to mix it also with visual data. It will serve finally to round out and pinpoint information more concisely. I will briefly discuss this particular point at our next session. It regards a method of perception that you use subconsciously but never recognize--a sense that is something like the way you register temperature.
quotes.translation: 我致以最诚挚的问候。某些进展即将相当清晰地显现出来。鲁柏在描述他接收屋顶相关信息的方式时，就他所知的部分是正确的。这也是某种全新的事物。我们将尝试将其与视觉数据结合。最终它将更精确地完善和定位信息。在下节课我会简要讨论这个特定要点。这涉及一种你们在潜意识中使用却从未察觉的感知方式——一种类似感知温度的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It was however I'd as quite sincere curiosity, and her open-minded willingness to perceive, that subconsciously caused Ruburt to agree to the session. The rapport existing as a rule between twins, and that does indeed exist, between Loriza, L-o-r-i-z-a and her twin （sister.）, goes far to account for Loriza's latent intuitive, but partial, inner comprehension of the elements that work within, say, telepathy.
quotes.translation: 正是出于相当真诚的好奇心，以及她开放包容的感知意愿，才使鲁柏在潜意识层面同意进行这节课程。双胞胎之间通常存在的和谐关系——在洛莉莎（L-o-r-i-z-a）与她的双胞胎姐妹之间确实存在——很大程度上解释了洛莉莎对心灵感应等内在运作要素所具有的潜在直觉性、但片面的内在理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ideas originate always from individuals on any plane, and under any circumstance. The ideas once originated, however, are given energy reality by the individual and therefore attain a vitality of their own. The ideas are picked up by the subconscious through a telepathic communication. They do not however have to be picked up directly from one mind, that is, there does not have to be direct communication.
quotes.translation: 在任何层面、任何情况下，观念始终源于个体。然而观念一旦产生，便由个体赋予能量实相，从而获得自身生命力。这些观念通过心灵感应沟通被潜意识接收。但它们不必直接从一个心智中获取，也就是说，不必存在直接沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is however usually operating at subconscious levels, and without either knowledge or intent as far as the conscious mind is concerned. To be able to bring these natural but subconscious forces at all under any domination by the conscious mind is a terrific task.
quotes.translation: 然而它通常运作于潜意识层面，就意识心智而言既无认知也无意图。要让意识心智能够掌控这些自然但潜意识的能量，是一项艰巨的任务。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: And in the same way that the dream world has no beginning or end, neither does the universe with which you are familiar. No energy can be withdrawn, and this includes the energy used in the continuous subconscious construction of the dream world. You continually create it, have always created it. It is a product of your own existence, and you can neither consciously call it into existence nor destroy it.
quotes.translation: 正如梦境世界无始无终，你所熟悉的宇宙也是如此。没有任何能量可以被撤回，这包括用于持续潜意识构建梦境世界的能量。你不断创造它，一直创造它。它是你自身存在的产物，你既无法有意识地召唤它存在，也无法摧毁它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The survival personality therefore momentarily inserts his ego in its old position. It can then interpret this data in terms that can be received and understood. This reassembly however does cause some disorientation on the part of the survival personality. The ego, back in its dominant position, finds the circumstances difficult to deal with. It is being asked to manipulate in a manner unfamiliar to it. The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego concepts in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence.
quotes.translation: 因此，存续人格会暂时将它的自我置回原先的位置。这样它就能以可接收和理解的方式解读这些数据。然而，这种重组确实会导致存续人格产生某种迷失感。自我回到主导位置后，发现难以应对当前处境。它被要求以不熟悉的方式进行操控。存续人格的内在自我将概念传递给这个重组后的自我，方式往往如同在物质存在中潜意识将概念传递给自我一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is true however to say that the memories of the physically-oriented ego take their place with memories that were once subconscious. I am speaking now of the psychological makeup of the survival personality. The memories remain in physical existence. There is no real distinction between psychological reality and physical reality. The physically-oriented ego manufactures this distinction of necessity.
quotes.translation: 然而，可以确切地说，以物质为导向的自我的记忆，与曾经属于潜意识的记忆并存。我现在谈论的是存续人格的心理构成。这些记忆保留在物质存在中。心理现实与物质现实之间并无真正区别。以物质为导向的自我出于必要制造了这种区别。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a property of the mind, and is to a strong degree independent of camouflage. You must of course understand that these terms are for convenience only. In many cases there is no division between them, and I speak often for convenience's sake.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是心灵的一种属性，在很大程度上独立于伪装。当然，你必须明白这些术语仅为方便而用。在许多情况下，它们之间并无划分，我常为方便起见而如此表述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: （Seth told Bill and Peggy, in connection with the subconscious construction of their individual worlds, that they really lived in many worlds at once. At the end of the session Seth told the Gallaghers he had deliberately given the information about Bill's mother being a bookkeeper and liking the color blue, in order to show them that valid information had been produced, no matter what its source.
quotes.translation: （赛斯告诉比尔和佩吉，关于他们各自世界的潜意识构建，他们实际上同时生活在许多世界中。课程结束时，赛斯告诉加拉格尔夫妇，他故意提供了比尔母亲曾是簿记员且喜欢蓝色的信息，以向他们展示无论信息来源为何，有效信息都已产生。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is quite amazing that any legitimate data got through, and little did. There was a complete subconscious refusal to interpret the data, and a complete reversal in this case. For instead of the gun, which to Ruburt signifies destruction, purposeful destruction, you have the distortion of the eagle shape on the gun label, into a woman and child image, signifying of course creativity in this case.
quotes.translation: 任何合法数据能通过都相当令人惊讶，而实际通过的很少。这里存在完全的潜意识拒绝解读数据，以及完全的逆转。因为在这个案例中，原本象征毁灭、有目的毁灭的枪，被扭曲成枪标签上的鹰形图案，进而变成女人和孩子的形象，在此案例中自然象征着创造力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your father would like to kick at old cars, for he felt that they defied him since they worked improperly. More than this however, both of your parents still feel that a car is a symbol of social status, and you grew up with this. When your cars were new you felt at one with them. But an old car brings back the old struggles between your parents, and it is precisely here that subconsciously you and Ruburt do not agree. He gladly settles on an old car--anything that moves will do. But to you the old car has not meant freedom, but imperfection.
quotes.translation: 你父亲总想踹那些旧车，因为他觉得这些车不好好运转是在跟他作对。不仅如此，你父母至今仍认为汽车是社会地位的象征，你就是在这样的观念中长大的。当你的车是新车时，你与它融为一体。但旧车会唤起你父母之间过去的争执，而正是在这一点上，你和鲁柏在潜意识层面存在分歧。他乐于接受旧车——能动就行。但对你而言，旧车不代表自由，而是不完美。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Basically she was not ready for marriage. Beside this her marriage had a deeply symbolic, frightening connotation that was deeply hidden. She felt that marriage was a trap--the trap again, you see, and that it was a hampering of freedom. At the time this deeply held subconscious contribution has nothing to do with her husband.
quotes.translation: 她本质上并未准备好结婚。除此之外，她的婚姻带有一种深藏不露的、极具象征意义的恐惧内涵。她感觉婚姻是个陷阱——你看，又是陷阱——是对自由的束缚。当时这种深植于潜意识的认知与她丈夫毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The half-hour schedule will allow for a disciplined, smooth and automatic self-discovery which will not drain your energies. You have indeed additional energy at your command, but the focus in the personal subconscious prevents you from using it. You will find that your condition is now improving and will continue to do so. And all of this also involves a practical lesson in the nature of action.
quotes.translation: 半小时的日程安排将带来自律、流畅且自动化的自我发现，不会消耗你的能量。你确实有额外的能量可供调遣，但个人潜意识中的焦点阻碍了你运用它。你会发现自己的状况正在改善并将持续如此。而这一切也涉及关于行动本质的实践课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As energy flows through your field and appears within it, it does so according to its own inherent nature. This nature of energy, believe it or not, includes individualization and consciousness. Therefore, if you will for a moment think of bits of energy, or consciousness, initially without definite form, entering your physical plane, then according to the innate strength and capacity of any given particle it will, on entering your plane, on its own subconscious level already know how small or large a physical pattern it can form.
quotes.translation: 当能量流经你的场域并在其中显现时，它遵循自身固有的本质。信不信由你，这种能量本质包含个体化与意识。因此，若你暂且想象那些最初无固定形态的能量微粒或意识进入物质层面，那么根据每个粒子的先天强度与能力，它在进入物质层面时，在其自身的潜意识层面就已经知晓自己能形成何等大小的物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When I speak of levels of the subconscious, I do so only for simplicity's sake, since there is after all no top or bottom to the mind, but only a present point of focus from which viewpoints may be taken, and new perspectives formed. It is theoretically possible, for example, to change the focus, to delve downward as it were two lives back, and look upward from that perspective to the present.
quotes.translation: 我谈及潜意识层次仅为简便起见，因为心灵终究没有上下之分，只有当下的焦点，由此可采取不同视角并形成新的观点。例如理论上可以改变焦点，仿佛向下潜入两世之前，再从那视角向上观望至当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Computer like, the data is instantly made available exactly when and where it is needed. The ego is indeed equipped to handle physical reality. Its purpose is the manipulation of the personality within the physical universe. Its most effective method of procedure however is to form the problem concisely, and then to feed it to the subconscious before the personality enters the dreaming state.
quotes.translation: 如同计算机般，数据在需要时即刻精准呈现。自我确实具备处理物质现实的能力，其目的是在物质宇宙中操控人格。然而它最有效的运作方式是：先精确构建问题，然后在人格进入梦境状态前将其输入潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Since any materialization is in effect a mediation between what we may call an ideal which is, by nature, of itself not materialized, and a practical working perceivable symbol of the ideal, each materialization must be composed of some camouflage elements. Within the physical field these perceivable symbols are composed of matter, which is a conglomeration of atoms and molecules. Each individual, creating, say, his version of any given chair, uses entirely different atoms and molecules in his subconscious construction of it.
quotes.translation: 由于任何物质化本质上都是在我们所谓的"理想"（其本质尚未物质化）与理想的可感知实用象征之间的中介，每个物质化必然包含某些伪装元素。在物理领域内，这些可感知象征由物质构成，而物质是原子与分子的聚合体。每个个体在创造其特定椅子版本时，会在潜意识构建过程中使用完全不同的原子与分子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What you are pleased to call the subconscious represents merely the part of the inner senses, or of the inner self, that even your society can no longer ignore. And this is indeed only the surface. Here you find of course the repository for personal memories, and not of personal ego-bound conscious memories either, but also of psychological experiences that the ego itself prefers to forget.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓潜意识，仅代表内在感官或内在自我中连你们社会都无法再忽视的部分。而这确实只是表面。此处当然储存着个人记忆——不仅是受自我束缚的意识记忆，还包括自我本身宁愿遗忘的心理经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: However, when it is enabled to let go its preoccupation with the camouflage universe, it can receive and be aware of data received by the inner senses. Such data does not have to be retained on a subconscious level. The conscious personality can be trained to receive, interpret and retain such knowledge. Otherwise such knowledge would be relatively without value in your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 然而，当它能够放下对伪装宇宙的执念时，便能接收并觉察内在感官所获的数据。这类数据无需保留在潜意识层面。有意识的人格可被训练去接收、解读并保存此类知识。否则，这类知识在你们的伪装宇宙中将相对毫无价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I would suggest however that the first recalled dream for any given evening be compared with the first recalled dream from other evenings, that the second recalled dream from any one evening be compared with the second dream from other evenings, and so forth. This should prove highly interesting, and if such experiments are carried on consistently over a period of years, then the results could lead to excellent evidence for the various layers of the subconscious and the inner self, of which I have spoken for so long.
quotes.translation: 但我建议将某夜首次忆起的梦境与其他夜晚的首次梦境相比较，将某夜第二次忆起的梦境与其他夜晚的第二次梦境相比较，以此类推。这应会非常有趣，若此类实验能持续多年，其结果将为潜意识与内在自我的各个层面提供绝佳证据——这正是我长久以来所论述的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I will see if you can discover these for yourselves, but if not I shall point them out for you when the time comes. I do not believe that it is possible for you to carry your dream experiments far enough to discover certain other factors that do exist between various layers of the subconscious, and falling temperature rates in the physical organism. Therefore I will mention the point here.
quotes.translation: 我会观察你们能否自行发现这些，若不能，待时机成熟时我将为你们指出。我不认为你们能将梦境实验推进到足以发现潜意识各层面与生理机体温度下降率之间存在的某些其他因素。因此我在此先行提及。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Did those "genetically inferior," for example, have the right to reproduce?1 Illness was thought to come like a storm, the result of physical forces against which the individual had little recourse. The "new" Freudian ideas of the unsavory unconscious led further to a new dilemma, for it was then--as it is now--widely believed that as the result of experiences in infancy the subconscious, or unconscious, might very well sabotage the best interests of the conscious personality, and trick it into illness and disaster.
quotes.translation: 例如，那些"基因低劣者"是否有权繁衍？疾病曾被视为如风暴般降临，是个人几乎无法抗拒的物理力量作用的结果。弗洛伊德关于"不洁潜意识"的新观念进一步引发了新的困境——当时（如同现在）普遍认为，由于婴儿期经历，潜意识或下意识很可能破坏有意识人格的最佳利益，诱使其陷入疾病与灾难。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He spoke to his subconscious therefore as a partner and an equal, which indeed it is. It was because of this approach, among other things, that the results achieved were so successful. Nor after stating his case did he then badger the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 因此他以伙伴和平等者的身份与潜意识对话，而它确实正是如此。正是由于这种态度等因素，才取得了如此成功的成果。他在陈述自己的情况后，也没有再去纠缠潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This should lead you to understand why physical time is basically meaningless to the subconscious, and why the inner self has at its command a knowledge of past lives and past endeavors; for the inner self, dear friends, these lives are not in the past, nor is the life of the ego necessarily present to the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这应该能让你们理解为什么物理时间对潜意识而言基本毫无意义，以及为什么内在自我能够掌握过去世和过去努力的知识；因为对于内在自我而言，亲爱的朋友们，这些生命并非存在于过去，而自我的人生也不一定对整体自我而言是当下的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A trip of course was the easiest method and Ruburt hit upon it. Daily methods of dissociation are extremely practical and beneficial. You will notice within a few week's time, if not sooner, an added energy. So-called impulses on your part are often quelled because your ego finds them impractical. The subconscious knows its own meat and sauce, and the best means for its own nourishment.
quotes.translation: 旅行当然是最简单的方法，而鲁柏恰好想到了这一点。日常的分离练习极为实用且有益。你们会在几周内（如果不是更早的话）注意到额外的能量。你们所谓的冲动常常被压制，因为你们的自我认为它们不切实际。潜意识知道自己的养分和调味料，以及滋养自己的最佳方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have endeavored to study rather thoroughly the condition of the other male present in the room, yourself excluded, Joseph, because we find here an almost classic example of the manner in which the individual subconsciously creates physical matter, and the manner in which the psychological and psychic problems of the individual conspire so that the organic perfection becomes disturbed.
quotes.translation: 我努力相当彻底地研究了房间里另一位男性（约瑟，不包括你）的状况，因为我们在这里发现了一个近乎经典的例子，展示了个体如何潜意识地创造物质实相，以及个体的心理和心灵问题如何共同作用，使得有机体的完美状态受到干扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You are simply beginning something new. Make your own arrangements along the lines I have suggested. You will find your daily lives more fulfilling, and will notice it at once. These young people also feel quite legitimately, though subconsciously, that you are beginning to let them down. For the relationship begins to disintegrate into the social discourse they could get anywhere else.
quotes.translation: 你们只是开始了一些新事物。按照我建议的方向自行安排。你们会发现日常生活更加充实，并且会立刻注意到这一点。这些年轻人也相当合理地（尽管是潜意识地）感觉到你们开始让他们失望了。因为这段关系开始瓦解成他们在别处也能获得的那种社交交谈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Take for example this subconscious feeling: "I want to be comforted. If I were sick someone would feel sorry for me and comfort me then." Such a wish is very seldom on a conscious level, but it is often Emotionally charged, and it brings forth immediate results because of the charge it carries. Whenever you catch yourselves in Moods of self pity, then you are courting just such results.
quotes.translation: 以这种潜意识感受为例："我想要被安慰。如果我生病了，就会有人同情我、安慰我。"这种愿望很少出现在意识层面，但它常常带有强烈的情感负荷，正是由于这种负荷，它会立即产生结果。每当你们陷入自怜的情绪时，就是在招致这样的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Because his conscious desire was based strongly upon inner emotional need, and not opposed to it, and because the emotional need at that time was powerful, that is his need to leave on vacation, and because he remembered our discussion on expectation, he was able to utilize both conscious and unconscious energies. In other words, to consciously focus his subconscious psychic abilities to perform toward a definite, material end.
quotes.translation: 由于他有意识的渴望强烈地基于内在情感需求，且与之并不冲突，同时当时的情感需求非常强烈——即他需要去度假——并且他记得我们关于期待的讨论，因此他能够同时运用有意识与无意识的能量。换言之，他有意识地聚焦潜意识的心灵能力，以达成明确而具体的物质目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Once more, it is extremely important that Ruburt keep his mind on his goals, and not burden his conscious mind by trying to figure out circumstances and conditions that are best handled by the infinite intelligence that is within his own subconscious mind. The way and the means will be taken care of. They will indeed appear almost effortlessly -- but he must let the burden of worry go.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，鲁柏必须将注意力集中在目标上，切勿试图揣摩那些应由其潜意识内在无限智慧处理的情境与条件，以免加重有意识的负担。方法与途径自会得到妥善安排，它们几乎会毫不费力地显现——但他必须放下忧虑的重担。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Jane went to hydro as usual this morning, but wasn't too happy about the system. While she was eating a good lunch I thought of telling her the typewriter repair service had called this morning, citing a bill for $90.00 for the repair and a box of a dozen cartridges, but I forgot to mention it as we talked about other things. I'd also called our optometrist and asked his secretary to have him return my call so I could ask him a couple of technical questions about a note I'm writing for Session 901 for Dreams. Since I had to wait for his call -- which never came -- I couldn't leave the house to get Jane's typewriter. I want to try it out to make sure it's okay before I turn my own in for repair, which it needs.

quotes.text: You have been doing rather well. The encouragement of your presence is of psychic benefit to Ruburt, and the exercise in working with the personal subconscious is of help to him also. He is also used to working with you in our sessions, you see.
quotes.translation: 你做得相当不错。你的陪伴对鲁柏具有心灵上的助益，而处理个人潜意识的练习对他同样有帮助。你也知道，他早已习惯在我们的课程中与你合作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: There is also a reason why Ruburt saw the former gallery administrator in the old woman dream, immediately after he perceived the old woman dead. I had mentioned that this woman was known to you in previous life. It is for this reason that Ruburt saw her. However, the elements of the dream were disintegrating, and he saw the woman in the form with which he is familiar with her in this life.
