The washing machine that he saw is an excellent example of subconscious knowledge distortion and fabrication.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在梦见老妇人死亡后立即看到前画廊管理员，这另有原因。我曾提及这位女士在你们前世中相识，正因如此鲁柏才看见她。然而梦境元素正在瓦解，他以今生熟悉的形式看见这位女士。他看到的洗衣机正是潜意识知识扭曲与虚构的绝佳例证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Personal identity, the basic "I", is a product of the subconscious, and as such it exists as an actuality within the electric field; because of this it is basically independent of the physical field, held to it mainly by the ego. The ego directs the identity toward physical orientation. This is an important point.
quotes.translation: 个人身份，即基本的"我"，是潜意识的产物，因此它作为实相存在于电场中；正因如此，它本质上独立于物质场，主要依靠自我维系与物质场的联系。自我将身份导向物质取向，这是重要的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must understand that such occurrences are in no way unusual. If our dream interpretations appear complicated, it is because dreams are complicated, and we are viewing them from the entire group of levels in which they have meaning. To interpret them upon one level alone would be indeed simplicity in itself. But such interpretations lack any full validity, since they lack knowledge of that rich tapestry, the subconscious folds of which dreams are composed and in which they have their validity.
quotes.translation: 你必须明白这类事件绝非异常。若我们的梦境解析显得复杂，那是因为梦境本身复杂，而我们正从它们具有意义的全部层次来审视。若仅在一个层面上解析，固然简单，但这样的解析缺乏完整有效性，因为它们缺失了那幅丰富织锦的知识——梦境正是由潜意识的褶皱构成，并在其中获得其有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The type of dream, or the types of dreams experienced by any individual, is determined by many factors. I am speaking now of the dream experience as it occurs, and not of the remnant of it that his ego allows him to consciously recall. As an individual creates his physical image and environment according to his abilities and defects, and in line with his expectations and subconscious and inner needs, so does he create his dreams; and these interact with the outer environment which he has created.
quotes.translation: 任何个体所经历的梦境类型或多种梦境，由众多因素决定。我现在说的是梦境体验本身，而非其自我允许意识回忆的残余部分。正如个体根据自身能力与缺陷，并依照其期望、潜意识及内在需求创造物质形象与环境，他也同样创造自己的梦境；而这些梦境与他所创造的外在环境相互作用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I wanted to make this point, since matter is created by the subconscious, and since it exists simultaneously and instantaneously, and since its creation or arrival, and its departure or replacement, are instantaneous. Once this is understood it becomes at least theoretically possible to recreate the material of the past, in so far as the patterns for the material have been retained.
quotes.translation: 我想强调这一点：既然物质由潜意识创造，且其存在是同时且瞬时的，其创造或到来、离去或替换也是瞬时的。一旦理解这一点，至少在理论上，就有可能重新创造过去的物质，因为物质的模式已被保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: A point here: It is not understood at all that the uppermost or personal layer of the subconscious is concerned with maintaining the autocratic control and position of the conscious ego. Its inhibitions always are intended to protect the ego.
quotes.translation: 这里有一点：人们完全不了解，潜意识的最上层或个人层面，其职责是维持意识自我的专制控制与地位。它的抑制始终旨在保护自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now when you use the word I, more and more, this is the portion of the self of which I spoke in our last session. You are aware of the ego and able to see yourself as something more than the ego is. This is the I that you have been using in the pendulum sessions, that questions both the ego and subconscious. These are all portions of the self, however; the difference is functional.
quotes.translation: 当你越来越多地使用“我”这个字时，这便是我们在上次课程中我所提及的那部分自体。你意识到自我，并能将自己视为超越自我的存在。这就是你在钟摆课程中一直使用的“我”，它既质疑自我也质疑潜意识。然而，这些都是自体的一部分；区别在于功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Cellular consciousness is a part of the consciousness of the inner ego or inner self. Very loosely speaking, cellular consciousness is to the inner self what the subconscious is to the outer ego. There are of course many differences however.
quotes.translation: 细胞意识是内在自我或内在自体意识的一部分。粗略地说，细胞意识之于内在自体，就如同潜意识之于外在自我。不过，当然存在许多差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I do not mean that Ruburt should not read the material, but he should not read it immediately before a session. It overawes him. I do use much of his subconscious knowledge. I do draw upon the knowledge of his own inner ego. He is helping me very much as it is, but please, Ruburt, do not meddle. Tonight with your overhasty pronouncements on my part you meddled, however innocently.
quotes.translation: 我的意思并非鲁柏不应阅读这些资料，而是他不应在课程前立即阅读。这会过度震慑他。我确实运用了他许多潜意识知识。我也确实汲取了他自身内在自体的知识。他目前已经帮了我很多，但请鲁柏不要干预。今晚你对我那部分过于仓促的论断，尽管出于无心，却构成了干预。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I suggest something. I will say good night. If I feel like going on for hours, it is because one year ago tonight I first made contact with Ruburt--at least a subconscious initial contact of which he was not consciously aware. The year has been a good one, even though my practical suggestions have not been followed, your situation has improved in line with the laws of expectation.
quotes.translation: 我建议到此为止。我要说晚安了。若我还能继续讲上数小时，那是因为一年前的今晚，我首次与鲁柏取得联系——至少是潜意识层面的初次接触，而他当时并未有意识地察觉。这一年过得不错，尽管我的实用建议未被采纳，但你们的情况已依循期望法则有所改善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that such surface reality is not vital and important, or that some information about its own nature cannot be gleaned from its study; but only a small amount can be so obtained. The other fields of which I speak exert their influences upon the physical organism as it exists. These forces are dealt with and balanced by the subconscious, and not by the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 这并非说表面实相不重要或缺乏生命力，也不是说无法从对其本质的研究中获取信息；只是能从中获得的实在有限。我所提及的其他领域，在物质有机体存在时对其施加影响。这些力量由潜意识而非外在自我处理与平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Without such recognition however an encounter could be unpleasant. You have little control, and I am speaking here now all evening, of projections and their circumstances--you will have little control over the constructions of others. If, for example, during projection travel you encounter a disturbing image, you must first will it to disappear. If it is a subconscious fabrication it will vanish, but if you do not will it to vanish it will remain, and then you must deal with it as a reality.
quotes.translation: 然而若无此认知，相遇可能令人不悦。今晚我整晚都在谈论投射及其情境——你们对他人建构的控制力微乎其微。例如，若在投射旅行中遭遇令人不安的影像，必须先以意志令其消失。若是潜意识造物，它便会消散；但若你不以意志令其消失，它就会存续，届时你必须将其视为实相来应对。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: During his life within the physical system attractions with it are of course maintained. At physical death this connection is severed. Polarities are changed in reverse fashion. The individual identity, composed of its electrically and magnetically coded experiences, is therefore intact. I say intact, for to all purposes this is so. When the polarities are changed however in reverse fashion, the present ego follows its attraction to the subconscious, and the two are more or less united.
quotes.translation: 在物质系统内的生命期间，个体与之保持吸引力。肉体死亡时此联结断裂。极性以反向方式改变。由电磁编码经验构成的个体身份因此完整无缺。我说完整，是因为从所有意图来看确实如此。然而当极性以反向方式改变时，当前自我会追随其与潜意识的吸引力，两者或多或少趋于合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As far as your system is concerned, they cannot be suddenly made flesh, to dwell among you. REM sleep or no REM sleep, your dreams exist constantly, beneath consciousness, even in the waking state. The personality is constantly affected by them. Their existence has its own dimension which is connected to the physical organism. It is impossible to deprive a human being of dreams, for even though you deprive him of sleep, this necessary mental function will be carried on subconsciously.
quotes.translation: 就你们的系统而言，它们无法突然化为血肉之躯与你们共存。无论有无快速眼动睡眠，你们的梦境始终存在于意识之下，即便在清醒状态亦然。人格持续受其影响。梦境的存在有其自身维度，与物质有机体相连。剥夺人类的梦境绝无可能，因为即便剥夺其睡眠，这种必要的心智功能仍会在潜意识层面持续运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The investigation of dreams, then, must be accomplished in or on a subconscious level. In order to study dreams properly you must indeed immerse yourself in that medium in which dreams occur. The intense but limited focus of usual consciousness will itself distort the true nature of dreams, and the ego will hold any such conscious examination of dreams within rigid bonds.
quotes.translation: 因此，对梦境的探究必须在潜意识层面完成。要妥善研究梦境，你必须真正沉浸于梦境发生的媒介中。寻常意识那种强烈却受限的聚焦本身会扭曲梦境的真实本质，而自我会将任何对梦境的有意识检视禁锢在僵化的框架内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are many small beneficial ways to use the pendulum, if you work with it seriously. It may be held over certain foods to see if you may be allergic to them. These are indeed questions that I could answer for you, but again, I prefer that you establish this intimate working relationship with your own personal subconscious. The experience itself will be of great value.
quotes.translation: 如果你认真使用灵摆，它有许多有益的小用途。你可以将它悬在特定食物上方，测试自己是否对其过敏。这些问题我本可以为你解答，但我更希望你与自己的个人潜意识建立这种亲密的合作关系。这种经验本身就极具价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego is not aware of the manner in which dreams are created. Neither is it aware of the manner in which the inner self creates physical matter. Neither, therefore, is it aware of those distortions that cause it to construct faults within physical matter, for in all cases the physical matter of the human body will be subconsciously created in line with inner conditions.
quotes.translation: 自我意识并不知晓梦境是如何创造的，也不了解内在自我如何创造物质实相。因此，它同样无法察觉那些导致它在物质实相中构建缺陷的扭曲——因为在所有情况下，人类身体的物质构成都会根据内在状态被潜意识地创造出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You may give any such suggestions and they will be followed. Do not however strain yourself trying to figure out whether or not the suggestions are being followed. Give them, then turn your attention to other matters. You may obviously also direct your subconscious to react only to constructive suggestions from any source. This is in fact an excellent habit to cultivate.
quotes.translation: 你可以给予任何此类暗示，它们都会被遵循。但不要勉强自己试图确认暗示是否被遵循。给出暗示后，就将注意力转向其他事务。你显然也可以指示你的潜意识只回应来自任何来源的建设性暗示。这实际上是个值得培养的绝佳习惯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is this energy that he must utilize now to finish the two books he has begun. Quite literally again, all he has to do is demand that the energy is available, and it shall be. He uses this energy quite subconsciously in his psychic work. He must demand of himself that the energy be used however under various circumstances. When he does not do this he lets himself down.
quotes.translation: 他现在必须运用这种能量来完成已开始的两本书。说真的，他只需要求能量可用，它便会到来。他在灵性工作中相当潜意识地运用着这种能量。他必须要求自己在各种情况下都能运用这种能量。当他未能做到时，便是辜负了自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I intend to go into more material about various planes, and soon to give a comprehensive view of the inner senses and their mechanism and operation. If this is not too much for you I will add this: that the inner senses would correspond to the outer senses of the inner hidden self-conscious self, that is, separated by the subconscious from your ordinary conscious self.
quotes.translation: 我打算深入探讨关于不同层面的更多资料，并很快给出内感官及其机制运作的全面概述。如果这对你来说不算太过，我将补充说明：内感官相当于内在隐藏的有意识自我的心智感官，即通过潜意识与你的普通意识自我相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. You have become somewhat aware of the subconscious. This means that your ego has enlarged its conception of the self, of itself, to include certain activities of which it is now aware. Progress in the development of personality in the long run will be determined by the ability of the whole self to recognize and become aware of all of its self-conscious portions.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们已对潜意识有了些许认识。这意味着你们的自我已扩展了对自身及自我的认知，将某些它现在意识到的活动纳入其中。从长远来看，人格发展的进展将由整体自我识别并觉察其所有有意识部分的能力所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The physician, you see, existed in some dimension, and continues to do so. Obviously there were financial limitations as far as education was concerned. Subconsciously however you leaned in that direction to some fairly considerable extent. This is all difficult to explain. You met, for example, patients. Some of these people you also know in the life that you chose.
quotes.translation: 你看，那位医生存在于某个维度，并且至今依然如此。显然，就教育而言存在经济上的限制。然而，在潜意识层面，你在相当程度上倾向于那个方向。这很难解释。例如，你遇到过一些病人。其中有些人也是你在所选择的人生中认识的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: And in many cases this is true. Again, subconsciously, the patient would wish to give his illness literally away, shove it from himself, so that often a healer responds subconsciously to what he considers a legitimate threat.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下确实如此。再次强调，在潜意识层面，病人会希望将自己的疾病真正地交出去，把它从自己身上推开，因此治疗者常常会潜意识地回应他所认为的合理威胁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your inner pace however depends upon alternating high energy activity. Followed by a slower period of maturation, before final conversion of energy to another form. These individualistic ways of using energy will mark your activities throughout your lifetimes. When your slower period lengthens beyond a certain point, then with you there is difficulty. However you have largely understood this on a subconscious basis, and now almost automatically make necessary inner adjustments.
quotes.translation: 然而，你的内在节奏依赖于交替的高能量活动，随后是一段较慢的成熟期，然后能量最终转化为另一种形式。这些个体化的能量使用方式将贯穿你所有的人生阶段。当你的慢速期延长超过某个临界点时，你就会遇到困难。不过，你在潜意识层面已经很大程度上理解了这一点，现在几乎会自动做出必要的内在调整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The reason is rather simple and in fact quite understandable; and the point here is that Ruburt cannot use conscious caution in these matters in any manner. I am even, and this is quite unusual for me, hesitant at bringing him to discipline here, since he is usually so concerned about subconscious distortion that I do not want to imprint the suggestion in his mind.
quotes.translation: 原因相当简单，实际上也很容易理解；关键在于，鲁柏无法以任何方式在这些事情上运用有意识的谨慎。我甚至——这对我来说很不寻常——在引导他遵守纪律时犹豫不决，因为他通常如此担心潜意识扭曲，以至于我不想在他脑海中植入这个暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is no particular reason why others could not hear me, but practically speaking the ego is usually on guard to prevent such communications. The ego regards anything but itself as an alien, even the portions of the individual's own subconscious. Since these are so often denied by the ego, it is no wonder that voices such as mine only infrequently break through.
quotes.translation: 并没有特别的原因说明别人不能听到我，但实际来说，自我通常处于戒备状态，以防止此类沟通。自我将除自身之外的任何事物都视为异类，甚至包括个体自身的潜意识部分。由于这些部分常常被自我否认，难怪像我这样的声音只能偶尔突破。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: We are bringing all aspects into balance this way. Ruburt's personality has held itself in excellent bonds, being flexible, and it is this flexibility that is extremely important. It is this flexibility, in both of your personality patterns, that gives us needed strength and balance, and I am speaking now of a subconscious flexibility, basic to your personalities.
quotes.translation: 我们正以此方式将所有面向带入平衡。鲁柏的人格以极佳的纽带维系自身，保持灵活，而这种灵活性极为重要。正是这种灵活性——在你们两人的人格模式中——赋予我们所需的力量与平衡。我现在说的是潜意识层面的灵活性，它是你们人格的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This provides necessary balance and necessary control, and results in the sturdy anchorage of the personality in the environment in which it must survive. You have here one of the main reasons why you must request the subconscious to enable you to recall your dreams. The ego would see no reason for such a memory, and on general principles attempts to repress them.
quotes.translation: 这提供了必要的平衡与控制，使人格得以稳固锚定在其必须存续的环境中。这正是你必须请求潜意识协助回忆梦境的主要原因之一。自我意识认为这种记忆毫无必要，并基于普遍原则试图压抑它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （This is but the beginning. Today I listened for the noise again but heard nothing. I then continued putting myself in a light trance, suggesting that my subconscious would give me an experiment that would prove the validity of clairvoyance, premonition or prediction for the chapter I was working on. I was thinking in terms of an experiment for the reader to try.
quotes.translation: （这仅仅是个开始。今天我再次倾听那声响却一无所获。随后我继续让自己进入轻度出神状态，暗示我的潜意识将为我提供一个实验，以证明我正在撰写的章节中关于千里眼、预兆或预测的有效性。我正构思一个可供读者尝试的实验。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that a man has no control over the physical state of his own organism. It is to say that many more factors go into the construction and maintenance of the physical organism than you realize. Subconsciously, man manages to balance these influences, and there are physical mechanisms within the organism whose purpose it is to deal with such data.
quotes.translation: 这并非说人无法控制自身机体的生理状态。而是说，构成并维持生理机体的因素远比你认知的要多。在潜意识层面，人类能够平衡这些影响，而机体内部存在专门处理此类数据的生理机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In any fairly normal personality the intellect will indeed stand guard. There is no need to fear identity's complete immersion into emotional sensation. Such emotional experience actually strengthens not only the ego, but it opens communications between the ego and the subconscious, and allows for a much greater flow of energy from the primary source of action.
quotes.translation: 在相当正常的人格中，智性确实会担任守卫。无需担忧身份认同会完全沉溺于情感体验。这种情感经验不仅实际强化了自我意识，更开启了自我与潜意识之间的沟通渠道，使来自行动本源的更大能量得以流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It should be noted however, that with the exception of several other circumstances the various levels of the subconscious can be found to fall within definite temperature ranges. To some extent this fact can be ascertained through hypnosis. However, suggestion as to the effect that the subjects temperature should rise or fall would tend to obscure the effect.
quotes.translation: 但需注意，除若干特殊情况外，潜意识的各个层次通常落在特定温度范围内。此事实可通过催眠部分验证。然而，若暗示受试者体温应升高或降低，反而会模糊实际效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. Directly, so to speak, beneath this personal material in the subconscious, is racial material which could be of great value to psychologists in their study of racial histories, and resulting psychological differences of the various races. Underneath this is material dealing with the species as a whole, with its background, evolution and inner knowledge.
quotes.translation: 现在，可以说，在潜意识中个人素材的正下方，存在着种族素材——这对心理学家研究种族历史及各民族心理差异具有重大价值。其下则是涉及整个物种的素材，包含其背景、演化与内在知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常言这些划分与分离皆是武断的。一切皆相互蕴含其中。表面上的界限并非真正的界限，只是注意力焦点的差异而已。就连这个内在自我，在不同时刻也并非同一存在，因为它并非静止之物，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它比外在自我更熟悉潜意识、梦境宇宙以及内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, as you call it, represents a tremendous raw power that triggers forth into construction according to the expectations which you form from the emotions. The intellect should help you understand this power plant, so that you can switch your power where it is needed. The intellect should operate like an x-ray, enabling you to see inward.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的潜意识，代表着一种巨大的原始力量，它会根据你们由情绪形成的期待而触发建构。理智应协助你理解这座能量工厂，以便你能将力量导向所需之处。理智应如X光般运作，让你得以向内观照。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is very much concerning the characteristics of the trance state which you do not yet understand, and I can help you here. Hypnotism may seem very strange. It involves no more, however, than a study of human personality, for it involves nothing more than a switching of focus. It is imperative, if we are to speak easily, that you read the material having to do with the specific ways in which the human individual creates physical matter on a subconscious basis.
quotes.translation: 关于出神状态的特质，你们尚有许多未解之处，我在此可助你一臂之力。催眠术看似玄妙，实则不过是研究人类人格的途径，因为它仅涉及焦点的转换。若要畅所欲言，你必须研读关于人类个体如何在潜意识基础上创造物质实相的具体方式的相关资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is not a simple question that may be summed up in a statement, such as "attitudes regulate behavior." What is not understood is that emotional attitudes, conscious and subconscious, have an electromagnetic reality that operates very efficiently, either as an open system which attracts new stimuli, or as a closed electric force that is supercharged.
quotes.translation: 这并非能用"态度决定行为"这般简单陈述概括的问题。人们尚未理解的是，情感态度——无论有意识还是潜意识——都具有电磁实相，这种实相能高效运作，既可成为吸引新刺激的开放系统，也可成为蓄势待发的封闭电力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You will also discover, as I have mentioned, that the various levels of the subconscious will yield their own characteristic data, and as your records grow this will become apparent to you. It is obviously necessary then that your suggestion is given precisely as I gave it to you, for we want the dreams recorded in consecutive order whenever possible.
quotes.translation: 如我所言，你将会发现潜意识的各个层面会呈现其特有的数据，随着记录累积，这点将愈发明显。因此，你必须严格按照我传授的方式给予暗示，因为我们希望尽可能按时间顺序记录梦境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is no point in giving you a superficial analysis, since dreams usually impart knowledge that can be utilized by several levels of the personality; though consciously the information perceived and brought into meaningful context by the subconscious may not be at all comprehensible to the ego, it is nevertheless utilized by the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 给予你肤浅的分析毫无意义，因为梦境通常传递能被人格多个层面运用的知识；虽然潜意识所感知并赋予意义的信息，自我可能完全无法理解，但整个人格仍会加以运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Subconscious is a corridor. What difference does it make which door you travel through? Notwithstanding I can speak through her if I so choose. Once she spoke through me. You can't see the joke, of course. Ha.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是一条走廊。你选择穿过哪扇门又有什么区别呢？不过，如果我愿意，我仍能通过她说话。有一次她曾通过我说话。你当然看不出这其中的幽默。哈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In some instances this happens despite the personality's attempt to hide the weight of the past. Also on many occasions the personality escapes the problems entirely. What happens here is that the subconscious communicates with the entity through the inner senses, to the effect that the present personality is not strong enough to handle the problem.
quotes.translation: 在某些情况下，尽管人格试图隐藏过去的重量，这种情况仍会发生。此外，在许多场合，人格完全逃避了问题。这里发生的是，潜意识通过内在感官与存有沟通，表明当前的人格不够强大，无法处理这个问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The son is even now coming to an inner understanding. Indeed much of this I gain for Ruburt through subconscious telepathy from the personality involved. Were this not so it would be more difficult, but possible, for me to tell you what I do. And if I sound dour and heavy-handed it is only because I must sometimes deal with Ruburt with a heavy hand.
quotes.translation: 儿子此刻正在达成内在的理解。事实上，我通过潜意识心灵感应从相关人格那里为鲁柏获取了这些信息。若非如此，我要告诉你这些会更困难，但并非不可能。如果我听起来阴沉而严厉，那只是因为我有时必须用重手处理鲁柏的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He does not as yet consciously know the extent of his changed attitude. His body knows. You and Ruburt both know subconsciously, and you have begun to sensethe implications on a conscious level, but barely. All of this directly affects your own personal and joint--I will have to use the term for you --future, experience; both in this life and later.
quotes.translation: 他尚未有意识地知道自己态度改变的程度。但他的身体知道。你和鲁柏都在潜意识层面知道，并且你们已开始在意识层面隐约感受到其含义，但只是勉强如此。这一切都直接影响你们个人及共同的——我不得不为你们使用这个词——未来、体验；无论是在此生还是来世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Energy, by nature, replaces itself and thrives with use. A false conception of energy however results in a psychic refusal to transform completely available energy into physical terms, merely because of the subconscious belief that such a transformation is basically impossible.
quotes.translation: 能量，就其本质而言，会自我更新并因使用而茁壮。然而，对能量的错误观念会导致心灵拒绝将可用的能量完全转化为物质形式，仅仅因为潜意识相信这种转化基本上是不可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We will begin by examining the cause behind the breaking up of necessary physical patterns so that survival within the world of matter is no longer possible. Now. Existence within the physical field depends upon a focus of psychic energy, in the subconscious construction of that physical organism without which material survival is not possible.
quotes.translation: 我们将从检视必要物质模式瓦解的原因开始，这种瓦解使得在物质世界中的生存不再可能。现在。在物质场域中的存在取决于心灵能量的聚焦，以及那个物质有机体的潜意识构建——没有这个构建，物质生存便不可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Incidents of this nature may seem trivial. However patterns of behavior are extremely important, and such focus upon disturbances are directly opposed to all I have been trying to tell you. And I am speaking here only of one individual, but such reactions are also picked up by others on a subconscious basis, and the circle can be a vicious one.
quotes.translation: 这类事件看似微不足道，但行为模式极为重要，而将注意力集中在干扰上，与我试图告诉你们的一切直接相悖。我这里只谈论一个人，但这类反应也会在潜意识层面被他人接收，从而形成恶性循环。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As soon as your focus of awareness is switched the physical symptoms will vanish. It requires a knack, but it is simpler than it sounds, and you can master it. This only requires that you give suggestions to your subconscious. Tell it that it knows how to perform this manipulation, and suggest that it do so the next time you are in difficulty.
quotes.translation: 一旦你转移意识的焦点，身体症状就会消失。这需要技巧，但比听起来简单，你可以掌握它。只需向你的潜意识下达指令，告诉它知道如何进行这种操控，并建议它在下次你遇到困难时执行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You are always receiving data from the inner senses. It is sifted through the subconscious, and when you receive it directly, or more or less directly for the first time, it can be frightening merely because of the unfamiliarity, and because of the unusual vividness. This is why I have said that the inner senses present their own evidence.
quotes.translation: 你始终在接收来自内在感官的数据。这些数据经过潜意识的筛选，当你第一次直接或近乎直接地接收时，可能会因陌生感和异常的鲜明性而感到恐惧。这就是为什么我说内在感官会提供它们自己的证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This had no connection. The Gallaghers were at a party that evening. They were somewhat on Ruburts mind, and the name Terwilliger is a subconscious designation he uses for them. A distortion of the words Tim and Gallagher, simply because Tim has a particularly Gaelic connotation for him. More so than Bill, which is our Jesuit's first name.
quotes.translation: 这毫无关联。加拉格尔夫妇当晚参加了一个派对。鲁伯特心中隐约想着他们，而特威利格这个名字是他潜意识中为他们设定的代号。这是对蒂姆和加拉格尔这两个词的扭曲，仅仅因为蒂姆对他而言带有特别的爱尔兰色彩，比我们那位耶稣会士的名字比尔更甚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Another man in an airplane above sees the whole landscape, and through radio communicates to those below about those conditions which they cannot perceive. The man in the airplane, then, can be compared to the inner self, sending messages to other areas of the subconscious, whose energies and focus are necessarily used in limited fashion.
quotes.translation: 飞机上的另一个人俯瞰整个景观，通过无线电向下方的人传达他们无法感知的状况。那么，飞机上的人可以比作内在自我，向潜意识的其他区域发送信息，而这些区域的能量和焦点必然以有限的方式被使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Mark, in attempting to help this other young man, may indeed end up helping himself, for it will turn him outward. But the situation also has other dangers. Because of Mark's background, subconsciously he fears Negroes; and the fear is so great, unfortunately, that it becomes a fascination. He is repelled and fascinated at the same time.
quotes.translation: 马克在试图帮助这个年轻人时，最终可能确实帮助了自己，因为这会让他转向外界。但这种情况也有其他危险。由于马克的背景，他潜意识中恐惧黑人；不幸的是，这种恐惧如此强烈，以至于变成了一种迷恋。他既感到排斥，又同时被吸引。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: The subconscious has great and rather astounding effect in dimensions other than your own, and it sends vivid projections into these other perspectives, that appear there and are in their turn perceived in distorting manner by the outward camouflage senses of those inhabitants. And yet their inner senses give them hints of your reality.
quotes.translation: 潜意识在你们自己的维度之外的其他维度中具有巨大且相当惊人的效果，它向这些其他视角发送生动的投射，这些投射出现在那里，并反过来被那些居民的外在伪装感官以扭曲的方式感知。然而，他们的内在感官却给了他们关于你们实相的暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is very possible that Ruburt will soon discover that I am who I say I am. He knows this subconsciously, but I am speaking now of a conscious recognition. I now bid my friends a fond （deeper and louder） good evening. And if I do not sound like a nightingale, it may be said that I speak in tones not quite as bad as a grandfather frog.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏很可能很快就会发觉我确实是我所声称的那个身份。他在潜意识层面已经知道这一点，但我现在说的是有意识的认知。现在，我向我的朋友们道一声深情的（更低沉、更响亮）晚安。如果我的声音不像夜莺，那至少可以说，我的语调还不至于像青蛙祖父那样糟糕。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In order that you understand it is necessary, as I have told you, for me to break down concepts. In this way much of the unity of certain phenomena may escape you. We have spoken at various times about specific portions of action's manifestations. We have discussed to some degree, for example, the nature of matter, the electrical universe, the dream universe, and such other topics as the layers of the subconscious and the nature of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 为了让你们理解，正如我告诉过你们的，我必须分解概念。这样一来，某些现象的统一性可能会被你们忽略。我们曾在不同时间讨论过行动显现的特定部分。例如，我们曾在一定程度上讨论过物质的性质、电性宇宙、梦境宇宙，以及潜意识层次和整体自性的本质等主题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Emotions may even cause a color reaction. Any reality, regardless of which system it originates within, will appear to some degree within all systems. Even within your own system, though perhaps on a subconscious level, all emotions have a reality in color. They have, as you know, a chemical reaction which is sniffed by other animals.
quotes.translation: 情绪甚至可能引起颜色反应。任何实相，无论它起源于哪个系统，都会在一定程度上出现在所有系统中。即使在你们自己的系统内，尽管可能是在潜意识层面，所有情绪在颜色中都有其真实性。如你们所知，它们会引起化学反应，其他动物能嗅到这种反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is a subconscious domination of father over son, always an implied, always an insidious circle of reaction leading to reaction. It is not strictly necessary that the personality here involved change his environment drastically, If he can understand the circumstances that underlay the relationship between himself and the father.
quotes.translation: 父亲对儿子存在一种潜意识的支配，始终是一种隐含的、阴险的反应循环，导致一个反应引发另一个反应。这里涉及的人格并不一定需要彻底改变他的环境，只要他能理解自己与父亲之间关系背后的那些情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For many reasons this is not best for you, nor is it what you really want. But in working toward a goal that is very distant, a goal that will be extremely difficult for you to achieve, you feel subconsciously that you will be excused from failure; if you fail you can then say that it was because so many obstacles were in your way.
quotes.translation: 出于许多原因，这对你并非最佳选择，也不是你真正想要的。但在朝着一个非常遥远的目标努力时，一个对你来说极难实现的目标，你在潜意识里会觉得自己可以免于失败；如果你失败了，你就可以说那是因为路上有太多障碍。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The money actually has little to do with it here, as far as the basic problem is concerned. Ruburt subconsciously wanted more money to make up for the lack of independence, or rather the taking away of independence. More pay will of course help generally but will not begin to make up for the basic situation, if it is not changed.
quotes.translation: 就基本问题而言，金钱实际上与此关系不大。鲁柏潜意识里想要更多钱，以弥补独立性的缺失，或者更确切地说，是弥补独立被剥夺的感觉。加薪当然会有所帮助，但如果基本状况不改变，这根本无法弥补根本问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The physical organism is not aware of it. The subconscious does receive the information however, in some of these cases. In other cases the experience is simply not recorded in any way within the physical organism, but it is recorded to deeper layers of the self that are divorced to a large degree from any physical manipulations.
quotes.translation: 肉体本身并未察觉这一点。然而，在某些情况下，潜意识确实接收到了这些信息。在其他情况下，这种体验根本不会以任何方式记录在肉体中，而是记录在自我的更深层次，这些层次在很大程度上与任何肉体操作无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This refers me back to your false cause and effect theory. For practical purposes so far this theory has not been too binding, but it is becoming so. Time does not cause change in matter, appearances to the contrary. I am going to skip a giant step, and say that man himself and all conscious beings produce matter subconsciously.
quotes.translation: 这让我回到你错误的因果理论。到目前为止，就实际目的而言，这个理论还没有造成太大束缚，但它正在变得如此。时间并不会引起物质的变化，尽管表面现象相反。我要跳过一大步，说人类自身以及所有有意识的存在，都是潜意识地产生物质的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner senses are connected then to the physical mechanism. Sometimes inner perceptions may be touched off as a result of stimuli received through the outer senses. In many cases however the stimulus comes from the deeper levels of the self, where however it may be translated into terms that the personal subconscious can use.
quotes.translation: 内感官因此与肉体机制相连。有时，内感知可能因通过外感官接收到的刺激而被触发。然而，在许多情况下，刺激来自自我的更深层次，在那里它可能被转化为个人潜意识可以使用的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: An expectation of danger will indeed create danger. An expectation of success will create success. This is put very simply and yet there is nothing, in practical terms, more valid, since expectation has behind it the motivating force of the personality, and utilizes on a subconscious level strong abilities and comprehensions.
quotes.translation: 对危险的预期确实会创造危险。对成功的预期会创造成功。这说得非常简单，然而实际上，没有比这更有效的了，因为预期背后有个性的驱动力，并在潜意识层面利用强大的能力和理解力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: While it does appear spontaneously, a good deal of conditioning and expectation is behind it, and your subconscious mind brings it forth. A somewhat similar loss of the props can also be achieved by partial immersion in an idea with which you are already familiar, as a stepping stone; and this is really what contemplation is.
quotes.translation: 虽然它看起来是自发出现的，但背后有大量的条件作用和预期，而你的潜意识将其引发出来。通过部分沉浸在你已经熟悉的一个想法中，作为踏脚石，也可以实现类似的支持物丧失；而这实际上就是沉思的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In many respects actions within the dream universe are indeed more direct than in your own. It is because you remember but vague glimmerings and disconnected episodes that dreams appear, sometimes, chaotic or meaningless, particularly to the ego, which censors rigidly much of the information that the subconscious does retain.
quotes.translation: 在许多方面，梦宇宙中的行动确实比你们自己的世界更为直接。正因为你们只记得模糊的微光和零散的片段，梦境有时才显得混乱或毫无意义，尤其对自我而言，它会严格审查潜意识确实保留的许多信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As in many other instances I do not try to push you, for you must learn many things by yourselves, and your own subconscious will pace you. You will learn as you learn. You know that a conscious determination such as Ruburt occasionally shows will get you nowhere. A deadly seriousness can, but is not necessarily detrimental.
quotes.translation: 如同许多其他情况，我并不试图催促你们，因为你们必须自己学习许多事物，而你们自己的潜意识会为你们调整节奏。你们将随着学习而学习。你们知道，像鲁柏偶尔表现出的那种有意识的决心，不会让你们有任何进展。一种致命的严肃态度可以，但不一定有害。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: My dear Joseph, there are indeed balances that operate. You need not fear that subconsciously you are going to invite hordes into your home, nor that Ruburt will subconsciously do so.
quotes.translation: 我亲爱的约瑟，确实有平衡机制在运作。你们不必担心潜意识会邀请成群的人进入你们的家，也不必担心鲁柏会潜意识地这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Ruburt wants to know where the words are coming from. He still wants to know if I am part of his subconscious--and I must admit I do find such an idea appalling--and he wants his answers given to him in a manner which his conscious mind can understand. This is our 24th session, and I am still trying to give you the answers.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏想知道这些话语从何而来。他仍然想知道我是否是他潜意识的一部分——我必须承认，我发现这种想法确实令人震惊——他希望他的答案能以他的意识心智能够理解的方式给出。这是我们的第24节课，而我仍在努力给你们答案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These actions exist nevertheless. It does not take you time to perceive them one by one. You perceive them in their completed fashion. Now this other portion of the self experiences these probable events, consciously, with as much rapidity as you subconsciously perceive the million small actions that make up the handshake.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些行动确实存在。你们不需要花时间逐一感知它们。你们以完整的方式感知它们。现在，自我的这一其他部分有意识地体验这些可能事件，其速度之快，如同你们潜意识地感知构成握手的百万个微小动作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: John remembers subconsciously the old situation. This is partially the cause of some of the negative feelings, but there is no guilt in any (underlined) of this. No one save the individual entity knows in what directions weaknesses lie that need correction, and it sets about forming life dramas in which these can be faced.
quotes.translation: 约翰潜意识地记得旧情境。这是某些负面情绪的部分原因，但这一切中没有任何（强调）愧疚。除了个体本体之外，没有人知道哪些方向的弱点需要修正，而它会着手构建生命戏剧，使这些弱点得以面对。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In the creation of art forms, both self-consciousness are allowed with certain reservations to work together. The subconscious channel between them is allowed to open to a great degree. The product of such merging is extremely individualistic, and yet more comprehensible to others than say a fragment from the dream world.
quotes.translation: 在艺术形式的创造中，两种自我意识在特定保留条件下被允许共同运作。它们之间的潜意识通道被允许大幅敞开。这种融合的产物极具个体性，却比来自梦境世界的片段更容易被他人理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This correlation between the layers of the subconscious and temperature ranges is true, or rather observable, only when the personality is in an inactive state. Suggestions of motion or excitement given to it would change and affect the temperature reading, so that this characteristic temperature range could be unnoticed.
quotes.translation: 潜意识层次与温度范围之间的这种关联，只有在人格处于非活跃状态时才成立，或者说才可被观察到。若给予它运动或兴奋的暗示，就会改变并影响温度读数，以至于这种特征性的温度范围可能不被察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Once more, the field of probabilities does not consist of imaginative fancy, nor of nebulous activity. It is quite as real as the physical universe. The experiences that are encountered there by other portions of the self are used by the whole self, and the knowledge thus gains is invaluable. Not only in terms of overall experience, but also as a means of training the ego, and the subconscious, to choose between various activities.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，可能性场域并非由想象力的幻想或模糊的活动构成。它和物质宇宙一样真实。自我其他部分在那里遭遇的经历会被整体自我所运用，由此获得的知识具有无可估量的价值。这不仅体现在整体经验层面，更是训练自我和潜意识在各种活动之间做出选择的手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In actuality, my dear friends, the all-important "I" does know. You do not know the all-important "I", and therein lies your difficulty. It is fashionable in your time to consider man, or man's "I", as the product of the brain and an isolated bit of the subconscious, with a few odds and ends thrown in for good measure.
quotes.translation: 事实上，我亲爱的朋友们，那个至关重要的"我"确实知晓。你们并不了解这个至关重要的"我"，这正是你们的困难所在。在你们这个时代，将人类或人类的"我"视为大脑与孤立潜意识碎片的产物，再随意添加些零碎元素，已成为一种风尚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Often such messages are picked up and translated by the subconscious. The information is used and acted upon without conscious approval or recognition. In almost all cases however, there must be an emotional attraction, for this is what allows for the transmission. Indeed, this is what makes the transmission possible.
quotes.translation: 这类讯息常常被潜意识接收并翻译。这些信息在未经意识认可或觉察的情况下被使用并付诸行动。然而在几乎所有案例中，必须存在情感上的吸引力，因为正是这种吸引力允许了传递的发生。确实，正是这一点使传递成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For those of you who wonder where I place the subconscious, as psychologists think of it, you can imagine it as a meeting place, so to speak, between the outer and inner egos. You must understand that there are no real divisions to the self, however, so we speak of various portions only to make the basic idea clear.
quotes.translation: 对于那些想知道我将潜意识置于何处的人——按心理学家的理解——你们可以将其想象为外在自我与内在自我之间的会合点。但你们必须明白，自我并不存在真正的分割，因此我们谈论不同部分只是为了阐明基本概念。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: And that which you have constructed, you then respond to through the outer senses, and you react to what you have subconsciously created. It is important that these matters be understood when you are concerned with how to change or alter a physical condition, for the change will come from within or it will not come.
quotes.translation: 你所构建的一切，随后会通过外在感官做出反应，并对你潜意识所创造的事物产生回应。当你关心如何改变或调整身体状况时，理解这些至关重要——因为改变必须源自内在，否则便不会发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is the case as far as the idea of a closed system is concerned. All so- called closed systems are caused by a limiting of perception, a narrowing down of distinction, a subconscious agreement that the props are real, and that boundaries exist. Conversely, the boundaries do exist when they are thought to exist.
quotes.translation: 就封闭系统的概念而言，情况正是如此。所有所谓的封闭系统，皆源于感知的局限、分辨能力的缩减，以及一种潜意识的共识——认为道具是真实的，边界是存在的。反之，当人们认为边界存在时，边界便确实存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This process continues beneath conscious and even subconscious awareness. It is not dependent upon the ego, but predates it. These are the first and the last images. The individual cells are the first animals possessing innate awareness of their environment with rudimentary sensemechanisms, to your way of thinking.
quotes.translation: 这个过程持续进行于意识甚至潜意识觉知之下。它不依赖于自我，而是先于自我存在。这些是最初与最终的意象。个体细胞是最早的动物，按你们的思维方式，它们具备对环境的天生觉知以及基本的感知机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is not true, of course, that before the time of modern psychology man had a concept of himself that dealt with conscious exterior aspects only, although it has been written that until that time man thought of himself as a kind of flat-surfaced self -- minus, for example, subconscious or unconscious complexity.
quotes.translation: 当然，认为现代心理学出现之前，人类对自我的认知仅涉及意识的外在层面——例如，缺乏潜意识或无意识的复杂性——这种说法并不正确，尽管曾有文献如此记载。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: There was no communication between the four of you in the past, and no linkage of your lives. There has been however, a telepathic sort of communication between you in the present, and it is no coincidence that you became acquainted. On a subconscious level you realized that many of your interests were the same.
quotes.translation: 过去你们四人之间并无交流，生命轨迹也毫无关联。然而，当下你们之间存在着一种心电感应式的沟通，你们的相识绝非偶然。在潜意识层面，你们意识到彼此有许多相同的兴趣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The subconscious merely is aware of, and operates within, a very valid psychological perspective, with which the so-called conscious self is not familiar. Before physical construction can occur therefore, psychological perception, manipulation and construction of inner data or inner structures must be performed.
quotes.translation: 潜意识仅仅是在一个非常有效的心理视角中运作并觉知其中内容，而所谓的意识自我对此并不熟悉。因此，在物质构建发生之前，必须完成对内在数据或内在结构的心理感知、操控与构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Some understanding is almost automatic, simply because some elements are unmistakably different. You must understand however that basic characteristics of the personality as a whole operate more fully after death. Subconscious drives for good are liberated from egotistical fears. Do you have any other questions?
quotes.translation: 有些理解几乎是自动发生的，仅仅因为某些元素明显不同。然而你必须明白，人格整体的基本特性在死后会运作得更充分。潜意识中对善的驱动力会从自我中心的恐惧中解放出来。你还有其他问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There is also something you forget. You are your subconscious self, and oftentimes what makes no sense to the ego makes good sense to the overall personality. Still, there are psychological balances that always operate when the overall personality gestalt is operating effectively, as it is in both of your cases.
quotes.translation: 还有一点你忘记了。你就是你的潜意识自我，而常常对自我来说毫无意义的事情，对整体人格却很有意义。尽管如此，当整体人格完形有效运作时——就像你们两位的情况那样——总会有心理平衡在起作用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You have been examining others, rather than examining the self. What you see of others is the materialization of what you think, subconsciously, that you are: not necessarily what you are. For example: if others seem deceitful to you it is because you deceive yourself and then project this outward onto others.
quotes.translation: 你一直在审视他人，而非审视自我。你在他者身上看到的，是你潜意识里认为自己是什么的具现化：未必是你真正的样子。例如：若你觉得他人虚伪，那是因为你欺骗自己，然后将此投射到外界他人身上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The subconscious in sleep has great freedom, and has at its command information gained through past experience in this life and in other lives. In the intense focus of awareness that occurs within the dream state, the inner self is able to direct all of its energies for the purpose of solving a given problem.
quotes.translation: 睡眠中的潜意识拥有极大的自由，并能调动此生及前世经验中获得的信息。在梦境状态中高度集中的觉知里，内在自我能够调动全部能量来解决特定问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You said often enough to yourself : "I'd move if the rent were raised." That is one point. The raise was meant to be used as an aid. Now this does not mean that your landlady knew this, but in a way she did, for all of your intentions were subconsciously taken into consideration when such a decision was made.
quotes.translation: 你常对自己说："要是房租涨价我就搬家。"这就是关键点。涨价本应被用作助力。这并非说你的女房东知道这点，但在某种程度上她知道，因为当做出此类决定时，你所有的意图都已被潜意识纳入考量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 这种感知如同所有其他内在感官一样，正被内在自我意识自我所使用，但外在自我不被允许沿此路径获得觉知。这些内在感官的信息在经潜意识筛选后，只有最低限度的信息会被传递给外在自我。但确实只有最低限度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You will have to strike a balance. Too many influences of this nature would be distracting, but some are definitely necessary; and again now, I would suggest that you invite a few congenial visitors to your home. Telepathically and through the inner senses, you pick up extremely valuable and diversified data in this manner, that is enlightening and helpful to the subconscious, and broadens the psychic base of awareness.
quotes.translation: 你必须取得平衡。这类影响过多会分散注意力，但某些影响确实必要；此刻我再次建议你邀请几位投缘的访客到家中。通过心电感应与内在感官，你能以这种方式获取极具价值且多元的信息，这些信息能启迪潜意识、拓展觉知的心灵基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It provides for the deepest spontaneous expression of the subconscious, gives the ego a directive and sense of purpose, and develops the overall abilities of the personality, which in the past were completely denied, for lack of training and out of fear. The poetry was always a part of the psychic nature.
quotes.translation: 它促成潜意识最深沉的自发表达，赋予自我方向感与目标意识，并发展人格的整体能力——这些能力在过去因缺乏训练与恐惧而被完全否定。诗歌始终是心灵本质的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are both acquiring a facility in communication between the ego and the subconscious, which is enabling you to increase the efficiency of your overall behavior.
quotes.translation: 你们两人都在建立自我与潜意识之间的沟通能力，这将提升你们整体行为的效能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (From the 54th session for May 18, 1964:) Your Ruburt was, indeed, Seth ... I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship with its various [physical] personalities. In the beginning, I could not tell you in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年5月18日第54节课：）你们的鲁柏确实是赛斯……我曾承诺提供更多关于"存有"心灵结构及其与各个[物质]人格关系的资料。起初我不能直接告诉你鲁柏就是我，因为你会立刻断定我是鲁柏的潜意识，但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In our dream experiments therefore, this is one of the purposes that we hope to achieve. The ego is not equipped of itself to delve directly into nonphysical realities. If the ego is trained to be flexible however, it will accept such knowledge from the subconscious, and other wider horizons of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此在我们的梦境实验中，这正是我们希望达成的目标之一。自我本身不具备直接探究非物质实相的能力。但若训练自我保持弹性，它便能从潜意识及更广阔的自我层面接收这类知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: She does not realize basically, subconsciously, her importance to you. If you can make her see this you will be able to maintain that sense of independence that is important to you. If you cannot she will be driven to snatch it away.
quotes.translation: 她在潜意识层面并未真正认识到自己对你的重要性。若你能让她明白这点，就能维持对你而言至关重要的独立感。若不能，她将被迫夺走这份独立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This will make sense to you as you contemplate it. It is true that these constructions take place on a subconscious level, but to the degree that you realize what you are doing, they will become more comprehensible to the intellect, until full awareness of the origin of physical matter would be reached.
quotes.translation: 当你沉思这一点时，它就会变得有意义。这些建构确实发生在潜意识层面，但当你意识到自己在做什么时，它们就会变得更容易被理智理解，直到最终完全意识到物质实相的起源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have wanted to cover this because I can prove the existence of this dream world to you, and its continuity, always within the spacious present. You must understand psychological reality, psychological time, psychological experience, and the dream existence before you can learn to utilize many abilities, since in all the mentioned aspects, you use your abilities, that is your inner senses, on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 我一直想讨论这一点，因为我可以向你证明这个梦境世界的存在，以及它的连续性——始终存在于广袤的当下。你必须先理解心理实相、心理时间、心理体验以及梦境存在，才能学会运用许多能力，因为在所有提到的方面，你都是在潜意识层面运用你的能力，也就是你的内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You would then encounter the heart of the camouflage area. The completely uncamouflaged areas at the outer edges of the various systems should remind you of the undifferentiated areas between various life cycles in the subconscious. This is no coincidence, as this general setup occurs in all realities.
quotes.translation: 然后你会遇到伪装区域的核心。各个系统外缘那些完全非伪装的区域，应该让你想起潜意识中各个生命周期之间的未分化区域。这并非巧合，因为这种普遍设置存在于所有实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: While your relationship, that is the relationship between you and Ruburt, is extremely helpful to you both, you have a tendency, each of you, to become ingrown; and psychically you do need a variety, influx and the diversified data subconsciously obtained from others, as you also add to their influx.
quotes.translation: 虽然你与鲁柏之间的关系对你们双方都极为有益，但你们各自都有一种向内生长的倾向；而在心灵层面，你们确实需要多样性、涌入的能量，以及从他人那里潜意识获得的多样化资料，同时你们也为他人的能量涌入做出贡献。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The consciousness of atoms and molecules can be likened to the subconscious as you now know it, in that it is generalized to a large degree, but energy-propelled. You should perhaps realize by now that the inner self, the mind and its components, is composed or forms a unitary force field of its own.
quotes.translation: 原子和分子的意识可以比作你现在所知的潜意识，因为它很大程度上是概括性的，但由能量驱动。你现在或许应该意识到，内在自体、心智及其组成部分，构成或形成了一个统一的力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He has worked with human beings and cats. The very attempt to deprive an individual of sleep, however, will automatically set into mechanism subconscious dream activity. The tampering will then change the conditions. The direct experience of the developing dream is what they should be concerned with.
quotes.translation: 他曾与人类和猫一起工作。然而，试图剥夺一个人的睡眠，会自动启动潜意识梦境活动的机制。这种干预随后会改变条件。他们应该关注的是发展中的梦境的直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I told him some time ago, before sleep, to see himself in highly flexible forms of activity, running, jumping or dancing, and I repeat this now. He should also begin again to suggest that his own subconscious will help him in the dream state, for the images he encounters there can be most beneficial.
quotes.translation: 我早些时候曾告诉他在睡前想象自己处于高度灵活的活动状态，如奔跑、跳跃或舞蹈，现在我再重复一次。他还应再次暗示自己的潜意识会在梦境中协助他，因为他在那里遇到的意象可能极为有益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Twins use communication of the inner senses all unknowing, and what Loriza read of the material moved her subconscious to intuitive realization. The communication between twins is freer than it is with others. Twins are more used to using inner communication, and instances come more easily to mind.
quotes.translation: 双胞胎在不知不觉中使用内在感官的沟通，而洛莉莎所读到的资料触动了她的潜意识，使其产生直觉性的领悟。双胞胎之间的沟通比其他人更为自由，他们更习惯使用内在沟通，相关实例也更容易浮现脑海。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Otherwise I should be all life force and no self. Now, I communicate through this level of Ruburt's consciousness. It is subconscious to him or to his ego, but it is not without consciousness by any means. And again, I communicate through that level. At my own level this is not in itself difficult.
quotes.translation: 否则我将全是生命力而没有自我。现在，我通过鲁柏的这层意识进行沟通。这层意识对他或他的自我而言是潜意识，但绝非没有意识。我再次强调，我正是通过这层意识进行沟通。在我自己的层面上，这本身并不困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As I said it also has to do with a panicky gobbling up of air as if he could never get enough. As a child at one time he died from suffocation, and this also has its bearings here in the present, the panicky gulping of air being a mechanism of subconscious memory. I do hope that this helps him.
quotes.translation: 如我所说，这也与恐慌性地大口吞气有关，仿佛他永远吸不够气。他幼年曾因窒息而死过一次，这与当前情况也有关联——恐慌性的大口吸气正是潜意识记忆的机制。我真心希望这能帮助他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: While it might sound impossible to you, this generalized molecular consciousness, which you would call subconscious, contains within it, in condensed genetic fashion, all knowledge of the inner workings of the universe, this knowledge being acted upon and instantly accessible when it is needed.
quotes.translation: 虽然这对你而言可能听起来不可思议，但这种你称之为潜意识的普遍化分子意识，以浓缩的遗传方式，包含了宇宙内在运作的所有知识。当需要时，这些知识会被立即激活并随时取用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Subconsciously his development along this line is of supreme importance to him, and working less at poetry will cause psychosomatic symptoms. He is afraid of speaking out aggressively when he feels unjustly taken advantage of, as he did not speak out against his mother out of fear of reprisal.
quotes.translation: 在潜意识层面，他在这条路线上的发展对他至关重要，而减少诗歌创作将导致身心症状。当他感到被不公平地利用时，他害怕强势发声，就像他因害怕报复而不敢反抗母亲一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is conscious discipline which can be used by Ruburt, that can negate the subconscious permission, if you so determine, and this with practice will come very easily. As entireties--I use the phrase purposely--however, you respond to many influences that may or may not result in a session.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏可以运用有意识的训练，如果你下定决心，就能抵消潜意识的许可，通过练习这会变得非常容易。作为整体——我特意使用这个措辞——然而，你会响应许多可能促成或阻碍课程的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now, to return to an earlier discussion. What you call suggestion is indeed expectation. You should understand by now how the physical image is constructed. This construction is from the inside out. The inner self attempts to construct a physical image in line with its own self-image. Any errors of construction have their origin not in the inner self, but in either the personal subconscious or in the ego.
quotes.translation: 现在，回到先前的讨论。你所谓的暗示其实就是期待。此刻你应当明白物质形象是如何构建的。这种构建是由内而外的。内在自体试图按照其自我形象来构建物质形象。任何构建错误并非源于内在自体，而是源于个人潜意识或自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Each layer, or each area of the whole self, imagines that it is the center of awareness, and that the whole self revolves about it. So far you have had little experience with these other "centers"--you may put that in quotation marks--but before too long we shall give you some ideas so that you may become at least slightly acquainted. Initially this will be done through suggestion on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 整体自体的每一层或每一区域都自认为是意识的中心，认为整体自体围绕它运转。到目前为止，你对这些其他"中心"——你可以加上引号——几乎毫无经验，但不久后我们会给你一些概念，让你至少能略知一二。起初这将通过潜意识层面的暗示来实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is more important than you know. Subconsciously like many others you believe that once energy is spent it is gone, and also that you have only some arbitrary amount of energy to be used, after which you will become bankrupt. This is not only a false belief but a dangerous and limiting one.
quotes.translation: 这比你认知的更为重要。和许多人一样，你在潜意识中相信能量一旦被消耗就会消失，也相信你只有固定数量的能量可用，用尽后便会破产。这不仅是个错误信念，更是危险且具有局限性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is only learning now not to scold and badger his subconscious. Again, all of this involves action within action. Now. It is the intuitive, spontaneous and psychically exuberant nature of Ruburt's whole entity, for one thing, that makes it possible for me to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏现在才学会不再责骂和纠缠他的潜意识。再次强调，这一切都涉及行动中的行动。现在。正是鲁柏整体存有的直觉性、自发性和灵性充沛的本质，才使我得以与你们两人沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This hidden self-consciousness can also at times look out through your outer senses upon your camouflage world. At these times you get something of the same effect as when you look through a telescope, and you may think of the long tube of the telescope as the channel of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这种隐藏的自我意识有时也能透过你的外在感官观察你们的伪装世界。此时你会获得类似透过望远镜观察的效果，而你可以将望远镜的长筒视为潜意识的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is an unbending conscious pose of the ego, and not to be confused with the lithe subconscious detachment which is actually warm, flexible and expansive. That is, it can contain within it many elements, acknowledge them but be not affected by bad or negative suggestions or elements.
quotes.translation: 这是自我的一种僵化有意识姿态，不可与灵活的无意识超脱相混淆——后者实际上是温暖、柔韧且具有扩展性的。也就是说，它能在自身之内容纳许多元素，承认它们的存在，却不受不良或负面暗示或元素的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Then, according to our analogy, you will find the subconscious areas; and these areas may be, briefly, differentiated in the following manner.
quotes.translation: 接着，根据我们的类比，你将发现无意识区域；这些区域可以简要地按以下方式加以区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: One note to Mark. I have mentioned rather strenuously that it is most necessary for him to find his own establishment. The twinges that he feels are indeed warnings, or nudges rather, from his own subconscious mind, that he do this and thus bring the plans for it into actual reality.
quotes.translation: 给马克的提示。我曾相当强烈地提到，他极有必要找到自己的立足点。他所感受到的刺痛确实是来自他自身无意识心灵的警告，更确切地说是轻推，促使他这样做，从而将相关计划带入实际现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your feelings here largely result from a lack of understanding as to the nature of the subconscious. As I have told Ruburt often you cannot be a pure channel, through which information miraculously flows. You are a personality, and you must interpret the information that you receive.
quotes.translation: 你在此处的感受很大程度上源于对无意识本质缺乏理解。正如我常对鲁柏所说，你不可能成为纯粹的信息通道，让信息奇迹般流经。你是一个人格，必须对你接收到的信息进行诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It will often not be recognized for what it is, however, for there will be no evidence in the physical universe to back up its statements. There will not be much of a problem however, since it will not be reached often. It lies, so to speak, on the other side of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 然而，它往往不会被认出其本来面目，因为在物质宇宙中找不到任何证据来支持它的陈述。不过问题不会太大，因为它并不常被触及。可以说，它位于无意识的另一侧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is no invasion involved in these sessions, as I have told you often. I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship to its fragments. I could not tell you in the beginning in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: 这些课程并不涉及任何入侵，我常对你们这样说。我曾承诺提供更多关于心灵结构及其与自身片段体关系的资料。我无法在开始时直截了当地告诉你们鲁柏就是我本人，因为你们会立刻得出结论说我是鲁柏的无意识心灵，但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The various levels of the subconscious and the personality are attuned to the particular intensities of the dream experience which they can perceive and interpret, and which has meaning to them. The dream experience is much larger and, again, more concentrated than is supposed.
quotes.translation: 潜意识与人格的各个层次会调准到它们能感知、诠释且具有意义的特定梦境强度。梦境体验远比人们想象的更为宏大，也更为浓缩。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I would like to continue our discussion concerning the layers of the so- called subconscious, in connection now with a study of dreams.
quotes.translation: 我想继续探讨所谓潜意识的各个层面，现在结合梦境研究来展开讨论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will now close our session, though you may watch the candle for a moment, as I am teaching Ruburt how to use energy. It is a rather simple matter of directing basic energy along certain lines outside of the physical organism. Everyone does this subconsciously to begin with.
quotes.translation: 我们现在将结束本次课程，不过你们可以注视蜡烛片刻，因为我正在教导鲁柏如何运用能量。这本质上就是将基本能量沿着肉体组织之外的特定路径进行引导。每个人最初都会潜意识地这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is very little danger that Ruburt's ego would be suppressed. Even in psychic work, though generally speaking, of course, the connotations frighten the ego. The danger is that the subconscious be suppressed, and this is the only real time that Ruburt runs into difficulty.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的自我被压抑的可能性微乎其微。即便在心灵工作中，虽然一般而言这些内涵会令自我感到恐惧，但真正的危险在于潜意识被压抑——这才是鲁柏唯一真正遇到困难的时候。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am making this discussion as simple as possible, and using the conscious self simply because less difficulties are presented in explanation. It is obvious, for example, that some events are experienced by the subconscious also, that may or may not be experienced by the ego.
quotes.translation: 我尽可能简化这个讨论，之所以使用意识自我这个概念，纯粹是因为这样解释起来障碍较少。举例来说，某些事件显然也会被潜意识所经验，而这些事件自我可能经验到也可能经验不到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: His present mother, remembering subconsciously past transgressions of his, now counts upon his impulsive nature and sensitivity to pay him back, this of course representing a mistake on her part, for which she will have to suffer the consequences in still another existence.
quotes.translation: 他今生的母亲潜意识里记着他前世的过失，现在正利用他冲动敏感的天性来报复他——这当然是她自身的错误，为此她将在另一世承受相应的后果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Specifically I wanted to mention the matter of subconscious fabrications. Now. Initially particularly, you will meet with these; you must remember that you are wandering in completely different dimensions, and the rules with which you are familiar simply do not apply there.
quotes.translation: 我特别想提一下潜意识虚构的问题。起初尤其如此，你会遇到这些情况；你必须记住你正游荡在完全不同的维度中，你所熟悉的规则在那里根本不适用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The material may be a mixed version of various topics this evening. At our last meeting we discussed dreams and the subconscious. Earlier I mentioned that your concept, distorted concept of cause and effect, led to the idea that all things must have a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 今晚的材料可能是各种主题的混合版本。在上次会面中，我们讨论了梦境和潜意识。早些时候我提到，你们对因果关系的扭曲概念导致了所有事物都必须有始有终的想法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This cannot be done, obviously, at a conscious level. The subconscious can be trained to do so, but usually it is necessarily hampered in that it cannot use those ranges of intensity which make up meanings to the ego. Hence the appearance of what you may call distortions.
quotes.translation: 这显然无法在意识层面做到。潜意识可以被训练成这样，但通常它受到必要阻碍，因为它无法使用那些构成自我意义的强度范围。因此出现了你们所谓的扭曲现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json
