quotes.text: I spoke of this in connection with dreams, saying that they were cunningly constructed, so that any particular symbol would have a meaning for various levels of the subconscious. The appearance of this in Ruburt's predictions represents a first glimpse of real progress.
quotes.translation: 我曾结合梦境谈到这一点，说它们被巧妙构建，使得任何特定符号都能对潜意识的不同层次具有意义。这在鲁柏的预测中出现，代表了真正进步的最初迹象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They will do so in the same way that a nightmare will disappear if you realize that it is a product of your own subconscious. If you treat it as a reality however, then you must deal with it as such, until you realize its origin, or return to the ordinary dream state.
quotes.translation: 它们会以同样的方式消失，就像噩梦在你意识到它是自己潜意识的产物时就会消失一样。然而，如果你把它当作现实，那么你就必须如此对待它，直到你认清它的起源，或回到普通的梦境状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: To be afraid of the shortage of time is to hoard it. To hoard it is to strangle it. But to respect time is not to hoard it, but to let each moment enlarge so that it becomes more than a moment, and only the strong freedom of your subconscious drives can achieve this.
quotes.translation: 害怕时间不足就是囤积时间。囤积时间就是扼杀时间。但尊重时间不是囤积它，而是让每一刻都扩展，使其超越片刻本身，只有你潜意识驱力的强大自由才能实现这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I hope I have made this clear, for it is important that you understand me. In the general field, working with animals, however, you have admirable qualities that can be utilized if you use them toward a practical goal. Subconsciously you do not want to be a jockey.
quotes.translation: 我希望我已经把这点说清楚了，因为你们理解这点很重要。不过，在一般领域与动物打交道时，你们确实拥有可贵的特质，若能将其用于实际目标，这些特质便能发挥作用。潜意识里你并不想当一名赛马骑师。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: He does not see his mother because he imagines subconsciously that he is protecting her from his own violence against her, lest after all these years it might erupt. Now this is ridiculous. This restrained violence has been excellently used for creative purposes.
quotes.translation: 他不见母亲，是因为潜意识里他想象自己是在保护她免受自己的暴力伤害，唯恐经过这么多年后这种暴力会爆发。这实在荒谬。这种被压抑的暴力已被出色地用于创造性的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: As within your universe, as a personality reincarnates into different form, you have the retention of the original personality, intact, with its memories in the subconscious; and you have the additional formation of a completely new personality time after time.
quotes.translation: 如同在你们的宇宙中，当人格转世为不同形态时，原始人格的完整性得以保留，其记忆完好地存于潜意识中；同时，一次又一次地，一个全新的完整人格会额外形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: And added to this, the training will give you valuable information regarding the nature of dreams in general, the stages of the subconscious, and the inner life of the personality when it is dissociated from its physical environment to some considerable extent.
quotes.translation: 除此之外，训练还将为你提供宝贵信息，涉及梦境的一般本质、潜意识的各个阶段，以及人格在相当程度上脱离物质环境时的内在生命。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is here that a reliable hypnotist would be of great benefit, in uncovering many hidden subconscious errors. There is some possibility that I could help here, but the close contact of such a reliable person would be more Emotionally satisfying to the patient.
quotes.translation: 在此，一位可靠的催眠师将大有裨益，能揭示许多隐藏的潜意识错误。我或许能在此提供一些帮助，但这样一位可靠之人的密切接触，对患者而言在情感上会更令人满意。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Through Ruburt's subconscious I picked up the old legend of the Tower of Babel, and yet this is precisely what you are attempting now in space travel. You almost hope, to continue the analogy, that you could construct a building high enough to reach the stars.
quotes.translation: 通过鲁柏的潜意识，我捕捉到了巴别塔的古老传说，而这恰恰正是你们如今在太空旅行中所尝试的。打个比方，你们几乎希望建造一座高到足以触及星辰的建筑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Primarily they refer to your own subconscious feelings toward your father. Not only in regard to yourself, but in regard to your younger brother, and to Ruburt. Now this is on one level, and for a few moments we shall speak about the dreams on this level only.
quotes.translation: 这些主要指向你对自己父亲的无意识感受。不仅关乎你自己，也关乎你弟弟和鲁柏。现在这仅是在一个层面上，我们暂时只讨论这个层面的梦境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You may consult me when you wish. At this point I will not give you definite names for two reasons. One, the possibility of subconscious distortion on Ruburt's part. This should vanish in time. And two, because of the direct effect upon you of such knowledge.
quotes.translation: 你随时可以咨询我。此刻我不给你明确的名字有两个原因：其一，鲁柏方面可能存在无意识扭曲，这应会随时间消散；其二，这类知识会对你产生直接影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are ashamed to admit that to some extent you resent the payments that you both make, and this is the main reason why these fears were not recognized sufficiently by the ego, but forced into the subconscious where they made themselves known in this manner.
quotes.translation: 你羞于承认自己某种程度上对你们共同支付的款项心存不满，这正是这些恐惧未被自我充分认知的主因——它们被压抑进无意识，并以这种方式显现出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: His mother now subconsciously remembers that earlier existence, and his unfeeling attitude as a husband. This is a beautiful example. Mark still attempts to override an earlier propensity toward insensitiveness, and is therefore now sensitive and impulsive.
quotes.translation: 他母亲现在无意识地记得那更早的存在，以及他作为丈夫的冷漠态度。这是个绝佳范例。马克仍在试图克服早期对冷漠的倾向，因此现在变得敏感而冲动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Immediately following the birthday his energies are more certain of themselves. The subconscious remembers the struggles of physical birth, and immediately following his birthday is a time of expansion. This is the end of the personal message to Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 生日过后，他的能量立即变得更为笃定。无意识记得肉体出生的挣扎，生日刚过便是一段扩张期。这是给鲁柏的个人讯息结尾。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You have by now become acquainted with a self you did not know before our sessions, a self who keeps watch upon both the ego and the subconscious. This is no longer theory to you, for you are practically aware of the self in an ever-growing fashion.
quotes.translation: 至此你已熟悉了一个在课程前未知的自我——那个同时监视着自我与无意识的自己。这对你已不再是理论，因为你正以日益增长的方式实际感知到这个自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I can then, therefore, enter the limits of your psychic comprehension. This is a very simplified version, but I must, so to speak, therefore journey through the various areas of Ruburt's whole self, or inner self, until I reach a point where entry into your consciousness is possible. This happens to be the third undifferentiated layer of Ruburt's subconscious.
quotes.translation: 因此，我可以进入你心灵理解的界限。这是一个非常简化的版本，但可以说，我必须穿越鲁柏整个自我或内在自我的各个领域，直到抵达一个能进入你意识的点。这恰好是鲁柏潜意识中第三个未分化的层次。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your guest this evening did not merely happen to come upon your acquaintance, though free will does operate, as I have maintained. Nevertheless Roarck, Ro-ar-ck, also has his subconscious memories, and he remembers the times when we were together.
quotes.translation: 今晚的访客并非偶然结识你，尽管自由意志确实在运作，正如我一直主张的。然而，罗阿克（Ro-ar-ck）也有他的潜意识记忆，他记得我们曾共处的时光。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Because of your state of mind, the people in that room subconsciously felt your presence. Had conditions been better it is possible that they would have sensed you more directly, or even formed a telepathic image of you, as you formed one of them.
quotes.translation: 由于你的心境状态，那个房间里的人们潜意识地感受到了你的存在。若条件更佳，他们或许会更直接地感知到你，甚至形成关于你的心电感应影像，正如你对他们所做的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: My connection with you is obvious from our previous discussions. Ruburt and I were once intimately connected, being offshoots so to speak of the same entity. We developed according to our own abilities. I am not his subconscious nor is he mine.
quotes.translation: 从我们之前的讨论中，我与你的关联显而易见。鲁柏与我曾紧密相连，可以说是同一实体的分支。我们依各自的能力发展。我并非他的潜意识，他也非我的潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Since Ruburt's mother had often spoken most vehemently of Ruburt's birth being a source of disease, that is her arthritis, and pain, subconsciously Ruburt feared on a basic level that his mother wished to punish him for causing her such pain.
quotes.translation: 由于鲁柏的母亲曾激烈地声称鲁柏的出生是疾病（即她的关节炎与疼痛）的根源，鲁柏在基本层面上潜意识地恐惧母亲会因他造成如此痛苦而惩罚他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You create, as you know, physical matter on a subconscious basis, without knowing egotistically that you do so. You create physical matter as effortlessly and as smoothly and as automatically, and as unknowingly as you create your own dreams.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你在潜意识基础上创造物质实相，却不觉知自我在这样做。你创造物质实相，就像创造自己的梦境一样毫不费力、流畅自然、自动自发且不知不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The permanent setup, whenever and if ever arranged, will here be most beneficial, and in ways that I will not now, because of the time, discuss. There is a connection with mental enclosures though it is a subconscious and psychological one.
quotes.translation: 永久性架构无论何时建立，都将在此处产生最有益的效应，其方式因时间关系我暂不讨论。这与精神围场存在关联，尽管这是一种潜意识与心理层面的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your parties were helpful. The moderate drinking helped reunite the conscious and subconscious as a total self, knocking out the unwholesome identification with the mother. The swearing bears a direct relationship to the mother's language.
quotes.translation: 你们的聚会颇有助益。适度饮酒有助于将意识与潜意识重新整合为完整的自我，消除了与母亲之间不健康的认同感。那些咒骂与母亲的语言直接相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In answer to your question, Joseph: both you and Ruburt were subconsciously aware of the Instreams' location, and it was for this reason that you chose the photograph of York Beach, though you did not consciously realize the connection.
quotes.translation: 回答你的问题，约瑟：你和鲁柏都曾潜意识觉察到因斯特里姆的位置，正因如此你们才选择了约克海滩的照片，尽管你们并未有意识地意识到其中的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: My remark in our last session, concerning the aid that Ruburt subconsciously gave me in connection with the voice effect, did not have to do with the inner voice heard by Philip. I believe this was perhaps an error in your paragraphing.
quotes.translation: 上次课中我提到鲁柏在声音效果方面给予我的潜意识协助，这与菲利普听到的内在声音无关。我认为这可能是你分段时的失误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I went into the connection between the third inner sense and concepts for a reason, and this will now be an introduction into the fourth inner sense. And I am appalled: Getting this through Ruburts subconscious should be quite a trick.
quotes.translation: 我探讨第三内在感官与概念之间的关联自有其用意，这将作为第四内在感官的引介。而令我惊异的是：通过鲁柏的潜意识传递这些信息实属不易。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They do not on their own perceive physical objects as such. We will refer to this later, for it will help you understand the ways in which so-called extrasensory perceptions are utilized, both on a conscious and a subconscious basis.
quotes.translation: 它们本身并不直接感知物质实体。我们稍后会讨论这点，这将有助于你理解所谓超感官知觉如何在意识与潜意识层面被运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There is also a mechanism within the subconscious that allows for the materialization or projection of idea or inner vitality into physical construction. This capacity is inherent even in the atom and molecule and smaller particles.
quotes.translation: 潜意识内也存在一种机制，允许将理念或内在活力物质化或投射为物质构造。这种能力甚至内在于原子、分子及更微小的粒子中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is subconsciously aware of them in most cases, but seldom brings this to consciousness, so it is simply a feeling of disquietude on his part. He feels he will be interrupted, but is not consciously aware of this, you see.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在多数情况下潜意识里知道它们，但很少将其带入意识层面，因此对他而言这仅是一种不安感。他感觉自己会被打断，但并未有意识地察觉这一点，你明白吗。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A neurotic on your plane for example would not necessarily be a neurotic on another plane, though he might be. The subconscious has been blamed for too much. Terms sometimes cause more troubles in communication than they solve.
quotes.translation: 例如，你们层面的神经症患者在其他层面未必是神经症患者，尽管也有可能。潜意识被过度归咎了。术语有时在沟通中造成的麻烦比解决的问题还多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Since the individual constructs matter, and indeed constructs his own physical universe, he can improve these constructions; and his expectations are intimately connected with the subconscious mechanism of construction itself.
quotes.translation: 既然个体构建物质，甚至构建自己的物质宇宙，他就能改善这些构建；而他的期待与构建本身的潜意识机制紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: Ruburt is quite free to use the pendulum. This involves something that has nothing to do with me, but is a fairly reliable method of reaching the subconscious. As a rule the answers are dependable, and this is all I will say.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏完全可以自由使用摆锤。这涉及与我无关的某种东西，但它是接触潜意识相当可靠的方法。通常答案可信，我只说这么多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Yes, although I want you to develop your own abilities. Ruburt has been trying too hard lately with psychological time, and trying to make his subconscious function and focus, in the same manner that the conscious mind does.
quotes.translation: 是的，尽管我希望你发展自己的能力。鲁柏最近在心理时间上过于努力，试图让潜意识像显意识那样运作和聚焦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The pendulum is an excellent method of discovering your subconscious feelings, and indeed of changing them. As you both suppose, incidentally, the music you played this evening was highly beneficial from several standpoints.
quotes.translation: 钟摆是发现你潜意识感受的绝佳方法，实际上也能改变它们。顺便提一下，正如你们两人所猜测的，今晚播放的音乐从多个角度来看都极为有益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It should be remembered here that all physical images of other individuals are basically telepathic images, formed subconsciously by the perceiver.
quotes.translation: 在此应记住，所有他人的物质形象本质上都是心灵感应形象，由感知者潜意识地形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your friend, Marian, subconsciously needs to feel that she is needed. It is becoming a mania, and she is courting these problems, or bringing them about. It is a phase however, and she will make her way out of it.
quotes.translation: 你的朋友玛丽安潜意识里需要感到自己被需要。这正成为一种执念，她在招致这些问题，或者说在促成它们。不过这只是一个阶段，她会从中走出来的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is the present personality's desire to express himself, opposed by the subconscious memories of that past life, with its fear of the effects of eloquence used without discretion, that now cause his difficulty.
quotes.translation: 正是当前人格想要表达自我的渴望，与前世潜意识记忆——对不加节制运用口才后果的恐惧——相冲突，才造成了他目前的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It has been tinged psychologically in its entry through the subconscious, but that is all. Emotions are the most vital tools with which you have to work. It is for this reason that you must learn how to use them.
quotes.translation: 它在通过潜意识进入时已沾染了心理色彩，但仅此而已。情绪是你必须运用的最鲜活工具。正因如此，你必须学会如何运用它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have had several matters to discuss with you; our sessions in general, the matter of spontaneity and discipline, your own fears, rather natural enough, concerning any subconscious effect I might have on Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 我有几件事要与你们讨论：我们整体课程的事、自发与纪律的问题、你们自身的恐惧——相当自然——关于我可能对鲁柏产生的任何潜意识影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: On a conscious level, even though Ruburt remembered them, there seemed to be nothing to connect them. This is in keeping with the sometimes necessary inclination of the subconscious to block out such knowledge.
quotes.translation: 在意识层面，尽管鲁柏记得它们，但似乎找不到任何将它们联系起来的线索。这与潜意识有时必要的倾向相符，即屏蔽这类知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Contrary to current opinion, the subconscious is far from rigid.
quotes.translation: 与当前普遍观点相反，潜意识远非僵化之物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is therefore impossible to consider an impeding action, such as an illness, without taking into consideration the particular structure-unifying devices, subconscious and conscious personality tendencies.
quotes.translation: 因此，若不考虑特定的结构统一机制、潜意识与意识人格倾向，便无法审视诸如疾病这类阻碍性行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Jack Kennedy himself had a premonition of events and even in the midst of action he was prepared for death. His subconscious mind always knew the true nature of death and flirted with it consciously.
quotes.translation: 杰克·肯尼迪本人对事件早有预感，即便在行动之中，他也已做好赴死的准备。他的潜意识始终洞悉死亡的真相，并在意识层面与之调情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your particular conscious and subconscious viewpoints are fluent enough so that they do not hamper the basic material or cover it with the rock of dogmatism so that it becomes impossible to find.
quotes.translation: 你特定的意识与潜意识观点足够流畅，因此不会阻碍基本材料，也不会以教条主义的岩石将其覆盖，使其变得难以寻觅。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A very brief note. It is of great benefit that perceptions from the inner senses do not remain in the subconscious but become available to the intellect, and I will go into this at a future date.
quotes.translation: 简短附注：内我感知不滞留于潜意识，而能为理智所用，此乃极大裨益。关于这一点，我将在日后详述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: What you have is this. Let us speak no more of a conscious self and a subconscious or unconscious self. There is one self, and it focuses its consciousness in various dimensions, and that is all.
quotes.translation: 事实是这样的。我们不要再谈论有意识自我与潜意识或无意识自我了。只有一个自我，它将其意识聚焦于不同维度，仅此而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, it is true, has elements of its own distortions, but these are easier to escape than the tons of distortive camouflage atmosphere that weigh your scientific experiments down.
quotes.translation: 潜意识确实有其自身的扭曲成分，但这些扭曲比压垮你们科学实验的成吨扭曲性伪装氛围更容易摆脱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The session has been an excellent one. Even old Doubting Thomas Ruburt is impressed enough with the material to admit that his precious subconscious simply could not be the source of it all.
quotes.translation: 这次课非常精彩。就连一向多疑的托马斯·鲁柏也对这份资料印象深刻，不得不承认他珍视的潜意识根本不可能是这一切的来源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We have said this often. However, suggestions should always be given before sleep, that the subconscious will maintain the organic integrity of the physical organism. This is basic.
quotes.translation: 我们常这样说。不过，建议始终应在睡前给出，让潜意识维持物质有机体的完整性。这是基本原则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: To some extent, and to a much larger extent than you realize, this happens on your own plane, only in this case it is the subconscious will that does the actual transforming.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，且远超你的认知，你们自己的层面也在发生同样的事，只是在此情况下，实际进行转化的是潜意识意志。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We will indeed return to our dreams as connected with various levels of the subconscious, but this is in itself connective material so to speak, and I will continue.
quotes.translation: 我们确实会继续探讨与潜意识各层面相关的梦境，但这本身可说是连接性材料，我会继续讲下去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As for example Freud added a dimension to your world with his discovery of the true subconscious, as far as he was able to perceive it.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，弗洛伊德以其对真正潜意识的发现——就他所能感知到的程度——为你们的世界增添了一个维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This was merely your own subconscious symbolism, but you were unaware of it and therefore of its effect upon you, and so I mention it.
quotes.translation: 这不过是你们自己的潜意识象征，但你们并未意识到它，因而也不了解它对你们的影响，所以我提及此事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that suggestion before sleep will also help. It is the ego that is rigid, not the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，睡前暗示也会有所帮助。僵化的是自我，而非潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json
